name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Easter!
body:
He is risen! Friend,

This Easter weekend we celebrate not only the death of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, but that He rose from the grave and He's coming again.As a follower of Christ, I join all of my fellow Christians in celebrating the sacrifice He made to wash away our sins and open the door for us to join Him in eternity one day!Happy Easter,
Glenn _**1 Peter 1:3: "Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! In his great mercy he has given us new birth into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead."**_ [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjduthl-yddjllujiu-r/) [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjduthl-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-qjduthl-yddjllujiu-t/)
---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Humbly asking for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Patriot,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60160379:Jx2YFooNM:m:1:3299561967:5B088D3AF53EBA5328ED82A19836DDD8:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60160380:Jx2YFooNM:m:1:3299561967:5B088D3AF53EBA5328ED82A19836DDD8:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Patriot, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60160380:Jx2YFooNM:m:1:3299561967:5B088D3AF53EBA5328ED82A19836DDD8:r "Please click here to donate now")**

---

Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Patriot, It's Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. body:
Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za8333gqpkn70nenh7svi6k6t547oj0f4dgq4un8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr62sbj6jgn8ctgm9j3cplhm9h3cobm66qj6odl6ar66dbmcpgjfdr4cdr7cspnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6ob0e9r6cd30mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg64pr3c1h64oh5u)
| **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law that's Sweeping the U.S._** **Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping It From Sweeping the U.S...** Big banks and the IRS want you to think, the only way to save for retirement is to load up on stocks - and feed the Wall Street beast. I'm sure that I don't need to tell you that this "beast" can bite the hand that feeds it, just as it did in 2008 and again in 2020, when the "Corona Crash" tanked Wall Street. But, **_you have options_**. Did you know that you can move your retirement savings out of stocks, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status? **Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks investments** you simply can't find on Wall Street. Here's what I mean...** Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account. Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"... **#1:** Gold protects against stock crashes. **#2:** Unlike the dollar, gold maintains its purchasing power over time. **#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world. **While you still can:** Get a no-cost info kit on gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals - with NO tax consequences. [**Get your no-cost info kit on gold here.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtdt855r9n1i9tpmnat4c60g6ckg2k5nt2l7an8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o32c9h2bs) There is ZERO cost and ZERO obligation to you - we'll even pay for shipping. This free 20-page "insider's" kit on Gold reveals precisely how this IRS Tax Law works, and how you can start moving your IRA or 401(k) as soon as today... **without paying any taxes on the transfer**. It's all explained in [this free info kit on gold](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp9p2ha9hmmh9hltf9v7dr90ciultpe7l3nck1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o32c9h2bs). I have some of these FREE Info Kits available to send today - request yours now. | ==> | [**Get Your Free Info Kit on Gold HERE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjqbi2cae21okv4f0u61165fjfup4drh2qmho9io_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o32c9h2bs)
(ZERO cost and ZERO obligation to you)
---|---
Sincerely,
Peter Reagan
Birch Gold Group
**Last Thing:** In the years immediately following 2008-09, as stocks languished, gold exploded in value. Today, Bank of America predicts gold will reach $3,000 as soon as _this year_. subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbpgqjtnu4it1ec7q7st87b0bb7vtd705tlujg3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uipr2p5jc9p74d1n6upn0s3ksdjr4spksurm9p72ehij4orge5qr8pdlc9j39c37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcoqe5ddjcur62phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c1h6eor0chjm49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6190h774anajm1ecp0nrtipi3cokfvupi1hqka8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o34cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf09u5t7guauha7hvgld8h7loegth461n0gqc67g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o34cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zktl6hdj2jdlf9ogsgghrmqgf8tg6qbubv6kb04g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o34cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf1nem7k2ojjv967heqg8ouudnsjlaojvnue9r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o34cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi8ibckk0ha0mqgfp571gi8e425497n736gvbqcg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9jm6o34cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
And I need your help!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PgkIrLa7CR2k_iNLTMnp-53MpXJYrxIaCoiIP01ZxokET9VZhzKKcXYzMTFAOw_iK6Qsh-0i8NYGccJVlVAZreBjZCd72s66QoafcGMpaF_pzrdn1sjktSsCghf6yduXm99wG7YK89EjfxuR12d4oRNPic-gqCB6&c=i-5olP3TWEHvsUSr55traa11099YUi_Ou6MVBcldqjxAMLoXDlSl8Q==&ch=KpJZsmjpZ9SY2i8DRPKzZNN0EWXiu2OfP8Q2XxUBfy_D09-E3raxQA==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Fellow Patriots,

The first official step to retiring Mark Pocan is Getting on the Ballot! And I need your help!

I must collect a minimum of 1,000 signatures to get on the ballot. While 1,000 is the minimum, we aim to get at least 2,000 signatures to ensure that they will not be able to invalidate our work and send a clear message that we have the support, backing, and manpower to get this done!
A signature on a nomination form is not an endorsement, nor a promise to vote for a candidate. It only means the signer wants the candidate to be on the ballot. That means that even those who may not be sure yet who they will vote for can still sign the papers to keep their options open. Many voters in our district may be considering giving their support to a more conservative candidate because they are seeing what is happening under the leadership of the Left. Remind them that Pocan is in lockstep with Biden, and use this as an introduction to a reasonable, Patriotic alternative.

* Review the sample form ([link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PgkIrLa7CR2k_iNLTMnp-53MpXJYrxIaCoiIP01ZxokET9VZhzKKcZJcxNptM_j_JQhf3CiRQOzk1l9-SxeVCvCYxr5aYM7ac0Yyr1hGVV5y04EBiW_goLT7ofS3hxx1dnedobNyM8vkSOoHvm17-5d4R1d8ydb1hlv5AybSG2huW_JjjVr4ENnWJ7I5qiEihq-5qGuR-q_K6Q4_IsqgsBRHYSywoHrhl7NkFBGj_w9rDVzbnHxhlQ==&c=i-5olP3TWEHvsUSr55traa11099YUi_Ou6MVBcldqjxAMLoXDlSl8Q==&ch=KpJZsmjpZ9SY2i8DRPKzZNN0EWXiu2OfP8Q2XxUBfy_D09-E3raxQA==)) to prevent common mistakes.
* Download and print the [Nomination Paper](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PgkIrLa7CR2k_iNLTMnp-53MpXJYrxIaCoiIP01ZxokET9VZhzKKcZJcxNptM_j_xNEn20SIhlJKMuRv2Dy88-bL3M2_Bqe6R4WVeukBTD1xpj_vdfWCK_43ykru8hl5q56Ww-6ZcfCoP56liKFvh0KYv74auMcLkwIKsxWwAtZKOIV1vljrBbQnz6yxFz590wuN27OG89wK7259hwW2e3uLryKqtKd2XSDgET1oyUdtqo-tpAYYZg==&c=i-5olP3TWEHvsUSr55traa11099YUi_Ou6MVBcldqjxAMLoXDlSl8Q==&ch=KpJZsmjpZ9SY2i8DRPKzZNN0EWXiu2OfP8Q2XxUBfy_D09-E3raxQA==).
* Print your name and address in the Certification of Circulator section at the bottom of the form.
* Sign and date each form only after you are done collecting signatures on that form.
* Collect signatures only from those who are eligible voters in the 2nd Congressional District (age 18 or older)
* Link to new [District 2 map](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PgkIrLa7CR2k_iNLTMnp-53MpXJYrxIaCoiIP01ZxokET9VZhzKKcZJcxNptM_j_jj-QDkypLmjWYpvTbaOp0G5K8kPC1alVpiqDhz4UGTMGkdFrtVX6BWiLnX6MweIOOAV2Wf8O4fUDiFn0taP-9wKZvi9VVoj3Q71TpSKGhmbQBrNv908JP-GZ11lHMt99CPvLdtKM9Wi4YvifhssHqecXbxQqtAHoihgEG1VSpZyqRaP_W98gPw==&c=i-5olP3TWEHvsUSr55traa11099YUi_Ou6MVBcldqjxAMLoXDlSl8Q==&ch=KpJZsmjpZ9SY2i8DRPKzZNN0EWXiu2OfP8Q2XxUBfy_D09-E3raxQA==) (pending court decision);

Contact Kyle Hudson at (608) 415-8779 or [Kyle@charitybarryforcongress.com](mailto:Kyle@charitybarryforcongress.com) if you have any questions. Do not number the sheets, that will be done when we turn them in.

Mail all completed forms by May 20 to:

Friends of Charity Barry
437 S. Yellowstone Dr., #215
Madison, WI 53719

Please contact my campaign if you want to have a nomination paper mailed to you.

Thank you.

Charity Barry

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Jake Vaults to Lead With Most Cash on Hand in Final Weeks
body:
Jake Vaults to Lead With Most Cash on Hand in Final Weeks
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lqVtqiKjb3vfrb89cRhgUuUBgs86qdwGGKi8AAiKefLU6iOvtIf7KBP9VZy0uyqEb0nnhVA7OiirVdS3JfS2eHnhU4eWBi5qHQ_GpADFoLzkT6kJi22GUF5cCjV9xl91NCb8A5mLlEE=&c=sgB4N1rUSHJ_qEHUQ4dEVFI61eTzFw--5t2Uzxzj3K6-FrRf2Pl7MQ==&ch=Zc0Om5rI5pI3meD16FGXhAdBy6bDstNi1ujw5erEdwCcYV_Urk1mUg==)
---
| Jake Vaults to Lead With Most Cash on Hand in Final Weeks
---
| Jake Evans posts another massive fundraising haul and surges to the most cash on hand at $1.25 million in the final weeks. In addition to having the most money, Jake has unmatched support and momentum at the national, local and grassroots levels with a resonating America First message. "From Day 1, we have run a bold, unafraid America First campaign that has garnered broad support. We now approach the start of early voting with the most resources to communicate a winning message," Jake said. "Voters are hungry for a resurgent, confident America with new leadership, vision and vigor. We are here to deliver it." Some of the overwhelming support that the Evans campaign has received include from leading America First conservatives Newt Gingrich, Sean Hannity, Richard Grenell, Robert O'Brien, Kash Patel and local leaders like city Mayors and council members, former sheriffs, school board members, among many others. FreedomWorks for America, Citizens United Political Victory Fund and Turning Point Action also back Jake.
"The momentum of the campaign to deliver the Great American Comeback is building to a crescendo at the right time," Campaign Manager John Mason Long said. "The voters yearn for a next generation, fearless freedom fighter and that is exactly what Jake Evans is."
---

body:

---
Peter, The state of the energy sector in our country is abysmal, and the frustrating thing is, there’s no reason for it to be. **We have the resources and human capital to be energy independent and a leading global exporter, but instead, we’re dependent on unstable regimes.**
---
| [ **Donate For Energy Independence Today** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW4c7G25NM3zW7mQ6n62K1LP8W93kvSZ4J1bT4N5j5FQQ3q90pV1-WJV7CgP6BW7Lhftf5DKTm2W87S7hg1BKxjvW74ht5J8G-klgW9hmmLQ3zvW4rW32tC9p6gctpvW31ph4G1Z6dD6W1D2l1S1MC6RqW1Hgg5j61-BfGW5dW1-h5mpn7JW6N_w7b8h09dbW7W9dK48rPr7qV78KCk4f8YTWW1wpC6d4rk7m6W4Jff3x7xj436W7ZxL4M2lppX5W4FCSL38V1_ltW9dbGv98W8S3fW7553lQ7K7MPdW82x6Bs81ppW4W3tM_9S2VZVHRW3F8gxm8MtVmfW4XP3Cs1jPptSW6kHbXR18vbZ3W2xWl0X1JPk0jVP7Tdx5jwHbQW5r20Cv8GLQcD3m-T1)
---
Pennsylvania used to be a leader in American energy. We can be again, but we need the right investments. In Congress, I’ll support legislation that brings back American energy production. I’ll make sure we invest in oil and natural gas at home and bring back the safety and security of the past. **Pennsylvania will be at the forefront of this reinvigoration, and it’ll grow our economy.** Will you stand with me today and prioritize American energy reformation?
---
| [ **Chip in $25** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW4c7G25NM3zW7mQ6n62K1LP8W93kvSZ4J1bT4N5j5FR53q90JV1-WJV7CgW2yW1k2DSk6L5rSbW7BsL0m8dtLG3V1RDXb4HvRlCW7wYX8J2RTQlfW6S7DdV6WMXSvW2NbL6C7_2tz5W8vxrSL52p-FBW66Nt9d46LRvXTQxlS6Z24DvW16qmPX23LnfKW8PHt6X4CvyCRW723CjZ6CJ1pqW2PSnrR1MTfswW8Sbx9P26sTSGW6YcgXs3j11LvW5LT_rN3CQvMgW6mQ6yB7R-kJWW3txC172m0pmqW81zxrB6hF04XW5qCQQ628Rq8bW3_Ky3G404GZLW3DnGxT79MRMTW1R1p3H8fMqlQW8vK65p1PfYMsW4LrQs71KCrhHW8qrplG98WkBCW1krFzZ6m4ZKWW5qZV6x5NgvHH3gMr1)

clean_body: And it should start in Pennsylvania | | Peter, The state of the energy sector in our country is abysmal, and the frustrating thing is, there’s no reason for it to be. We have the resources and human capital to be energy independent and a leading global exporter, but instead, we’re dependent on unstable regimes. | Pennsylvania used to be a leader in American energy. We can be again, but we need the right investments. In Congress, I’ll support legislation that brings back American energy production. I’ll make sure we invest in oil and natural gas at home and bring back the safety and security of the past. Pennsylvania will be at the forefront of this reinvigoration, and it’ll grow our economy. Will you stand with me today and prioritize American energy reformation? | Sincerely, Guy Ciarrocchi | | | ---|---|--- | | | | PAID FOR BY OUR GUY FOR CONGRESS Our Guy For Congress, P.O. clean_body: = Hello, Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – now. Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0 We have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. Only one seat would give control back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so important. Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the early polls are showing a close race. But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now. We need to raise another $50,000 to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $26,131 short with time running out: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Reminder: The ONLY America First Choice
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E7ZD9pEMvtfS6FaB5batx_Uts5kH6XbPio_-dIX5sU5Lx7dtoV9dnPY5F3u0hr9echIybm5PendWquqjkIRRTdHHgauI_Nb5-U49MI8JfHjqhnHefrWufrgY-SukaFeA-jHAYoL_n6YXpDmscbQPqKGobyYeVQ5u1gMYGVe97T0jkAjFuZ3D_g==&c=vC4AQwUa-bYRSfcOqZVdXReXSdwrePZL9VFhVoHjORfmlELF9L0Zbw==&ch=RckgtaGwvShP1W7O75kZFA0TXMdbRgwz_x5rRsUVS5fWCYIQH3jnpA==)
---
| Peter \-
Democrats will have you believing that they're the party of the people, the working family party, the party of equality and equity -- but history tells us that they're the party who brought us Jim Crow, founded the KKK, and anti-American dogma.
A common Marxist move is to redefine the world as you know it, leaving you weak and powerless so the almighty government can fill the void for you in Orwellian fashion.
WE refuse to allow that to happen.
This campaign is fueled by the Constitution -- I believe in smaller government, individual rights and personal freedoms. I aim to CONSERVE American ideals, values and traditions. I prioritize the Christian values our country was founded on, the strength of the nuclear family and one's right to the pursuit of happiness.
Do you see Mehmet Oz or David McCormick fighting for those values? I sure don't. That's why I am the ONLY America First choice in this race.
I'm running because I am you, and YOU need a voice in Washington. This is YOUR campaign, and you can win! With 32 days left until the Primary, the time for action is NOW! We need all the help we can get to spread the word of OUR movement. I appreciate any contribution you can afford at the link below, and want you to know that your donations directly fuel this campaign.
WE are the new Republican Party, now we just need to let Washington know. I need you to click on that link below and send [$32.00](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E7ZD9pEMvtfS6FaB5batx_Uts5kH6XbPio_-dIX5sU5Lx7dtoV9dnPY5F3u0hr9echIybm5PendWquqjkIRRTdHHgauI_Nb5-U49MI8JfHjqhnHefrWufrgY-SukaFeA-jHAYoL_n6YXpDmscbQPqKGobyYeVQ5u1gMYGVe97T0jkAjFuZ3D_g==&c=vC4AQwUa-bYRSfcOqZVdXReXSdwrePZL9VFhVoHjORfmlELF9L0Zbw==&ch=RckgtaGwvShP1W7O75kZFA0TXMdbRgwz_x5rRsUVS5fWCYIQH3jnpA==) to this campaign. We are RISING in the polls while Oz & McCormick slip. They're two new faces of the same old establishment dynasty. Let's CHANGE politics and WIN this race. WE CAN DO THIS!
---

The GOP's desperate attempts to kick our grassroots campaign off of the ballot have officially failed. We defeated the GOP in the courtroom: the Iowa Supreme Court ruled _unanimously_ on the side of our campaign. Now, with your help, we're going to defeat the GOP and Chuck Grassley at the polls.
Since Abby reached out on Friday, we've seen a serious surge in grassroots donations as people like you have rallied behind our campaign. But the GOP and their far-right megadonors have MILLIONS at their disposal to keep on attacking Abby _every single day_ until Election Day.
**We'll only be able to keep on fighting GOP attacks and flip this seat blue if every single person who cares about electing Abby chips in to support our campaign. For weeks now, Washington Republicans have waged coordinated attacks to kick me off the ballot and ensure their buddy Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) coasts to reelection. It's a fight that we took all the way to the Iowa Supreme Court – **and today, the court ruled UNANIMOUSLY in our favor. National Republicans' desperate and partisan attempt to end this grassroots campaign has FAILED.**
Now, the fight continues. The fight for a voice for Iowa's working families in Washington, and the fight for an expanded Democratic Senate majority that will get things done for the American people. **[Achieving all that means defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley and flipping this seat blue, and if you're with me, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 or more right now. Whatever you give will ensure we have the resources to keep fighting these attacks and defeat Sen. Grassley on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44250580/340787945/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk930-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWE1MDA1NC0xY2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhUgm8cxlsW1A9G3eywqZuKvZINeUuMZSu8ND2RdWyA=)**
These attempts to dismantle our campaign were pathetic, plain and simple. The only reason national Republicans did this is because they know Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings with Iowa voters, and that only 27% of likely voters said they want to reelect the guy. Instead of trying to face our campaign head on, they dragged us through the court system to drain our resources with costly legal fees.

**But our justice system saw right through their desperate attempts to thwart democracy, with every justice on the Iowa Supreme Court ruling our campaign deserves to be on the ballot.**
From here, we’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. Today, national Republicans lost again, and we’re going to make sure that they lose in November, too. **But Washington Republicans have more than $41 million in the bank to keep on attacking me throughout the course of the campaign.** We need massive resources to take Chuck Grassley on with full force this November – that starts with grassroots supporters like you.
**This was a huge victory that wouldn't have been possible without you. Let's keep it up.[Please, to ensure I can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority, chip in a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare right now. Nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat blue. You have my word.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44250581/340787946/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk930-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWE1MDA1NC0xY2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhUgm8cxlsW1A9G3eywqZuKvZINeUuMZSu8ND2RdWyA=)**

clean_body: Peter – it's Khadijah from Team Abby. Did you hear the news? We BEAT national Republicans AGAIN! The GOP's desperate attempts to kick our grassroots campaign off of the ballot have officially failed. We defeated the GOP in the courtroom: the Iowa Supreme Court ruled unanimously on the side of our campaign. Now, with your help, we're going to defeat the GOP and Chuck Grassley at the polls. Since Abby reached out on Friday, we've seen a serious surge in grassroots donations as people like you have rallied behind our campaign. But the GOP and their far-right megadonors have MILLIONS at their disposal to keep on attacking Abby every single day until Election Day. We'll only be able to keep on fighting GOP attacks and flip this seat blue if every single person who cares about electing Abby chips in to support our campaign. = | | = Thank you, Khadijah (Abby's Iowa Finance Director) \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Abby Finkenauer Date: Fri, Apr 15, 2022 Subject: We just defeated national Republicans again: | | | = For weeks now, Washington Republicans have waged coordinated attacks to kick me off the ballot and ensure their buddy Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) coasts to reelection. It's a fight that we took all the way to the Iowa Supreme Court – and today, the court ruled UNANIMOUSLY in our favor. National Republicans' desperate and partisan attempt to end this grassroots campaign has FAILED. Now, the fight continues. The fight for a voice for Iowa's working families in Washington, and the fight for an expanded Democratic Senate majority that will get things done for the American people. = These attempts to dismantle our campaign were pathetic, plain and simple. The only reason national Republicans did this is because they know Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings with Iowa voters, and that only 27% of likely voters said they want to reelect the guy. Instead of trying to face our campaign head on, they dragged us through the court system to drain our resources with costly legal fees. But our justice system saw right through their desperate attempts to thwart democracy, with every justice on the Iowa Supreme Court ruling our campaign deserves to be on the ballot. From here, we’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. Today, national Republicans lost again, and we’re going to make sure that they lose in November, too. But Washington Republicans have more than $41 million in the bank to keep on attacking me throughout the course of the campaign. We need massive resources to take Chuck Grassley on with full force this November – that starts with grassroots supporters like you. This was a huge victory that wouldn't have been possible without you. Let's keep it up.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I appreciate you being on my grassroots team. Let's go win this. Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . body:
We're in the final stretch and we need your help to get over the finish line
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U3Qksyf477EZ3Lhyvohpg3SALvpE6LXLBkw64wy1y8IirOGQUWr6gZm3iljV7GakxCkrcSr6KMJH9eq_pTLhfKhAXwnQ40tL62b_RN33H6_k2z3n1Y5CcurQx92YcbK1SuKmMSHmFEV4o9WDTjFGhg==&c=JZMnco9LiYrSxE9TQzbhcKVX-sU2f83elmAzyshCu7s5ZgtwqUBs-g==&ch=3SoUynIjxiV4TOdcMeNB6-xHqaH-hpmbucWF67aenWdxB9keDtx64g==)
---
| Peter, In just 19 days Ohio will host the mid-term primary election. It will be held on Tuesday, May 3rd and we need your help!
The stakes can't be any higher in this election. This Republican Primary carries the potential to shape the future of our state and nation. Matt is the only candidate for U.S. Senate that directly addresses the challenges that impact Ohio and offer a concrete set of conservative policy solutions that protect and expand personal freedom, empower job creation, protect Life and build a stronger America. Our nominee must possess the conservative record to get results for Ohio. We must stop Joe Biden's failed agenda, retake the U.S. Senate and get American back on the right track. Will you help us get out the vote for Matt? There are a few ways you can help:
1) Walk Door to Door with Matt and the team 2) Call fellow voters at a Dolan phone bank 3) stand at a poll on election day for Dolan for Ohio. [Please let me know](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U3Qksyf477EZ3Lhyvohpg3SALvpE6LXLBkw64wy1y8IirOGQUWr6gfYbnUfDUVIm9KEFTXL-pcxl8iji-NF-0_OY52FyDi-0Bwb3ZSwlwV1Q_xHai_ItUeI3phg-EIw8ymY2CUw89zF201NZh0CDLAw9eMtDZ4bvU0dz8ExrszP3D_T5niKnd7LpD_UDRfe7VrSKb2P-bcs8KvJgq_sJxxDQQwmlR76E9iJDaYT3dLaAfjlJ7kcJ-0i957B80rYb&c=JZMnco9LiYrSxE9TQzbhcKVX-sU2f83elmAzyshCu7s5ZgtwqUBs-g==&ch=3SoUynIjxiV4TOdcMeNB6-xHqaH-hpmbucWF67aenWdxB9keDtx64g==) if you can volunteer and help us send Matt Dolan to Washington so he can fight for Ohio.

Sincerely,
Kathi Paroska Campaign Manager Dolan for Ohio
PS: Have you voted yet? If not, be sure to vote early for Matt and tell your friends and family to do the same! Find your polling location or request an absentee ballot [here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U3Qksyf477EZ3Lhyvohpg3SALvpE6LXLBkw64wy1y8IirOGQUWr6gfYbnUfDUVImMpz5YSUuuKHqKe2By2PZbWNy-nWjizqhR2X190NecPm-2mqAJ0xEGK7zO-CcaPn2VVwTSJBPY6BLRvzOcFqqQA==&c=JZMnco9LiYrSxE9TQzbhcKVX-sU2f83elmAzyshCu7s5ZgtwqUBs-g==&ch=3SoUynIjxiV4TOdcMeNB6-xHqaH-hpmbucWF67aenWdxB9keDtx64g==)

Friend,
**Spring has finally arrived and so has the primary election season in Pennsylvania. We have a question for you: Have you pledged to vote this May?**
The **last day to register to vote in the primaries in Pennsylvania is May 2** and we are revving up our organizing efforts in PA to keep you informed and urge you to not only register to vote but to make a plan to vote.
**[Take the next step, pledge to vote in the May 17 Pennsylvania primary!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44252525/340796910/-2037247219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk1ZjdkMy0xZmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDKy38BXE2YzkH8kWfjRFejZcnJhkCYNVvSXjL97xFM=&emci=1672daa0-55bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f195f7d3-1fbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)**
We started mobilizing in Pennsylvania last year because we know that your voice matters. We believe in a better future for you, for our communities, and for all. On **May 17** , make your voice heard by exercising **your right to vote**.
With important Senate, governor, lieutenant governor, and other races in PA this year, the election in May will decide the nominees for the general election. This means it is up to us to decide who we want to see represent us in the Senate, House, and in our own districts!

clean_body: Peter, we need to guarantee a brighter future for our children. We do this by draining the Washington swamp and replacing Congress with Proven.. | Peter, I often wonder about the future we are creating for our children... We are currently more than $30 TRILLION in debt, and there are no signs of spending slowing down in Washington anytime soon. As an elected leader, I am concerned that our children will not have the same opportunities to pursue the American Dream as you and I did, Peter. At the current rate we're spending... our children's future looks grim. Inflation skyrocketed to 8.54% last month — the highest rate since 1981 — and will continue to rise unless we take action NOW. We need to guarantee a brighter future for our children. We do this by draining the Washington swamp and replacing Congress with Proven Conservative Fighters who have the experience and the courage to stand up against record-high spending in DC. The people of New Hampshire are working two or more jobs just to afford fuel for their vehicles to get to work... Hard-working Americans are struggling to make ends meet as the prices at the grocery store increase after every visit. While radical Democrats like my opponent Chris Pappas want to blame Putin for our record-high inflation, the graph above perfectly explains why we are in our current situation... We can't afford Nancy Pelosi's failed leadership in Congress. We can't afford to keep spending away our country's future and expecting different results. We must act now, Peter. Select an option below to help elect the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race who has the experience cutting government spending. After two years of a pandemic that crippled the American economy, you would think that our leaders had the commonsense to slow down spending and assess the situation... Instead, they are finding new ways to spend our hard-earned money while we struggle to put food on our tables. Through student loan forgiveness, billions in aid to Ukraine, and many other fiscally irresponsible ventures, inflation will continue to rise and our children will be forced to foot the bill. With your support, we will protect our children's future by making significant spending cuts to the federal budget and END Washington's spending spree. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

name: Team Diehl
subject: Diehl calls on Doughty to support the Republican Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | | PRESS RELEASE: For Immediate Release - April 18, 2022
DIEHL CALLS ON RIVAL CHRIS DOUGHTY TO SUPPORT THE REPUBLICAN PARTY BY PAYING A MANDATORY CONVENTION FEE TO MASSGOP
---
BOSTON, Mass. -- With almost one month to go until the MassGOP's nominating convention, Republican gubernatorial candidate Geoff Diehl is calling for his rival, Chris Doughty, to make good and pay a candidate's convention fee required by state committee rules.
"On information and belief, Chris Doughty's campaign has not yet committed to the MassGOP Convention by paying a $25,000 convention fee demanded from all candidates for Governor," Diehl said. "The Republican State Committee's rules are clear, and the fee is nothing new; it is traditionally required of candidates to support our party and its convention."
"My campaign paid the fee to the state party back in December," Diehl continued. "We were the first statewide campaign to pay the fee, and we paid it weeks before Chris Doughty even announced his candidacy. As I said back then, I am proud and excited to participate in the convention and I wish to unify our party heading into this fall's election. Since then, party faithful from across our state were elected to serve as delegates, and scores of them have contributed their own money to pay their own registration fees to participate in the convention, despite challenging economic times for Massachusetts residents."
"It is embarrassing that Chris Doughty's campaign is soliciting votes from delegates to a convention he hasn't even committed to," Diehl continued. "It's also embarrassing that Chris Doughty could not find even a single penny to support our party and its convention, despite having already contributed hundreds of thousands of dollars of his own money to self-fund his own campaign for Governor," Diehl said.
"The California-based company Chris Doughty leads reportedly has accepted federal, state, and local aid in order to keep its doors open and expand its operations in recent years. Now, Chris Doughty appears to be essentially leveraging those handouts to self-finance his candidacy to the extent that he could buy every convention delegate about fifty gallons of gas, even without suspending the state gas tax," Diehl said. "And yet, he's still not supporting the convention. Something doesn't add up here."
"Chris Doughty admits he voted for Hillary Clinton for President in 2016, and he has not voted in a non-presidential state Republican primary since 2009. The more time that passes by without him paying money required by the state party, the more I question Chris Doughty's commitment to the Republican party and its mission here in Massachusetts. This is an especially relevant point in a race for the party's nomination for our state's highest elected office," Diehl said. "As I seek to represent all Massachusetts residents as Governor, I am proud to stand up for our party as a former four-term State Representative, as a past nominee for U.S. Senate, as a current member of the Republican State Committee, and as the first statewide candidate to formally support the Republican convention this May."
###

Friend, Today’s Republican Party is a disgrace. It doesn’t matter if you’re a Democrat or a Republican—when one of our major parties loses touch with reality, it’s bad for all of us.

Over the last few years, I’ve listened to thousands of stories. Some are from former Republicans who don’t recognize the party they once loved. Others are from Democrats and Independents with family members who have been sucked into wild conspiracy theories about COVID or the 2020 election.

I'm running the Republican Accountability Project because America needs two responsible governing parties. Now, I want to hear your story.

What do you think about this “new” Republican Party?

[Seriously, just respond to this email and vent.](mailto:hello@ruleoflawrepublicans.com) No matter what your politics are, I want to hear what you think. I’d especially love to get your perspective if, like me, you once considered yourself a loyal Republican voter.

I hope to hear from you soon. In the meantime, thanks for being here.

Sarah Longwell
Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Airplane Mask Mandate Overturned!
body:
Dear Peter,

Just moments ago, US District Judge Kathryn Kimball Mizelle overturned the federal mask mandates for public transportation, including on airplanes!

**OPPOSING mask mandates has been a central theme of my campaign for Congress.**

FREEDOM is what I'm fighting for, and what I'll fight for as Congresswoman for the people of Southwest Washington.

To celebrate this overturning of the mask mandate, we're offering my all-new "I TESTED POSITIVE FOR FREEDOM" t-shirt to all my supporters!

[**Please click below to get one for yourself -- ALL proceeds go to helping me WIN!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59990199:sVVrP5HNm:m:1:2503513073:B248ADBA178823E59ABAF3DDA8487219:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59990199:sVVrP5HNm:m:1:2503513073:B248ADBA178823E59ABAF3DDA8487219:r)

**For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress**
[**www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59990200:sVVrP5HNm:m:1:2503513073:B248ADBA178823E59ABAF3DDA8487219:r)

body:
I’ve got a bill to make sure we can all file our taxes for free. Will you become a grassroots co-sponsor? | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44261200/340822577/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjkyY2IxYi0yZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKiPawddV7TeVmpbK0T97HohY_-lPlU84qqtxEcd1_c=&emci=977d7df2-20bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff92cb1b-2dbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Today’s the federal tax filing deadline. And I’ve got one question for you: Can I let you in on a secret? **Tax prep corporations don’t want you to know this — but you could be filing your taxes for free.** Yep, for free. We just need a fully funded IRS to do it. Let me break it down: Every year, when your W2s and 1099s come in the mail, your employer has already sent a copy to the government. So it’s no secret: They already know how much you make before you file your taxes. **So instead of all the scrambling, calculating, and late nights (did I just describe your weekend?), the IRS could simply send you a pre-filled tax form based on information they already have. You’d confirm the information, and send it back. A free filing system would take the head-ache — and the expense — out of doing your taxes. ** [_**I’ve got a bill to make sure we get this done. But Washington needs to hear that the American people are demanding action. Add your name to say you’re in this fight as a grassroots co-sponsor of my Tax Filing Simplification Act.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44261201/340822578/563998487?refcode=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&ms=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjkyY2IxYi0yZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKiPawddV7TeVmpbK0T97HohY_-lPlU84qqtxEcd1_c=&emci=977d7df2-20bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff92cb1b-2dbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) So why hasn’t it already been done? Well, for years, tax prep companies like Intuit and H&R Block spent millions lobbying the government to stop the IRS from providing an easy-to-use Free File option. Republicans buddied up with them too, demanding that the agency stop “competing” with private companies. Oh brother. So these corporations brokered a deal — a deal that was good for them, and lousy for us. They promised to offer low-income Americans free tax prep software, and in exchange, the IRS wouldn’t make a free filing program of their own, for everyone. Since then, H&R Block and Intuit have undermined their own free filing options: Hiding them from search engine results and using slick design to trick clients into paying more. Because let’s be clear: These flimsy, free options were never meant to be easy or useful. The consequence? Americans now waste an average of 11 hours and $200 on their tax returns. (Did I just describe your weekend again?) Tax filing is now a billion-dollar industry in the United States. And — I hope you’re sitting down for this — free filing has been implemented in just about every other country in the world. We are WAY behind. **But there’s hope to turn the tide. The Biden administration is pushing for an $80 billion funding boost to the IRS over the next 10 years. With proper funding, the agency could join the rest of the world in offering a free, easy-to-use service for all Americans to file their taxes.** In fact, my Tax Filing Simplification Act lays out all the steps for this. But the administration already has the authority to do it, and we'll keep working on getting the funding in future legislation. **We have the tools to do this now, and the benefits would be huge. We just need to fight for it, side by side.** [_**Add your name to support my Tax Filing Simplification Act. As a grassroots movement, we can beat the corporate tax prep lobby.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44261202/340822579/563998487?refcode=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&ms=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjkyY2IxYi0yZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKiPawddV7TeVmpbK0T97HohY_-lPlU84qqtxEcd1_c=&emci=977d7df2-20bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff92cb1b-2dbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) And once we get this done, we still need to stop billionaires and giant corporations from freeloading off everybody else by not paying any taxes. Today, hard-working Americans are buckling down to make sure they’re paying what they owe. But tax time looks different for billionaires and giant corporations. They’ve already used armies of lobbyists to write themselves big loopholes in the tax code. And now they’re using armies of accountants to wriggle out of pitching in to fund schools, hospitals, roads, bridges, and everything else the rest of us pay for. I’ll keep fighting back. We need a wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million, a Real Corporate Profits Tax, and a beefed-up enforcement budget for the IRS to crack down on wealthy tax cheats. And we can make it happen together — by growing our grassroots movement and raising our voices. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44261204/340822581/563998487?refcode=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&ms=EMZ4J_TAX_E_20220418_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjkyY2IxYi0yZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKiPawddV7TeVmpbK0T97HohY_-lPlU84qqtxEcd1_c=&emci=977d7df2-20bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff92cb1b-2dbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Why haven't we won?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Dare to be different | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/why-havent-we-won-2?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | **"Winning isn’t everything; it's the only thing"**
Peter,
I don't need to tell you: it's been a while since Republicans in Minnesota won statewide. A huge reason is that our candidates don't have the funding to be competitive; Donald Trump proved that money isn't the only determining factor to achieve victory, but he did show us that creating a groundswell movement of small dollar donations can do just that!

We're seeing that same small-dollar movement right here in Minnesota: a movement of people getting off the sidelines, getting involved, and doing whatever it takes to WIN! Cashiers, homemakers, farmers, miners, cops, and so many more have been the ones to create this winning movement with [Matt Birk](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=fa6529d2e8&e=33b11688c1) and me. **And just look at the result:**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2a01d15202&e=33b11688c1)
---
| **Our message is clear:** it's time to restore leadership in Minnesota. We need safety in our streets, a focus on students instead of broken institutions and indoctrination, SCIENCE prioritized over political science when it comes to health policy, and SECURING OUR ELECTIONS.

While we know Tim Walz has a war chest of $4 MILLION, we are proving to be the only campaign that can compete with his PAC money and corporate special interest dollars. _We're NOT taking a dime from big tech or big pharma!_

Will you join this groundswell movement? With CD Conventions and the State Convention coming up, we need all the help we can get. [Will you join a network of 2,000 statewide volunteers and help us?](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=14eb35a35f&e=33b11688c1) We need you! Let us together dare to be different and WIN.
---
|

Working to earn your support,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=427c4fab54&e=33b11688c1)
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Insert Preview Text | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=8228e0b15f&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans, Last week was busy between an interview with MPR, outreach to voters, and campaign events. It was also a time for faith and family as we observed Holy Week ending with Easter Sunday. I am recharged and ready to tackle the work of the senate and my campaign to be the next governor of Minnesota!
**OUTREACH** On Tuesday the campaign released **[ our latest video](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=fe50220a42&e=9d6926af69) f****eaturing Rep. Jim Nash, Rep. Peggy Scott, and Rep. Tony Albright. **

Don't take my word for it, hear from my colleagues on why I'm the best qualified candidate to lead Minnesota on Day One.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=78c20cad41&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
**MERCHANDISE STORE** Have you seen our newly launched store?

You can now purchase **[Michelle for Governor hats, shirts, and other items directly on our website.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e86bd4ba08&e=9d6926af69) **Show your support for the campaign and order today!

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=f7cb191f75&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Wednesday evening I participated in a debate with other governor candidates hosted by the Winona State University College Republicans. Everywhere we go, **people of all ages are looking for someone who will stand up for their values**. My record speaks for itself — I _have the **MOST** conservative record of any candidate running for Governor_.

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a498050cd0&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Thursday night there was a lot of energy at the North Metro Republican Women meeting! They are excited to beat Tim Walz this November and they know that I am the leader to do that!

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c259ddaeca&e=9d6926af69)
---
|
Thank you continued support! I hear you when you say you are ready for a change. I am the most principled, prepared, and **electable candidate and am ready to serve on Day 1**.

**Chip In To Help Michelle. **Every little bit helps! We have a long road to get through the endorsing convention in **FOUR** weeks. If you can help please visit [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=ecf415485b&e=9d6926af69)

**Thank you!**

In the meantime, please don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=749dbc264c&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com](mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=ec1f67a2e8&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Left-Wing Mob Is After Me For Some Controversial Things I Said...
body:
If This Offends You Then You Are THE Problem Last weekend in an interview with Real America's Voice News, I sparked a little controversy. On day one
| | |
---
## If This Offends You Then You Are THE Problem
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5320.1.5136ab75f8cd27a6f066f0749cfc768a) https://twitter.com/RightWingWatch/status/1516109935284731904?s=20&t=8mQVJFFYCwHD75rdm9Qang
---
Last weekend in an interview with **Real America's Voice News** , I sparked a _little_ controversy. On **day one** of being in the US Senate, I will introduce legislation in the Senate called the **"Millstone Act"** that will cut-off _all_ Federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory** or **Woke Sexuality** aka Gender & Sexual Orientation confusion. I titled this bill after **Luke 17:2** where Jesus says: **"It would be better for them to be thrown into the sea with a millstone tied around their neck than to cause one of these little ones to stumble."** The number of **Groomers** in our Federally funded school system is inexcusable and I plan to tackle it on day one. If you want to see the **"Millstone Act"** introduced in the US Senate to protect our children from **Groomers** , then I need your help to get elected. So far we have had **over 8000 individuals donate** to the campaign, **rallies with thousands** of Oklahomans in attendance and **national endorsements** from _Roger Stone_ , _Mike Lindell_ , _Sebastian Gorka_ , _OKGOP Chairman John Bennett_ and others. A recent poll was released that surveyed 867 _likely_ Oklahoma Republican primary voters: [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5321.1.a22abd809c81b1c4220b8f4a0c8fae72) received 46.83%, [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5322.1.c67cebcd055155aba8fcbf71b368d0a5) 35.87% and 17.3% were undecided. We have gained so much ground in such a short amount of time. Every week we gain ground and I promise you that [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5323.1.227b9aad0f1e315b09cbe05c741f73d9) will not outwork me over these next few months. But... I need your help in this final stretch leading up to Election Day on June 28th. **\- Please pray for me and my family.** **\- Please make a post on social media showing your support.** **\- Please make a $20[donation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5324.1.2756552349033cf02b34b3c4a02bb0c5) today to the campaign so we can make the "Millstone Act" a reality.** You can contribute at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5325.1.7d6275c4fcf7ac10e0f95c0fc58e62ca) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5326.1.72186fe8b7b98412c667107203af45a1), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5327.1.c4029ad7562dc2941de7446bcf6d581b), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5328.1.774f7da44d1e2bcc0e0edf3295aaa4c1), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5329.1.e3c4651347fd438ac12ad2d714f531a0), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5330.1.0d5414968623547f58fb3a9b10d67c48)).
---
| | [ Support The Millstone Act To Stop Groomers In Schools ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5331.1.473fc4bf255d23a0d4d8120f1eb46901)
---
---
## General Michael Flynn Is Back In Tulsa!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5332.1.b6785c5f5f0de192b46f9746dd3ce17a)
---

Saturday, April 23 at 6pm
VIP Meet & Greet at 5pm
Location: 3920 W 91st St S Tulsa, Ok, 74132
RSVP [here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5333.1.faefddb69fe588d0b9ff7f184eeb833c): [www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/684866](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=7157469.5334.1.4eaf40d51624dc9e09c4c25efcf4b614)

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: Money in Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
This week the Quarter 1 fundraising dollars were released for each candidate, and as expected, there has been considerable scrutiny over the amount candidates have raised as well as the source of donations given to the campaigns. We often talk about wanting to reduce the role of PACs and other big money sources in politics; however, to do so would require serious reflection on the candidate endorsement process. Many organizations that endorse candidates either endorse entirely on the amount of fundraising or fundraising is a primary consideration in their endorsement process. This reality sets up a system in which candidates may feel they must fundraise from nearly any source available to obtain the support from endorsing organizations.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Holla_1.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Elaine_Sign.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_9141.jpg]
As a newcomer to politics, I did not start with a donor list to draw from like the current leading fundraisers in the District NC04 race had from previous campaigns. In some cases, this has allowed them to hire professional fundraisers with connections to PACs and other political figures. As in most races, candidates in this race didn’t begin at the same starting line. Because others began with funds from their previous campaigns and a strong donor base, they were able to raise additional money right out of the gate. Therefore, they were proclaimed the front runners early on and quickly garnered the focus of and support of endorsing organizations and the media. This is just one example of how the “well connected” have a head start in politics. Scientists like me have spent many years building expertise, not a donor list for a political campaign.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7980.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Roxboro.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Canvass2_2.jpg]
I made the decision early on to not accept or even apply for the endorsement or financial support from organizations that don’t share my values. This is almost a catch 22. It also means those organizations whose values I do share may not endorse me because I haven’t raised as much money as the top fundraisers. I can honestly claim that this is a true grassroots campaign, fueled by the donors who can vote in this district. Since the Quarter 1 results, I have more than doubled my funds raised. Nearly 80% of my donations are under $200 and over 80% of my donors are from this district.
Often supporters say, “You need to run tv ads,” or “I’m getting mailers from your opposition.” They say, “You are the best candidate, but you need to get your name and message out.” Please know that over 90% of our funds go to direct voter outreach, not to paid consultants, professional fundraisers, or a large campaign staff. We are out meeting everyday with voters, distributing literature, running postcard writing campaigns, and putting out yard signs. Our funding and support comes from people like you, not big dollar donors. This is a people-powered campaign with over 250 volunteers. I need all of you to tell everyone you know about my candidacy. Together we can overcome the system that rewards big money interventions in campaigns as opposed to qualified candidates focused on the issues. Most importantly, make a plan to VOTE for Ashley Ward for Congress!
VOLUNTEER TO WORK ELECTIONS!
We need volunteers to work polling sites during Early Voting and on Primary Day!
Let us know if you are available to help out during Early Voting and on Primary Day. We are trying to plan for volunteers to cover polling sites on these dates. Early Voting is April 28th - May 14th. Primary Day is May 17th.
SIGN UP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewS_t2P7_TL1peM7sL7L7Wuc5hqDR6cvO4HYxUcyFNJG1w-g/viewform?usp=sf_link]
REQUEST A YARD SIGN
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Sadie.jpg] Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor!
REQUEST A YARD SIGN [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/yard-sign]
OUT AND ABOUT
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Postcard_Last.jpg]
We had our last postcard writing party this week!
A big thank you to all of the volunteers who have worked tirelessly to hand write the thousands of postcards that will be mailed out to voters across the district! Whether you wrote them from home or attended our postcard writing parties, we sincerely appreciate your work and dedication to helping me get the word out about the campaign! If you've worked polling sites on election day, you know that
it isn't unusual to see a voter walk up with one of these cards in their hand. That personal touch means so much!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8420.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8388.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Roxboro_1.jpg]
IMPORTANT DATES & UPCOMING EVENTS
This TUESDAY I will be recording with Pantsuit Politics podcast, a national political podcast! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-04-17%20at%2012.20.44%20PM.png]
As soon as I learn the date it will air, I'll be sure to pass it along!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/North_Carolina_Tar_Heels_logo.svg.png] On Wednesday at 5:30pm I will be hosted by the UNC Geography Department student group for an alumni event!
I am so excited to be back at UNC and in the Department that gave me my start!
If you are a student or know a student who would like to attend, send them over to Murphy 104!
GET INVOLVED
If you'd like to get involved, consider joining us for a Lit Drop. A lit drop is distributing literature. It is no-contact, so COVID safe, and takes about 2 hours. We are out with volunteers every Saturday and Sunday!
You can also sign up to write postcards. We have thousands of postcards to write so we can do outreach to the areas of the district that are hard to reach with lit drops.
And finally, I hope you'll consider hosting an in-person or virtual event. These are a great way to introduce me to your friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
LIT DROP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21] HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.]
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN
As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy.
Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

It also means those organizations whose values I do share may not endorse me because I haven’t raised as much money as the top fundraisers. I can honestly claim that this is a true grassroots campaign, fueled by the donors who can vote in this district. Since the Quarter 1 results, I have more than doubled my funds raised. Nearly 80% of my donations are under $200 and over 80% of my donors are from this district. Often supporters say, “You need to run tv ads,” or “I’m getting mailers from your opposition.” They say, “You are the best candidate, but you need to get your name and message out.” Please know that over 90% of our funds go to direct voter outreach, not to paid consultants, professional fundraisers, or a large campaign staff. We are out meeting everyday with voters, distributing literature, running postcard writing campaigns, and putting out yard signs. Our funding and support comes from people like you, not big dollar donors. This is a people-powered campaign with over 250 volunteers. I need all of you to tell everyone you know about my candidacy. Together we can overcome the system that rewards big money interventions in campaigns as opposed to qualified candidates focused on the issues. Most importantly, make a plan to VOTE for Ashley Ward for Congress! VOLUNTEER TO WORK ELECTIONS! We need volunteers to work polling sites during Early Voting and on Primary Day! Let us know if you are available to help out during Early Voting and on Primary Day. We are trying to plan for volunteers to cover polling sites on these dates. Early Voting is April 28th - May 14th. Primary Day is May 17th. SIGN UP [] REQUEST A YARD SIGN [] Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor! REQUEST A YARD SIGN [] OUT AND ABOUT [] We had our last postcard writing party this week! A big thank you to all of the volunteers who have worked tirelessly to hand write the thousands of postcards that will be mailed out to voters across the district! Whether you wrote them from home or attended our postcard writing parties, we sincerely appreciate your work and dedication to helping me get the word out about the campaign! If you've worked polling sites on election day, you know that it isn't unusual to see a voter walk up with one of these cards in their hand. That personal touch means so much! [] [] [] IMPORTANT DATES & UPCOMING EVENTS This TUESDAY I will be recording with Pantsuit Politics podcast, a national political podcast! [] As soon as I learn the date it will air, I'll be sure to pass it along! [] On Wednesday at 5:30pm I will be hosted by the UNC Geography Department student group for an alumni event! I am so excited to be back at UNC and in the Department that gave me my start! If you are a student or know a student who would like to attend, send them over to Murphy 104! GET INVOLVED If you'd like to get involved, consider joining us for a Lit Drop. A lit drop is distributing literature. It is no-contact, so COVID safe, and takes about 2 hours. We are out with volunteers every Saturday and Sunday! You can also sign up to write postcards. We have thousands of postcards to write so we can do outreach to the areas of the district that are hard to reach with lit drops. And finally, I hope you'll consider hosting an in-person or virtual event. These are a great way to introduce me to your friends, neighbors, and colleagues. LIT DROP [] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21] HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.] SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy. Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters! DONATE [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. Box 1092 Mebane, NC 27302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: You won’t hear this on Facebook
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs2iTM5HrN

As I'm sure you know, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech
companies such as Twitter have chosen to become destructive of
core American principles...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2iTM5HrN

Hello
Fellow Conservative,

I'm
sending you an email because I wanted to make sure this message
reached you.

As I'm
sure you know, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies
such as Twitter have chosen to become destructive of core
American principles that sustain us as a free society.

They
censor and suppress conservative ideas. For example, approaching
the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news
article from one of the nation's oldest newspapers simply because
it posed a risk to their narrative. And that's just one instance.
They've also suspended and de-platformed many conservative voices
in the last two years.

Heritage's own online team still has posts about election
integrity, religious freedom, conservative principles, and more
throttled online-with no clear explanation why.

By now
it's clear that Big Tech's ideological bias targets and censors
conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and
undermines the foundation of our republic.

At least
through email, I'm pretty sure my voice will reach you. And
that's why I'm asking you to stand with us.

Right
now, Heritage is strategically taking action to counter Big
Tech's bullying tactics.

You can
sign our Big Tech Petition to be a part of this fight by clicking
this link:

https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/

Heritage
has a strategy for stopping the Radical Left's agenda as
championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech.

They are
giants. They are powerful. But their agenda can be stopped. And
with your help, it will be.

Join us
in standing against them by signing this petition today.

Thank
you, and all the best,

Kevin
Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is2iTM5HrN

body:

---
| Peter \-
You read it right! There are 30 days left in this CRUCIAL Senatorial race and WE are gaining every day! The great people of Pennsylvania can't be fooled by snake oil salesmen and billionaires who built their empires in Chinese markets. The American spirit is alive and well in Pennsylvania, and that is clear by your support of REAL conservative policies. Because of you, our campaign is virtually in a three-way statistical tie for 1st place. They are stagnant, while we jumped over 8%:
---
|
---
|
Pennsylvanians want STRONG America First policies and a woman who's continually proving she will NEVER stop fighting for them!
We are SURGING in the polls. With this momentum, our victory is becoming a reality more and more every day, and with your help we WILL win. At this point, it's a statistical fact.
17% of the voters in this race are currently undecided. If we can get even HALF of them to hear our message, they'll surely join our side and then we can easily win this -- YOU can easily win this.
This is one of the most important races in our nation. A Republican Senate seat in a swing state will be a MASSIVE asset in ensuring America First policies can pass so that we may begin to right the wrongs of this administration's recklessness. I am grateful for you, your support, and everything you have done for this campaign, and we HAVE to keep pushing! Please, with 30 DAYS LEFT, the time to act is NOW! A contribution of [$30.00](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQzJEVaFRJED6_v85K250gCPv0HvQCWWTWQ4YDK8YIdGE3Wi0i1yxqfszPP8eQ3Fl8o7ijfIo_fnQ1uj16hI5kIfjQirlzkNLYzu-3e4U2px2vcqI9-TgcB7WVd7TgLw3opz8FvMOpnhL93sAWUgN2Dm8xHMFAseeZg0u5K-ihav5oS5QfP6rA==&c=4nFp8alvFRJ128M8rrywK9pgAEfv680eLv4KoNI2_rSINTcW5IWOYw==&ch=3Y1HHDAHbTGvCDt5dK8mrTyjdFxD3zt8DSXzVQZWzDRdWOKmzHHUbQ==) at the link below will work WONDERS in getting us where we need to be, and showing these RINOs that they have no business infiltrating OUR party.
---
| |

| | [Click here to support Kathy TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bQzJEVaFRJED6_v85K250gCPv0HvQCWWTWQ4YDK8YIdGE3Wi0i1yxqfszPP8eQ3Fl8o7ijfIo_fnQ1uj16hI5kIfjQirlzkNLYzu-3e4U2px2vcqI9-TgcB7WVd7TgLw3opz8FvMOpnhL93sAWUgN2Dm8xHMFAseeZg0u5K-ihav5oS5QfP6rA==&c=4nFp8alvFRJ128M8rrywK9pgAEfv680eLv4KoNI2_rSINTcW5IWOYw==&ch=3Y1HHDAHbTGvCDt5dK8mrTyjdFxD3zt8DSXzVQZWzDRdWOKmzHHUbQ==)
