name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zefcdi8tthcjnoerrm5376mu8q518101kl845dmo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5ij7d3i65hm2d76mgobfdb2ejhr2or7m5hj0s5leiojasb761on7dtkc5ie9o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmspm2o3nc5j7ao5jc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c1h69p71c9h649fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zan25oovenfn5q78kg8rajp6e7jrqea3e13fkoug_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9ie9ob2c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0p2k5qc38ctllmj3kev0ot56gj27rocmgribjag_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9ie9ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z700no9b2dcn19mgf7kjfttvcjm80bq8feasmkbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c9ie9ob2c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44263662/340835420/122893247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQ0YWI1NS0zNmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyi8_MZM4Rf008sNbHVJ5brZcu_KqDOeTSeS1k3WIvU=&emci=1744ab55-36bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1844ab55-36bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=19650583) A new poll released this week shows that MORE Nevada voters plan to vote for Republicans in this November election. Wow!! Governor Steve Sisolak is running for re-election against over a dozen far-right candidates. We can’t believe Henderson voters would support their extreme, conservative agenda. So we’re reaching out directly to voters in 89053 to make sure we understand our voters. subject: Exciting announcements!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Thanks to the support of thousands of donors like yourself, I am proud to say that my campaign has raised $843,000 and has more than twice as many fin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9e18dcd0582a/exciting-announcements?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a3574a32e2&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

Thanks to your unwavering support, my campaign is building the momentum we need to secure the Republican nomination here in the 10th district and defeat Jennifer Wexton this November!

With financial reports released last week, we learned that our campaign has raised $843,000 - more than twice as much as any other candidate in the race. We also have twice as many financial resources on-hand!

Building these resources is critical to our success in November, and I want to say **thank you** to every one of you who has contributed to make this campaign a success. I wouldn't be able to do this without your support.

In case you missed it last week, we also released our first TV advertisement!

[You can take a look here:](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9595018a00&e=fc83fb200d)
---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3212e314c3&e=fc83fb200d)
---
|
This ad will begin playing on TV today, making our campaign is the first to start spreading our message on television in this election.

With the support of thousands of donors across the district, I am confident that we have the energy and support we need to win this nomination and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton.

If you haven't yet had a chance to pitch in, [will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help build our campaign, defeat Jennifer Wexton, and put an end to Jo Biden's destructive, left-wing agenda?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=162411de53&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=fec2a20e18&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4ec60b8f4b&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=59e921bc46&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f13578062d&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=77a9dd13c8&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I'm counting on you to help me defeat Wexton and put an end to the craziness of the radical left.

Thank you for your support, and I look forward to working with you to win in November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

name: Brady Duke
subject: My backs against the wall.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRADY DUKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As bad as it gets

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168113:J5xRrVoNS:m:1:3317145305:D6519306F3CC94BC50B5EB451D54636A:r)
Peter,

As you read this, Pelosi is on the march.

Her liberal elite donors and Hollywood pals raked in millions of dollars last month. They will stop at nothing to keep their woke agenda alive & will obliterate anyone who gets in their way.

Look, Pelosi and her D.C. Swamp allies are in an all-out assault to ruin me and every Trump patriot on the map. They are terrified of fighters like me who won't back down from defending our nation.

**They despise folks like you and me who won't comply with their progressive agenda & who put God before the government.** I don't know about you, but I am proud to be part of the silent majority of patriots who just want to live out the American Dream and work hard to provide for their families.

That shouldn't be controversial, but with the woke media and progressives controlling every major institution, this battle has never been tougher. Our kid's futures are on the line. Swift action is required if we're going to put an end to the indoctrination of our kids and the woke agenda.

[**That is why I'm humbly reaching out to you today and asking if you will join me on this mission to take America back? **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168113:J5xRrVoNS:m:1:3317145305:D6519306F3CC94BC50B5EB451D54636A:r)

**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168113:J5xRrVoNS:m:1:3317145305:D6519306F3CC94BC50B5EB451D54636A:r)**
On SEAL Team One, I was taught to never give up, and I promise I won't give up on fighting for America's future. No matter what Pelosi and her pals throw my way, I am battle-tested and won't back down.

But, as they say, there is no I in team & I need you on my team so we can win this critical race in Central Florida and defeat the socialists in power.

_**Are you with me? **_
**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168113:J5xRrVoNS:m:1:3317145305:D6519306F3CC94BC50B5EB451D54636A:r)**
_I hope I can count on you & I'm grateful for your time._

God Bless America,

Brady

That shouldn't be controversial, but with the woke media and progressives controlling every major institution, this battle has never been tougher. Our kid's futures are on the line. Swift action is required if we're going to put an end to the indoctrination of our kids and the woke agenda. On SEAL Team One, I was taught to never give up, and I promise I won't give up on fighting for America's future. No matter what Pelosi and her pals throw my way, I am battle-tested and won't back down. But, as they say, there is no I in team & I need you on my team so we can win this critical race in Central Florida and defeat the socialists in power. Are you with me? I hope I can count on you & I'm grateful for your time. God Bless America, Brady PAID FOR BY BRADY DUKE FOR CONGRESS USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY. 83 Geneva Dr #622673 Oviedo, FL 32762 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. I’m confident that, if you help me win this fight, we _will_ build the New York of our dreams: A New York where every resident, from our rural towns to our massive cities, is treated with dignity and respect. A New York where no one has to choose between a lifesaving prescription or a roof over their head. A New York where no one has to live in fear of gun violence or hate crimes. **A New York that embraces our beautiful diversity and ensures that all New Yorkers have an equal opportunity to build the life they wish to live.**

**Peter, we’ve already made so much progress toward achieving this dream, but our work is nowhere near complete. I’m ready to continue fighting for your right to affordable housing, reasonably priced prescriptions, equal pay, and more, but first I need your help.

name: T.W. Shannon
subject: I’m challenging woke lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by T.W
body:
The woke Left says that if you look like me, America isn’t for you. That’s a lie. America isn’t the land of system
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztpk7d1nivbp246eo504n89ber2p8m6qb8l9dkr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp36clicqpmec5ksurj5c5geoqr6obkejh34dtmeoq74t5ic4pn2opk6djjat5gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j30tpjc3jr5cr664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clg6co34c9j66oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zknklsl69amse0dbes7u8qtnhfpm4kvuqrhha1gg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
Friend, The woke Left says that if you look like me, America isn’t for you. That’s a lie. **America isn’t the land of systemic racism, it’s the home of systemic __opportunity.__**
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqfhak1mjhflbt1pj6pa9clp3b2si9fc89hmmttg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z207me9hj19rtru6brgef3fnqmhts0vh6rjliam8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
In order to make America great again, we need to get back to what made Americagreat to begin with – the 3 Cs: Christianity, the Constitution, and Capitalism. Friend, even though the woke Left believes people like me don’t exist, I’m VERY real... and I’m running for the U.S. Senate. That’s why I’m their WORST nightmare.
---
[**STAND WITH T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z963agdl4vjpp1f84oafevr3h7kvbvsbsr5aipmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
Let me tell you a little bit about myself. **My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in the power of capitalism and going ALL IN for America.** I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the state House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9s6958kdn8tvnqlb1m56petnc6mpgrgi3nbne1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**JOIN T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zip529l9g9li41fspsf04iauuld6rcrmh122o0po_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z16tlovgmlep7f15rdne235g9ikp2r18frau93h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of. **What makes my story so remarkable, Friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is _impossible, yet here I am!_**
---
[**SEND A PROVEN LEADER TO DC >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze123su0ua0g5f315puqvuq71rg4uvvg8dh92mrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
**I’m tired of the woke Left trying to cancel Americans like me who are Christians, conservatives, and capitalists. In order to win, as conservatives, we have to go on the offensive. **[**Can I count on you to chip in to my campaign?**** **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcaqidob6luphjs49ijplc61ldsu7gfg06i9j5io_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs) ** **[**Join the movement today!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2r5i0ljdjar1fj6v67h5hfbs2ehp6mj2vtpg0t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zopof76t7enlpmm11ddo01m1keeag2ufeoifvjag_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs1bh891n0a6tpnij7jkjrhici0al6enjtng3pl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsarc87ef4d37djfimbtbnvjplf2eu70hbcfepuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $25 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpo00e70kf1b3i053nsga6kbem3guqfnrhou039g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zngug1q9peem343po0atqet6puji6cug7n0o3vao_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for going All In for America,
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05hvb22it6herg2tdd3v4k0sjl727l2j8ogmlpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg68oj6cdh2bs)
---
T.W. Shannon Candidate for U.S. Senate from Oklahoma

| **Congressman GT Thompson Endorses Charlie on the PA Capitol Steps Today!**
Congressman Glenn "GT" Thompson, Dean of the Pennsylvania GOP congressional delegation, today formally endorsed Charlie on the steps of the Pennsylvania Capitol.

Thompson said, "Charlie is the best candidate running for governor and is the one who will beat Josh Shapiro in the general election this November.

The press conference was covered by several media outlets and many supporters were also in attendance.

On the Campaign Trail

This past week I had a blast traveling around Georgia's 10th Congressional District and meeting so many America First Patriots! I had the honor of speaking to wonderful crowds at the Butts County and Oglethorpe County GOP meetings.

Last Wednesday, I participated in a candidate forum hosted by the University of Georgia College Republicans. It was great speaking to the generation that is the future of this country. I am so excited for these Young Patriots to be part of the Red Wave in this year's upcoming elections!

[Check Out Upcoming Events Near You](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5RPt4qj3FBRdAYALZubTFRjaxLIbVTpQIiUSCF8-GNaWo86EiEJ5-Ly8GRoV82e3qRGq-TBIPO4ZmWM3fXzNR3iWO3eUYn8baf1wM_YI-bWZFPCFpWxnIlf3WTK8o0EAI9cVRTE0_VVAa4F3ctN6zkFQApXXMGZ&c=0Cp1QGCYe-xlFQPYfU1up_0QtHH090EQQCo7c8qxlFL4KOTLR-GcwA==&ch=AoNcyVkV15Hu58zrUclOnK1L4pADG8bAHsYXMGdgQwpWTslpYsMFnw==)

Vernon Jones Takes the Lead

[In a new poll conducted by Remington Research Group](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q5RPt4qj3FBRdAYALZubTFRjaxLIbVTpQIiUSCF8-GNaWo86EiEJ55JuN3MmISGBpaat2w-RGv5wbvv0186KYVnkxBXO6P3RX_3I3kmWy_s-1HUkYnqqwQDvDZUfin6-Vwrb3h1kVMGU8lwrN7d5yNVirs9P6y7dI-7cVO1nmUWiPaSdaQwiU7E46fskLFcJxuKy_dV09rB1-9lCKe96arL56PLYan4nLSioFZTx0B9KKuXPP8z6g_w21zbTMtL11y_cg9ya6GxQMWQMVxY6jW3kNu19fkj_dJWz3CfUf6o=&c=0Cp1QGCYe-xlFQPYfU1up_0QtHH090EQQCo7c8qxlFL4KOTLR-GcwA==&ch=AoNcyVkV15Hu58zrUclOnK1L4pADG8bAHsYXMGdgQwpWTslpYsMFnw==), former State Representative and Trump endorsed candidate Vernon Jones emerged as the clear frontrunner in the open race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. According to the poll, Jones leads the eight candidate field with 20% of the vote and a four point lead over his nearest competitor.

clean_body: Georgia's 10th Congressional District | | | | | | | | | Vernon Jones for Congress \- April 18th, 2022 - | | | ---|--- | On the Campaign Trail This past week I had a blast traveling around Georgia's 10th Congressional District and meeting so many America First Patriots! I had the honor of speaking to wonderful crowds at the Butts County and Oglethorpe County GOP meetings. Last Wednesday, I participated in a candidate forum hosted by the University of Georgia College Republicans. It was great speaking to the generation that is the future of this country. I am so excited for these Young Patriots to be part of the Red Wave in this year's upcoming elections! == | | | ---|--- | Vernon Jones Takes the Lead ==, former State Representative and Trump endorsed candidate Vernon Jones emerged as the clear frontrunner in the open race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. According to the poll, Jones leads the eight candidate field with 20% of the vote and a four point lead over his nearest competitor. | | | ---|--- | Get your sign today! Want to show your support for our Trump-endorsed grassroots campaign? == to receive a Vernon Jones for Congress yard sign! subject: humbly asking

body:

| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265302/340843382/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)

**_[I’m running for Congress to defeat radical Republican Congressman Steve Chabot and FLIP Ohio’s First Congressional District for Democrats. We need 451 gifts before our critical Midnight Deadline in 11 hours to successfully fund my campaign and prove we have what it takes to compete. It would mean so much to me if you would be one of my very first donors. Can I count on your $15? It would mean so much to me to have your support. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265303/340843383/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)_**

Every time I talk to voters here, I’m reminded of why I decided to run for Congress.

Growing up, my mom worked as a special education teacher where she fought to make sure each student had a chance to succeed.

**[She instilled in me the value of public service and inspired me to fight for those who often struggle the most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265304/340843384/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)**

I became a public school teacher and continued my mother’s legacy.

I would later go on to lead a non-profit dedicated to helping children succeed.

There I helped pass the Preschool Promise, which provides two years of quality universal preschool for Cincinnati's three & four year olds, making us one of the first cities in the country to do so.

I believe all children deserve access to quality education and the right opportunities to thrive.

**[Now, I’m running for Congress to fight for even more families and children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265305/340843385/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)**

**_[For far too long, I’ve watched my opponent, Congressman Chabot, use his position to benefit large donors instead of our families. I’m running to bring change to the people of this district that he’s left behind. But I need 451 supporters to rush $15 before our critical Midnight Deadline in 11 hours to build momentum for my campaign. Can I count on your $15? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265307/340843388/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)_**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265308/340843391/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)

_Greg announcing his campaign for Congress_
I’m not under any illusions about how tough this race is going to be.

I’m up against Chabot -- quickly becoming one of the most radical Republicans in Congress.

**[But we’ve done hard things before.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265309/340843392/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)**

I fought to keep thousands of children and families in their homes by passing comprehensive eviction prevention reform on Cincinnati City Council.

I fought to expand access to Medicaid as the Chair of Ohio’s Anti-Poverty Task Force.

I fought to improve infrastructure starting with Cincinnati's crumbling Western Hills Viaduct that serves as critical transit for 40,000 people every day.

And we’re not done yet.

**[I promise you this, I will fight for you every single day in Congress -- but right now, I need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265310/340843393/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)**

**_[The truth is -- my Republican opponent Congressman Chabot is becoming one of the most radical members of Congress. He is only looking out for himself and special interests -- and frankly, has stopped serving the people of this district. I know we can flip this seat, but I can’t do it without your support. So I’m humbly asking you to rush $15 before our Midnight Deadline in 11 hours to make sure my campaign has unbeatable momentum. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to see your name as one of my very first donors. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265312/340843394/1092196856?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_greg_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)_**

Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind.

Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district.

But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265319/340843402/1092196856?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=)** We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help.

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please [_let us know here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44265320/340843403/1693227343?source=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDQ4N2QyYy0zZGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-UvVaIUrGlFgGAD10OQ3lQwRDxpEIZGkveHh9cArSU=&emci=5b9b4d4b-39bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=10487d2c-3dbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind. Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district. But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? = We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe , and we'll make sure to process your request. __ Landsman for Congress PO Box 413 Cincinnati, OH 45201 United States | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress

name: Coach Lou Holtz
subject: Will you honor them this May?
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
| | Peter, You know me best as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. But before I led six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military, like my father before me. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. Yet too often, we take America's blessings for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice of our fallen heroes -- men and women in the military who fought and died for our freedom. **This year, my friends at the American Veterans Center are again hosting the National Memorial Day Parade...the LARGEST Memorial Day event in America, with more than 5,000 veterans and service members marching in Washington, D.C.** [_**Will you help honor America's fallen heroes at this year's National Memorial Day Parade by sending a tax-deductible donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
If you've ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is America's most spectacular and beloved Memorial Day celebration.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
|
---
| | Greeting troops at the 2019 Memorial Day Parade
---
The National Memorial Day Parade brings together more than 5,000 veterans and service members to march in the event. It welcomes more than 200,000 patriotic Americans to the live event on Constitution Avenue in D.C. And it records and broadcasts this special and exciting ceremony for millions more. _But the American Veterans Center can only put on this important event with YOUR help._ [**Please join me in supporting this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today. If you ask me, that's a small price to pay to properly honor those who died defending our country, freedom, and way of life.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
Peter, like many Americans, I grew up in a family of military service. My father served in World War II and fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the other major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones who returned home, while many of his brothers-in-arms did not. Because of my father's sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. But I wouldn't have had the opportunity to do what I love -- coach football for 44 years -- if it weren't for the brave men and women who gave the last full measure of devotion and died for our freedom to do what we love. I know you haven't forgotten these heroes' sacrifice. And neither have my friends at the American Veterans Center, who work every day to protect the legacy of those who served our country. [**That's why I'm asking for your immediate support of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more to make possible this year's National Memorial Day Parade -- the largest Memorial Day event in America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
I wouldn't ask for your help if the American Veterans Center didn't need it. And I wouldn't ask for your support of the National Memorial Day Parade if I didn't think it was so important to our nation's heroes. Your gift today will help the American Veterans Center bring the National Memorial Day Parade back to its full scale for the first time since the pandemic... and it will ensure the American Veterans Center can continue its important year-round work of recording veterans' stories and educating the public and our young people about their service. [**Peter****, I'm counting on you to help the American Veterans Center host this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r) Only you know how much you are able to give, and every dollar you can contribute will make a difference for this important cause. I hope to hear from you today -- **[please make your urgently needed gift now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)** Warmest regards, Coach Lou Holtz
---
| | [**Support the American Veterans Center Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60167453:JfrC1VoN-:m:1:3253819041:D0822BFB5A8B9C716A8189EC7086352A:r)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Team Nikki
subject: It’s about trust, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Often, we’re asked how Nikki’s different from Charlie Crist — why we think that she’s the only Democrat who can deliver the kind of change Floridians want, need, and deserve from our Governor.

And the answer is simple — it’s about trust.

For her entire career, Nikki’s never wavered in her stance on the issues that matter to our communities. She’s never backed down from the fight for women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, an economy that works for ALL Floridians, and so much more.

But we can’t say the same for Charlie. Just last week, he said he’s “ still pro-life” — even while GOP politicians are fighting to take away women’s rights across the country.

So the real question in this primary is this: who do you trust to stand up and fight for what we believe in no matter what?

If you agree that Nikki’s the one candidate we can trust to bring something new to our state, click here to chip in $20 and support our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=418trust]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=418trust] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=418trust] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=418trust] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=418trust] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=418trust] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=418trust]

After decades in Florida politics, Charlie’s still done nothing to prove to us that he can be trusted to stand up for what’s right and fight for our priorities. In fact, he’s done the exact opposite.

Floridians deserve a fighter in the Governor’s office. We deserve a leader who has never and will never back down on the issues that matter to us. And you can trust that Nikki will be that leader. Click here to chip in $20 and help bring something new to Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=418trust]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

subject: Can Oklahoma’s Prolife Victory happen in South Dakota?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haugaard for Governor
body:
I think it can. | | | |
---
| | | It’s another major win for the Prolife movement in America! Piece by piece, brick by brick, the wall protecting the abominable practice of abortion in this country is being torn down.

**South Dakota SHOULD BE NEXT! **

Protecting our unborn has been a TOP PRIORITY for me throughout my time in congress, and I’m proud of many of bills we’ve put forward, especially the ones Kristi Noem killed for “going too far.”

Red-state Americans across this country are coming to the logical conclusion: **murder is murder**. The size of the victim doesn’t matter, and it is up to us to protect them.

As governor, I will approve and sign STRONG Prolife bills that arrive on my desk. South Dakota will be a defender of LIFE, LIBERTY, and THE PURSUIT OF HAPPINESS for all our citizens, young and old.

_**If you share this vision for our state, please click an option below and DONATE to support our Prolife campaign: **_
---
|
---
|
** >>>**[Give $25](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=63fe3d4d07&e=c654cab7e1) to make South Dakota a Prolife Leader!

** >>>**[Give $50](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=43f5c32275&e=c654cab7e1) to stop RINOs from killing good Prolife bills!

** >>>**[Give $100](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=452948840e&e=c654cab7e1) for a governor who will stop the murder of the unborn!

** ** This is the political fight that will define our generation... AND the generation still yet to be born.

Thank you for your gifts,

God Bless,
---
|
\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

| **Let’s Bring Back American Energy Independence!**
Tim Aalders trusts the free market to come up with solutions to America’s energy problems. That's why he talks about it in this [new TV ad now on the air](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152148&L=83347&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtZW5lcmd5LXR2LWFkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)!

“Joe Biden and the DC Democrats have made it more difficult for America to produce and sell energy. Rather than clear the way for American energy producers, Biden prefers to ask human rights abusers like Saudi Arabia, Venezuela, and Iran to do for the United States what he will not.” – Tim Aalders

Energy policy should allow free markets to balance supply and demand, ensure reliable and competitively priced energy for the future, and create incentives for responsible stewardship of the nation’s resources and environment.
* Open Up Federal Lands
* We need drilling, fracking, and shale exploration
* End Energy Overregulation
* Open back up pipelines, expand drilling permits, and empower the free market when it comes to solutions.

name: America First Alert
subject: We FAILED
body:
|
---
| | | It's over. It's too late. We failed.

I want to tell you like it is, Peter.

We missed our critical goal. Pelosi has out-raised us for 2 quarters in a row. This was our last chance- and we missed it. We're going to be stuck with the Biden-Pelosi train wreck for AT LEAST another 3 years.

The only chance we have left is tonight. That's it. If we can't step up now to protect Trump's legacy and the GOP, we'll never catch up to the Liberal money machine.
---
| | [PROTECT THE GOP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168449:JeQCyVoNl:m:1:3317145305:51536E9DE38C4ADB2D80ED2112E3EAA2:r)

body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-Y_mwBouLxSdHrYp67W8WL_heTHNZX5ZjuoKH48XoFlz-_2AmLWCrfoYqjqNh2Znb6_V1ftXklqimjAOZFG9Mb3qKngMasjfduQjt8zOCESjDYEIbt44kwCfQRojbzdy-VEjx-XXJ8l_iSHXdU4fhF8mpmji4Viu6W59Rie6zva4_cNxcVsMzR_CYqI9Sn28I-6Fle0SsT8FbE6fyZJVS1Lg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-Y8h3i9cbbK3cmrDf7_o4V7T45vqfZaL9nJ4LgMHyD-hy4QGhYbz2HYy7Tm4hTY0llg9tSbXa6DX0M7TsVckmCFEbZtdUWznvbftymd2L8HEX7Urg-Oxg9SR9W0ntQuAnEUyCSnrFXYPvnXzb3awMo0sqIyI97SrezULCaOdkRnveZyOyxYDI9E-MQPKV83rogquJ8lnq9C4jzBvLLmXKR2g%3D%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-Yvrg9XtfIWEfEiKQ4TnpbVmqJ-xjCm4etWoMD9VWb5oNjxLXvFXgm2SYz6hR_UtLgoPXWIUCcZJGSoqIJh0fXflYGlG7rZ-wTVbeQjtTtWD-CB6AINKqzZCVe7wkV5gttEidCOBGiADqynDtmov4mzW8R33OqOV3hcpWg3eEIvDqj2LLrem233kp5l-pJwip1o5WPXtIy3QfTqzsqVaS82w%3D%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-YNQ5xG-rCEIFMGeaQkgOzfnL3yh7CrJdmm-XqmUxtoBKq8ocgl-ktN5rpuRgMisMBkEty1ZLozRJPjuaCGtyqvD2LLLq9hJ0OO1ZO4r8e9IFcc4grcZuGRxTa0MxAAz0Cr39VgVTuBHqxHS7SB_sdI7l4ViHpaKoLNC0ccPY5e5j-zlUdU1IfXDGPPM7T90msZYBTUXaFRxZFWGuQI-CXfw%3D%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-YUj3L68MMTLHAmfX9Hkc5LQFyg18ahyQqCbkTnqtDi-FqHPwscW26KFIrvZZoiKW1qbZVrjaBm4hP8SKzj4djgpGoOK5f2Yh5sNyM7q-Fx4O7HNJp2RTZVc4LMy6bOIoZv4kOXb7Zs_N3QGbM_eqCDCJQDyfUlYyLyf5RWPsh0baUd5RJQy-VdAEYkiNKTA-sHSwxSDKqUmPJbO45NHYu5w%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-YrgF5p_Ux5Px3gT2XSr-vNvd2ubKmaf1p0L5iB6MY22EZs1PMOdMJP3zbkljyiytMM7D2lOuAwM00cJl01PWRxh1vLq1vWjtCtjOYxpVh-hjRBBAbScSHQoMNmnjYwQKA0cWawebKBHJjDm0KZvuSObK_yC9Co0GVJsov0fvdIjdJ5RNnUzXbQu_JxsEIEeWnEvBstoC3Bz2sXcYKRUosaw%3D%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_e=vUcUdh6_bLb9fBx8iWadk5IA6vGFl4pScPf15NZOylalQ8RZ5Lo-MgGb-0doSPuPxkLJBNRHqvD--etFEBuWFaoGVka0MhnCU8CABaGBqbQUK6KZHqFwIADZ9tkymwhfYxYUpyUFWgl9-Z4-zA6zzT4RMrhOiqiuScKdxmeHYqOT5NX5VU8U13YWJFXKuVZs7U9fHRxLkIPp7u19Tl3QKLncS3DbEWHYdoslAERGL-UYPRQDKBgAH_50uYPaScOY0GUNaqt6H3g8d_GNOtextGkNholocNedzjtV8boU7KO7zx8p-Vt36sGBKdfMg_-YTHR-juZw2iKgC-iDPL_N1UYQucyuZwrN2TLZFtwHiccLDnS3Z9R7Xaxlj_3qafdLUlfs8FLufe5NVYNPYk1UInIjvocbKSpMJZlH06G1IqA7C9nfOF2v7ZC5iWwFNVPopk_Vo9JT-SCPZ4BdRCOlucyPcmtlCdkE9JKSmbVlo0HP5ccrYs7a_uHtuCYKBQewx5KSnVxXDukYUdO9SwEivA%3D%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=fd74f52776634fdf8e60ecd6449379ee&_t=fWYZxrOpr0WotAxijqDxf13I-Gwz_mnHtcqUPZYKX7slAl0eqKERkEu-Gj9dh1bMlBkPVPZ1g2B7tiUS9zcYuJvh_83M-mWcm4CHLnxtZDt8QHn9a4KI_P9SSXAxBfcuRvuC3Wla2L7we9NyszfIrY7BKFHn5-Gkwfm2oWUylxQ%3D)

Delaware, OH 43015

body:
This bill will set the clock back on women's rights...

|

| | I know I asked this week already. But I have to ask again because this can’t wait. I’ve been fighting relentlessly against my colleagues in the Legislature who tried to pass one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the country -- _fundraising has been the LAST thing on my mind._ [**But I just missed my weekly fundraising goal with my primary less than a month away.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44253546/340800446/1129282168?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU2YTg4Ny0yMGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9BGpVZgfzIfhQ8t39RrEja_WAvmWSeC3yBttVdHVslQ=) [**_I’m up by one point against Republican Don Bacon, but he will wipe out my lead with his cash advantage if I don’t pick up the pace. I need to pay for my TV and radio ads, mail to voters, and field staff, who are knocking non-stop on doors across the district. I need 34 more gifts before midnight to fill my budget hole, or I’ll be forced to make some difficult cuts. Whether we can stop Republicans from taking back the House depends on what we do before midnight. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44253547/340800447/1129282168?refcode=20220418_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU2YTg4Ny0yMGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9BGpVZgfzIfhQ8t39RrEja_WAvmWSeC3yBttVdHVslQ=) I was all hands on deck this session at the legislature. While I worked non-stop to secure millions for affordable healthcare and housing -- and to defeat a bill that would have jailed doctors -- Bacon just received a "100% Pro-Life" rating. I’m proud of the work we did -- but now I need your help to close my fundraising gap and win this election. [**_Will you be one of the 34 gifts I need to hit my weekly fundraising goal? If I can’t get there, I’ll be forced to make some tough decisions and won’t reach the voters I need to win. I could really use your help to fund my TV and radio ads, mail pieces, and field program. subject: re: Mitch McConnell

body:
| | | Team -- Everything is on the line this year.

To defend the right to a safe, legal abortion -- no matter what state you live in, how much money you have, or who you are -- **we have to defend _Roe v. Wade._**

[**If you’re committed to protecting reproductive rights, please sign our Democratic petition to defend _Roe_ \-- there's not a moment to lose:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7307?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3829%2E9716520%2EvKs6Ut)

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/7307?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3829%2E9716520%2EvKs6Ut)
---

When he was Senate Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell made filling the Supreme Court with anti-choice justices a top priority. And now, because of McConnell's schemes, **the Supreme Court will soon deliberate about whether to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ entirely.**

Republican-run states like Texas and Oklahoma are already preparing for that moment -- passing dangerously restrictive abortion bans that put bounties on everyday people or even threaten to _imprison_ health care providers.

An overwhelming majority of Americans want to keep abortion legal. That’s why we all need to step up and prove that we support _Roe v. Wade_ and that we’ll do whatever it takes to defend reproductive rights in the United States.

**We’ve got to speak out now and do everything we can to make sure everyone can make their own decisions about pregnancy and parenting.[That’s why I’m personally asking you to add your name to our petition defending _Roe v. Wade_ :](https://go.dscc.org/go/7307?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3829%2E9716520%2EvKs6Ut)**

Thank you,

Patty

Patty Murray
U.S. Senator, Washington

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7307?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3829%2E9716520%2EvKs6Ut)

Senator Patty Murray first got involved in politics after a lawmaker told her she couldn’t make a difference in her community because she was “just a mom in tennis shoes.” Now, as a U.S. Senator from Washington, she fights for her state’s progressive values and for an economy and country that works for every family and community.

**[Join Patty in the fight to defend the Senate and keep our majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands by splitting a $5 donation between her campaign and the DSCC >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20220418-SenPattyMurray-RoeSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3829%2E9716520%2EvKs6Ut)**

Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race:
1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia.
2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race.

The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. **DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE!**

_**It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back.**_

clean_body: We need your immediate support to pick up the pace and win this critical U.S. Senate race. | Fellow American, Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race: 1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia. 2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race. 3. The Republican Senate majority will come down to this Georgia Senate race. Fellow American, unfortunately, the fundraising gap we're seeing in Georgia is happening across the country. The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE! It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back. Our country cannot afford two more years of Senators Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock passing President Biden's agenda through the Senate. It's absolutely critical that Republicans flip the Senate and get America back on the right track. If we're going to pick up our fundraising pace and increase our lead in the Georgia polls, We cannot afford to fall any further behind - everything is on the line. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

I've always been guided by these core principles: _faith in God and country_ , _a strong united family_ , and _service before self_.
And that’s what American leadership is lacking these days--we have a lot of people in government who either talk a good game about helping the American people or are the career politicians who are getting things done.
But real leaders can do both.
Leadership is more than just listening to people’s concerns, it’s sacrificing your own needs behind someone else's and not accepting failure as an option.
We need a leader who can restore faith in the American system, be a champion for American families, and serve and fulfill the interests of the American public.
[**I know I can be that leader for Michigan and beyondーI’m asking for your trust and support to help me get there >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76d1c7d6577544be937f0782fa9a6ce9&_e=B0WfEtCOllsq7hJOQnFODsPwAJ2hov3ea5KPHa9XmhKym9X4mjgwe1k3P4s8rWcPeekophJlc8sITwoPAiVrrqxADFXDs41cYesSi6v1kVPsJf3DYKRqlp6BzZp7PzbLg0DssYuAWLpnKWDx8-NDzjjajEBoFWSSeFgbga3EO8k4FzOU02MaHwDTFggJjCw_q2v8ycoophuJs7jdD20aCaM_aE_ZnKi28pLYor5iQ4tI-voBbuySPuYkdOsO3Al398Ckk_0kMtXWUfxz8YOttyreVyCazc4TAuKEUky0fgjRAWV7_jChdkq_lyCCAewh-gqs6zPZYqJq2ZmuEWIbcgMCZCqjEW6rRNZI9AhVbdkTT-tyEqCyG5iAk6uGHxsHofRHDmVEy60IKhmAUiLKavNfHBThCJp7M1iXXwxSyZm05qlO3lZtyCCOvaOoPD9mbwuU44Y1_xOVMujdBWL7YRAvPuvAMp3kA_5-oEL9sed1g3EYzMvB6bWX1ptcBYiI)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/ysonZ8gj_SZKzNvamu8DtZkJs99tr-0YUAzsSUktXgQ=)
At the end of March, I voted to pass the _Affordable Insulin Now Act_.
**This issue is personal for me.** I still remember the struggle my parents faced trying to keep our family afloat while paying to treat my sister's life-threatening illness.
The _Affordable Insulin Now Act_ would cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month -- which would be a life-saver for 600,000+ Arizonans living with diabetes.
[**This is a great start, but I won 't be satisfied until we've passed legislation that lowers _all_ prescription drug costs. Will you help me keep up this fight by chipping in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/ykSR3rEisq8uAqzkNs0iBJETTt0b5LrSF_nnXBTfD6I=?refcode=X_041822_DrugCosts)
We can do this!
- _Greg_
[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/ykSR3rEisq8uAqzkNs0iBJETTt0b5LrSF_nnXBTfD6I=?refcode=X_041822_DrugCosts)

* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/4Z90JQs76-8tMKwtAqC88Fr9MqB--U0tlyJek6DFaG4=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/72XpHfZO-dNlgTK6KQ7dCMSof5aHFmN-lI8B04tWO-Q=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/6YMciHvdJ1qVAVRo3ejCcNoWajFJXUAKEpUQlYof898=)
---|---|---
A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out. You can learn more about his work at [StantonForArizona.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSjCLmGv6GssDQAgeeEk5PvYSJxkcyze82pAp9jWmwU=/ysonZ8gj_SZKzNvamu8DtZkJs99tr-0YUAzsSUktXgQ=). **In 2022, Greg is running in one of the toughest races in the country. ---
Friend, The woke Left says that if you look like me, America isn’t for you. That’s a lie. **America isn’t the land of systemic racism, it’s the home of systemic __opportunity.__**
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1uhuc51r5n39b79m5mjjsm907b78nm5a8oqqra8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn1dt2s4r6q0mluc27lcnoti04uacnm0tsrto870_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
In order to make America great again, we need to get back to what made Americagreat to begin with – the 3 Cs: Christianity, the Constitution, and Capitalism. Friend, even though the woke Left believes people like me don’t exist, I’m VERY real... and I’m running for the U.S. Senate. That’s why I’m their WORST nightmare.
---
[**STAND WITH T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6s0rvvshvr6scacoosbskmqhnvsqiaogtfucu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
Let me tell you a little bit about myself. **My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in the power of capitalism and going ALL IN for America.** I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the state House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb3bk74njj2ef8o1j2kfcrubet89acnbjq38va6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**JOIN T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6eojorue22fdpts6nd0h39ifjb6ihf152qdec0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpl89appthu3lur1sdop94eeejfm4iju60cc02o8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of. **What makes my story so remarkable, Friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is _impossible, yet here I am!_**
---
[**SEND A PROVEN LEADER TO DC >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z72d8eqa571o8pdla65sfgemu9i1rh7g0036pq98_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
**I’m tired of the woke Left trying to cancel Americans like me who are Christians, conservatives, and capitalists. In order to win, as conservatives, we have to go on the offensive. **[**Can I count on you to chip in to my campaign?**** **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdit1eob9jmcitf92adq9s9dlifklrl32mbnn3n0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs) ** **[**Join the movement today!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo7mo1i4mk9aa9clq7ra3m12dmtvup8f80k0il68_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5aaspf27s1nemku1j37bp3tv9vectghlrfc8jdo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlv6fqekj31uaqt1kq9uuagimr4kpppk3shc16i8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z74c1gahrpih1kf1vd7337gehup2q53065sq0qj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)

[**DONATE $25 >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklor1sbuofqdo2dbbljhj1fg3c4a00pchkhpts8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3kgeihjjkpnqpar6sgiqeu53qvmoqnlbrupar10_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpg66or4cdh2bs)

Thank you for going All In for America,

name: Erica Smith
subject: Taking a moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
As Primary Election Day approaches I wanted to take a moment to reflect on why I’m running.
#
Hi,
We’re officially less than a month away from Primary Election Day and I’m having all the feels. I’m nervous, excited, and mostly extremely _proud_ of how far a dirt-road Democrat like me has come thanks to my community.
I can’t help but take some time to reflect on why I’m here today.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49403?t=1&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)
**My family and my community are exactly why I’m this race.** I can’t sit by and watch the community that has always been here for me be threatened by far-right Republicans with self-serving interests.
**_[We can win this critical, wide-open, swing seat — but I can’t do it without your support. Will you donate $5 or anything you can to send a loud and clear message about the strength of our campaign?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49403?t=2&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)_**
**I’m not your typical candidate for Congress.** I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the family farm. Now it’s 2022, and my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49403?t=3&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)
All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.
We can be that change. I’m running for Congress to fight for my community and return power to the people of eastern North Carolina. **Together we can win a living wage, bold climate action, universal broadband, reproductive justice and so much more.**
If elected, I will fight tirelessly for North Carolinians — and I’d be one of the few Black women to ever represent the state in Congress.
[**Your support is critical to this effort, that’s why I’m asking:**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49403?t=4&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)**_[Will you donate $5, or anything you can, to ensure we aren’t outspent by our corporate-backed opponents? Even just $5 today makes a difference as we prepare for a heated primary race in less than 30 days.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49403?t=5&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)_**
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49409?refcode=em20220418-1104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)**
Thank you for having faith in me!
Onwards,
Erica ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220418-1104-footer&t=25&refcode2=1104_3698_Q6mWis&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1104%2E3698%2EQ6mWis)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

name: Emily Mellits
subject: We’re halfway through April
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend!

Your favorite member of Team Benson Finance is checking-in, again, this time with some good news and a quick ask to help us get through April.

As you know, Jocelyn was recently endorsed for re-election by the Michigan Democratic Party. For me, that signified the real start of this campaign. So I’ve been busy going through the numbers and making sure we have what we need to keep this campaign moving and spreading Jocelyn’s message all across the state through November 8th.

The good news is that Jocelyn’s campaign has the momentum and a fundraising operation to deliver a victory in November.
But there’s an if in the statement, friend. Yes, Jocelyn’s campaign has the fundraising operation needed to deliver a victory in November if we hit our campaign finance goals over the coming months.

So far, every time I’ve asked you to help us hit our goal you’ve stepped right up. However, this month we’re pacing a bit behind and we need to raise $13,400 more before midnight on April 30th to keep up with our fundraising goal.

Will you pitch in today to Jocelyn’s re-election campaign, friend, so we can meet our April goal?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=041822]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Are you still a supporter of mine?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection and I'm asking for your endorsement [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9837%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=uRIPy5saji%2f0KF1jE8A1QQ&sysid=1)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZeDk5Sep%2f%2ffRFVt3BIa75w&sysid=1)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29752%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2v45oz%2fN36kfziJJNa16GA&sysid=1)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29753%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uuhCNGXi7CwPniwLbg94zw&sysid=1)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=smEx0d%2bmThzL8SwelOgMMA&sysid=1)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8WQZoNEkMPe7mOsBhy7%2fzA&sysid=1)**.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29752%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2v45oz%2fN36kfziJJNa16GA&sysid=1)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm - from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=raBapCmU1ntxNROIdicbtg&sysid=1)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9837%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=uRIPy5saji%2f0KF1jE8A1QQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9837%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=uRIPy5saji%2f0KF1jE8A1QQ&sysid=1)

_
Peter,

Are our emails still making it into your inbox?

We’re sending out this email to see how many people on our mailing list receive it and open the content within.

_**Why?**_

Because if reports out this week are to be believed, then you might not have been receiving our communication recently if your're a a gmail user. **Yep - Google and their GMAIL brand are sending Republican fundraising/communication emails to spam** while at the same time allowing nearly all of Democrats’ emails to deliver into inboxes like yours.

What’s more - Google’s political bias is costing campaigns like ours to miss out on major sums of cash that could use to win races like the hotly contested race I’m running in. **Since 2019, GMAIL is said to have cost Republican candidates across the nation nearly $1.5 billion in contributions**.”

Would you do me a favor and**[let us know if you received this email?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=3f21b52fa29140e182af8de2f16dd6c7&_e=Egpext8Q5_8t3nYf-hWDkgPMp1DHvHLS33KAgCTNB5RKZQFxWSEpw_eVizS2SLF5YrMXXd7WpSm3RYwCfFAuyWNy6yyF9OlOoHV54kQN1B3T7GuQ6owlpSmbiMAY9YlWzXYKC7uoitiS8RXiHansaM1q4zm8kmPeYX6ejbqB_iXcrNYB3oAByVca6DblIRnymrTRlnPAMNf2C0PoxdVMUqCa2_50KGlmap8DJUopFuBvDgx806ZZJFQIS0YHi4HsxP9X6XPSxIuauRvQHUNkfnCwSnI73s5R_bPwEuvhszoGFNCbviZsM5kutvkEbhDC09I9FpRQkvBXa5P_JUeR5Zzs-OvIiMDH7ZpTYWwrS6AAvR60UZrTc9WexhF-ngj6zEx-7u83AfByre-bZ7jk0gUe2-ssPLVR1cfc-TBU7sR7NxgN6s7CeuUOp_JU_JzM)**

subject: Mark Brnovich Publishes Groundbreaking Interim Report on the 2020 Election in Maricopa County
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
Investigation Revealed “Serious Vulnerabilities” in the Election System | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/april-newsletter-1?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| First, I’d like to invite you to our campaign open house! I hope you can join us on April 23.
---
| [ ](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=2ea2cd6e3c&e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=0b395d7c76&e=6dcd2506d1 "RSVP HERE")
---
|
---
| ,
Earlier this month, my office published a much-anticipated interim report on the 2020 election in Maricopa County, **and what our investigation revealed should concern every Arizonan.**

**Our concerns about early ballots in 2020 were on the mark.** Our report discovered that nearly 20% of early ballots - between 100,000-200,000 - were transported outside the chain of custody.

Further, on November 4, 2020, election workers had an average of 4.6 seconds to verify over 200,000 early ballot signatures. And lastly, ballot boxes were unmonitored and private grant money was being used to finance elections.

One thing is clear: there are **problematic, system-wide issues** relating to ballot handling and verification that need to be addressed. **Our system** , as it currently stands, **is** **insufficient to guard against abuse and is vulnerable to error, fraud, and oversight.**

**I’ve been fighting for Arizona’s election integrity for years.** I defended Arizona’s common-sense election laws against ballot harvesting before the Supreme Court — and won. When the former Maricopa County Recorder tried sending out hundreds of thousands of unrequested early ballots, I stopped him. I fought to clear the way for the Arizona Senate to conduct their election audit, and my investigation into the 2020 election has been the most thorough that any AG office has ever accomplished.

**While other people talk, I act.** No one has done more for election integrity than our office, and you don’t have to take my word for it, [my record speaks for itself](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=30d6e72eec&e=6dcd2506d1). I’m taking the insight I’ve had fighting on the ground for election integrity to the U.S. Senate, and I’m making sure the federal government keeps their hands off our elections.

I’m fighting for election integrity because it’s ultimately the states’ right and responsibility to conduct elections, and the health of our exceptional Republic depends on our fight to stop Washington from taking over our elections.

Mark Kelly is trying to scare us into handing over our elections to Washington and federalizing the process. When I’m Arizona’s senator, you can count on me to continue fighting against Washington’s power-grab attempts and fight for secure and honest elections.

For Arizona,
---
|
---
| Mark Brnovich
