name: Marcus Flowers
subject: BREAKING: My opponent Marjorie Taylor Greene calls joining the military is “throwing your life away”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUmd13EcrkW-ZjYh0ZlEXq60QzQTMKAJX9PfyRlI5AfrU&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=1)
_**Marjorie Taylor Greene Says Joining Military is 'Throwing Your Life Away'**_ Hi, it's Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. My opponent, Marjorie Taylor Greene, just said that joining the military is "throwing your life away." **Really? I proudly served this country overseas on multiple continents --****_protecting the democracy and freedoms that you and your radical-right cronies are trying to destroy from within!_** It’s mind-boggling that someone who calls herself a “patriot” can be so brazenly disrespectful to the over 600,000 veterans across Georgia (including me) who know what it means to put service above self. **You have my word: When I defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and am elected to Congress I will ALWAYS have the backs of our brave men and women in uniform.** [**Will you support my campaign to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene with a Democratic veteran who will stand up for our democracy by DONATING today? Every little bit helps.**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUmd13EcrkW-ZjYh0ZlEXq60QzQTMKAJX9PfyRlI5AfrU&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=2)[****](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxURZihuI65DzQCtFxyiNxs_ZGpy4xBmiR7upFlBZUqCDA&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=3)[****](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUpK502-UmyxkF5rgLI3JAnMhqd8Cgm2s3iwDLDPWKpwY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=4) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUmd13EcrkW-ZjYh0ZlEXq60QzQTMKAJX9PfyRlI5AfrU&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=5 "CHIP IN >>") [CHIP IN >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUmd13EcrkW-ZjYh0ZlEXq60QzQTMKAJX9PfyRlI5AfrU&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220418_lifeaway&n=5)

I am sick and tired of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene embarrass our district, our state, and our country. That’s why I threw my hat in the ring to defeat her at the ballot box -- and with your help, we’ll make it happen.
Let's do this,
Marcus Flowers

clean_body: | Marjorie Taylor Greene Says Joining Military is 'Throwing Your Life Away' Hi, it's Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. You have my word: When I defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and am elected to Congress I will ALWAYS have the backs of our brave men and women in uniform. | "CHIP IN >>" I am sick and tired of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene embarrass our district, our state, and our country. name: Mark Kelly
subject: the attacks will be unprecedented
body:
Derek,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220418_CGVA_Kelly] Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances.
Here’s the truth:
In just over a week, we close the books on a critical fundraising deadline.
The pundits and our opponents will all be wondering how much money we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received.
But what we’re trying to do is even more important than that: We’re building the kind of campaign that can take on the entire National Republican establishment and win.
That requires considerable financial resources. And after this deadline hits, we’ll take stock of them and make a lot of important spending decisions — decisions that will decide the fate of this campaign.
So with this deadline fast approaching, I’m asking:
Can you please split a $25 contribution between our campaign and CommonGood before our April deadline comes to a close? I would not ask if it were not so important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220418_CGVA_Kelly]

We are in a great position to win this race. — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Sign our petition on preventing gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It seems every time we turn on the news, there’s been another senseless mass shooting. It’s time to end the epidemic of gun violence in our country.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=261%2E61531%2Ei_ymui)
Hello,
The gun violence epidemic in our country isn’t slowing down.
But Senate Republicans are _still_ blocking the common-sense gun safety reforms that Peter helped pass through the House—from enacting universal background checks to closing the Charleston loophole.
So we need to keep working to defeat the obstructionist Republicans at the ballot box—and we need to keep raising our voices to demand action.
[**If you agree that it’s time for the Senate to step up and pass common-sense gun safety reforms, please add your name right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220418_f_t_guncontrol&t=3&akid=261%2E61531%2Ei_ymui)
For years, Peter has been a leading advocate for gun reform. He cosponsored the Bipartisan Background Checks Act to close gun sale loopholes and require background checks on all commercial gun sales, cosponsored the Assault Weapons Ban Act to prohibit the sale of military-style weapons, and cosponsored the Extreme Risk Protection Order Act, a “red flag” bill, to allow relatives and law enforcement to temporarily remove firearms from an individual in crisis.
On issue after issue, Peter has always been able to reach across the aisle to deliver much-needed results for Vermont. And once elected Vermont’s next senator, he will continue working to cut through the partisan gridlock and deliver common-sense gun safety reforms.
[**Preventable gun tragedies continue to tear families apart, and it’s clear Washington Republicans aren’t acting with urgency to pass the critical legislation that we need. So we have to keep up the pressure.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-pass-gun-laws/?source=em_20220418_f_t_guncontrol&t=4&akid=261%2E61531%2Ei_ymui)
We have lost too many Vermonters—and too many Americans—to gun violence. Add your name if you’re with Peter in the fight for common-sense gun reform. Let’s inspire his Senate colleagues to join us.
Thank you,
Welch for Vermont

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220418_f_t_guncontrol&refcode2=261_61531_i_ymui&akid=261%2E61531%2Ei_ymui)
---

---

Richmond, VT 05477

name: Tim Scott
subject: Humbly asking for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

We are just weeks away from our end of month deadline. _**[If every person reading this email chips in just $5, we will blow past our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168890:65VNoVo6N:m:1:3317145305:59032B96C0A4A40BBB59E314796D224A:r "If every person reading this email chips in just $5, we will blow past our goal.")**_
---
| | | [CHIP IN $5](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168891:65VNoVo6N:m:1:3317145305:59032B96C0A4A40BBB59E314796D224A:r "CHIP IN $5")
---
I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

I understand the value of a dollar.

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

Peter, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but _**[it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168890:65VNoVo6N:m:1:3317145305:59032B96C0A4A40BBB59E314796D224A:r "it would mean so
much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.")**_

---
-Tim
---

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168892:65VNoVo6N:m:1:3317145305:59032B96C0A4A40BBB59E314796D224A:r)
---
Peter, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?
---

Thank you for saving America with me today, Peter.

name: Brady Duke
subject: My back's against the wall.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRADY DUKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As bad as it gets

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168447:6LI-oVoUN:m:1:3299561967:8A093F3B431F12031FE7D0B1715C69D1:r)
Patriot,

As you read this, Pelosi is on the march.

Her liberal elite donors and Hollywood pals raked in millions of dollars last month. They will stop at nothing to keep their woke agenda alive & will obliterate anyone who gets in their way.

Look, Pelosi and her D.C. Swamp allies are in an all-out assault to ruin me and every Trump patriot on the map. They are terrified of fighters like me who won't back down from defending our nation.

**They despise folks like you and me who won't comply with their progressive agenda & who put God before the government.** I don't know about you, but I am proud to be part of the silent majority of patriots who just want to live out the American Dream and work hard to provide for their families.

That shouldn't be controversial, but with the woke media and progressives controlling every major institution, this battle has never been tougher. Our kid's futures are on the line. Swift action is required if we're going to put an end to the indoctrination of our kids and the woke agenda.

[**That is why I'm humbly reaching out to you today and asking if you will join me on this mission to take America back? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168447:6LI-oVoUN:m:1:3299561967:8A093F3B431F12031FE7D0B1715C69D1:r)

**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168447:6LI-oVoUN:m:1:3299561967:8A093F3B431F12031FE7D0B1715C69D1:r)**
On SEAL Team One, I was taught to never give up, and I promise I won't give up on fighting for America's future. No matter what Pelosi and her pals throw my way, I am battle-tested and won't back down.

But, as they say, there is no I in team & I need you on my team so we can win this critical race in Central Florida and defeat the socialists in power.

_**Are you with me? **_
**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168447:6LI-oVoUN:m:1:3299561967:8A093F3B431F12031FE7D0B1715C69D1:r)**
_I hope I can count on you & I'm grateful for your time._

God Bless America,

Brady

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168447:6LI-oVoUN:m:1:3299561967:8A093F3B431F12031FE7D0B1715C69D1:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Heimlich?=
subject: Our campaign is firing on all cylinders!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heimlich for Congress**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=d46df58218&e=544bb4cd89)
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
Our pro-democracy campaign to unseat extremist and Putin apologist Warren Davidson is firing on all cylinders!
We had a very successful “Meet Phil” event last night (thanks to all who attended!) in Cincinnati. I explained to my Republican and Democratic friends that keeping politicians like Davidson in office — who have refused to stand firmly against Russia and with Ukraine — makes America look weak and undermines America’s values. The [national](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=eb1276580d&e=544bb4cd89) media is taking note, and [this WLWT profile](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=a159acdabb&e=544bb4cd89) that just came out gives an overview of what sets Davidson and me apart. **Namely, I’ve got a law-and-order resume as a former prosecutor and county commissioner. I stand 100% with Ukraine during this time of war. I oppose blowing up the national debt and support fighting climate change.** Here’s some really big news about Congressional District 8: For the first time, part of it stretches into Hamilton County — actually a large part on the west side. _These are the folks that know me and have never seen Davidson on the ballot_. I’ve really been enjoying reconnecting with voters there! I so appreciate the support you’ve given but we must keep up the momentum. [Please contribute to my campaign](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=4ffa969270&e=544bb4cd89) as soon as you can and connect with me on social media. I look forward to seeing you at the next event! All the best,
---
|
---
| | | | OUTRAGE OF THE WEEK
---
| My opponent now has the dubious distinction of being identified by national media as a member of the “[Pro-Russian-War Crimes-Caucus](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=907752eb1c&e=544bb4cd89)” along with such luminaries as Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar. Davidson voted against NATO and opposed collecting and preserving evidence of Russian war crimes in Ukraine. Let’s not let him turn the GOP into the POP (Party of Putin)! **Davidson. Must. Go.**
---
|
---
| **Do you know that early voting has already started . . . and _the election is just over two weeks away!_** Please chip in whatever you can to my campaign — $5, $10, $100, $1000 — so we can continue to get the word out to voters. **Your donation can help defend our democracy** from Putin apologists like my opponent who risk making our country look weak and vulnerable. Please share information about [my campaign](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=d25934bf68&e=544bb4cd89) and find me on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=074ddb4981&e=544bb4cd89) and [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=ead267ad9d&e=544bb4cd89). Let your friends, family and colleagues know that _I’m a Republican who’ll do whatever it takes to protect our democracy._
---
| [I WANT TO HELP](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=ae33ded5a2&e=544bb4cd89 "I WANT TO HELP")
---
| | STAY UPDATED ON THE LATEST
---
| Follow me on [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=c28f3c1c4f&e=544bb4cd89) and be sure to retweet! Like me on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=7ac84ea59d&e=544bb4cd89) and share, share, share! Subscribe to my [YouTube](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=b6182293c2&e=544bb4cd89) channel to see the latest uploads!
---
|
---

name: STATE ELECTION UPDATE
subject: Are you voting in your primary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
It's an election year, friend, and the stakes are higher than EVER.

With extremist Republicans restricting the right to vote and spreading conspiracy theories like wildfire, it's clear that**if Democrats don't get their act together NOW, we could lose so much more than these elections – we might lose our democracy for GOOD. **
But unlike presidential elections, primaries and midterms often fly under the radar – that shouldn't be the case, because they determine SO MUCH! **With our razor-thin House and Senate majorities on the line, we want to make sure we’re nominating the very best Democratic candidates.**
**[That's why we're reaching out to top Democrats in your area to make sure you've got your i's dotted and t's crossed ahead of this critical election. Please, let us know before our official survey closes at midnight tonight:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44272474/340877203/1503993332?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk793-su-aai&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyZWNiODMyLTViYmYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3wn95Clenf4JfrxJgSEznb05nFIBXk_cx9ntCpplS5U=&emci=41e1b710-29bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=42ecb832-5bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=23124236)**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: BREAKING: A huge victory for freedom
body:
This mandate was pure theater, and this and other mandates never had any basis rooted in science or data.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fef5bd93297d381eb7648df12ce705b4451eedaecb6e957a60c656792959e1b23cc243ca406b379900fd202de4327214760545722cc4f308e1f4e2bd7580c6d1fa38c5c9d87ca294)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=be4bf50b7008312c8830bbd808cfa6cb1c43ae0e03fc4998af02f67df47efa89f9cd2c31f13f86f3a47e2cad7df96ad9bc28cf7e95412db9)
---
Peter,

Today, a federal judge in Florida followed the law and struck down the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's (CDC) unconstitutional, unscientific, and frankly ridiculous transportation mask mandate. Our airline employees and passengers deserve to have this misery end once and for all.

This mandate was pure theater, and this and other mandates never had any basis rooted in science or data. **That 's why Florida sued the CDC over this unlawful federal mask mandate, and today's ruling marks the beginning of the end for Washington's repeated power grabs and federal overreach.** **[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT>>>
RUSH IN $25 >>>
RUSH IN $15 >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=be4bf50b7008312c16a300e83278f96eeab59e637dc8be6fe6492cb0cbf134d4e470bb67bf85e296bb7eb058a223cbe6834f96067fed205b "HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT >>> RUSH IN $25 >>> RUSH IN $15 >>> ")** This was always solely about the Brandon Administration exercising control over us as if he were an emperor who we must obey without question.

The judge's ruling today strikes a blow against Faucism. The Democrats are waiting to re-impose mandates after the election so we need all the victories we can get. **[Can I count on you to help me continue the fight for our freedom? Rush in any amount now >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=be4bf50b7008312cf4e1f21b59ad6323eb98c09e562c0374079edf0a0a81841289aff6e42df49a7022d5011b27e269717ed3096b761dae97 "Can I count on you to help me continue the fight for our freedom? Rush in any amount now >>> ")** As your Governor, I will always stand up against bureaucratic overreach and defend liberty. And let me tell you this... **I 've only just begun to fight.** Sincerely,
---
|
---
Ron DeSantis

name: Kathi Paroska
subject: Join Matt Dolan on his "No Nonsense" Statewide Tour
body:
Sen. Matt Dolan is bringing his "no nonsense" message to a town near you
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019SOR7JVinBpt0RlcJhD4MGVaAUwuj-m9drjLYumJK6dDVuKdhswdY210XQBryi1Fgao0aBDCd5xd5SnEYp_Kn_XV9lmTAZQEYj4AjnDKzL2cOBDoAbHWMbzht6RQkeZK2pnO3LoYjGwRmOoFSS1dow==&c=uV8vHzU0X9eut3vbawTTGgfIrnH3J7VC1VNe_2T3uiuvRE0NBeWL7g==&ch=8DauhfbEWV36mg-Nl_RuujVM4yjoiSXUnMAQYEExnc1Th24LIFWvZg==)

| Peter, The Dolan for Ohio "No Nonsense" Statewide Tour kicks off tomorrow, April 19 through Saturday, April 23 covering 20 cities in 5 days. Joe Biden's failed policies have America bouncing from one crisis to another. While Matt's opponents attack and name call Matt continues to be the only candidate in the Republican Primary offering real solutions. And that's because none of them have a record of results. So...enough of their NONSENSE. Matt Dolan is taking his record of conservative results on the road to cities and small towns across Ohio. Join Matt for "NO NONSENSE" and real solutions that strengthen Ohio and get America back on the right track. Check out the flyer below for a full list of all the stops and you can also [learn more and RSVP here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019SOR7JVinBpt0RlcJhD4MGVaAUwuj-m9drjLYumJK6dDVuKdhswdY723vcknoE8izqQaamLWKIQCbUjBJSULEOs-Xg5Fa472udiKXDdyRTiJyK8sjNoFCy7ze7CKQfUuaqbgsI4GPEJecIl4GBwwvw==&c=uV8vHzU0X9eut3vbawTTGgfIrnH3J7VC1VNe_2T3uiuvRE0NBeWL7g==&ch=8DauhfbEWV36mg-Nl_RuujVM4yjoiSXUnMAQYEExnc1Th24LIFWvZg==) Sincerely, Kathi Paroska Campaign Manager Dolan for Ohio

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Drumroll, please…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Our fundraising numbers for the first quarter of 2022 (and our final full quarter of fundraising before the June 7th primary) are in:

In Q1, we raised over $125,000 with an average donation under $35 ! And our campaign has now received donations from ALL FIFTY STATES.

I’m running for Congress to fight for the people — not for union busters like Amazon, predatory lenders like Wells Fargo, or Big Oil polluters like ExxonMobil (all of whom have bankrolled Donald Payne Jr.’s campaign, by the way).

Together, we’ve built a powerful grassroots movement. We’ve uplifted the voices of people who’ve been silenced and ignored by do-nothing politicians like Donald Payne Jr. And we’re not finished yet.

We have less than two months left before the June 7th primary, and we need to sprint through the finish line. Can you chip in $27 to help us build on this momentum and win a victory for everyone who’s been left behind? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=418q1]

It’s been an honor and a privilege to see supporters like you come together, make your voices heard, and help me build a people-powered movement for progressive change.

Now, let’s keep pushing and keep fighting until we win this race! Click here to chip in $27 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=418q1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=418q1] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=418q1] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=418q1] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=418q1] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=418q1] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=418q1]

We couldn’t have done this without you, Peter. And I hope you’ll continue to stand with me as we enter the final days of this fight.

Thank you for being a part of our progressive movement.

— Imani

name: Gary Black
subject: The biggest tax of all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/2356e0760d483f11c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — It’s Tax Day, and it’s a good reminder of how stark the contrast is between Raphael Warnock and me.**

---
Warnock fully supports a regressive agenda of higher taxes and more government spending. I believe we should keep taxes low and Washington out of the way. It’s what I’ve fought for as Agriculture Commissioner... I have repeatedly taken on the federal government and won. However, this Tax Day, we’re reminded of another tax... the tax of inflation. At 8.5% — the fastest growth in 40 years — inflation is a tax on every single working Georgian. **And it’s the direct result of Biden and Warnock’s policies since they took power. ** If we’re going to get inflation under control, then we need to send trusted conservative experience to the U.S. Senate. As soon as I get there, I’ll fight for three things: a return to pre-pandemic spending levels, an immediate cap on all new federal regulations, and unleashing American energy. **These measures**** _will_****begin to lower costs at the gas station, on your utility bills, and in the grocery store. ** The solutions are obvious. But it’s going to take new leaders to get it done. [**I hope you’ll stand with us in this effort now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/079e5a0c273f360bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/a2ce36a1fe7a87e2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/4a1d5e34fd5841c7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/3f4133f0c802ee23c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $25.6 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5bdc4a7276a20da3/552e4fa5da5cc33ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5bdc4a7276a20da3&d=e3da2d48ae12beafc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5bdc4a7276a20da3).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604

PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: Melanie D'Arrigo
subject: The average billionaire pays a lower tax rate than most teachers, firefighters, and food service workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_MD_full_xx_hdr&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-establishment-democrats-have-let-us-down-this-race-isnt-about-them-3&email_referrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889&email_subject=the-average-billionaire-pays-a-lower-tax-rate-than-most-teachers-firefighters-and-food-service-workers&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889)
---
Today is Tax Day, Peter Willis, which means it’s a good day to demand that we finally make the ultra-rich pay their fair share.
The average billionaire in this country has a lower tax rate than most teachers, firefighters, and food workers. Because loopholes in the tax code disproportionately favor corporations and the mega-rich, the richest 400 families in America pay an average of _8.2% in taxes on their wealth_ , compared to 24% for the average single worker making less than $100,000 per year.
That’s preposterous. **There is NOTHING radical about saying that the wealthiest people in this country should pay their fair share just like everyone else.**
**[The only way we make that happen is by electing unbought representatives who will always fight for the working families they represent. Can you chip in today to fuel our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_MD_full_xx_l1&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-establishment-democrats-have-let-us-down-this-race-isnt-about-them-3&email_referrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889&email_subject=the-average-billionaire-pays-a-lower-tax-rate-than-most-teachers-firefighters-and-food-service-workers&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889) **
[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_MD_full_xx_btn&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-establishment-democrats-have-let-us-down-this-race-isnt-about-them-3&email_referrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889&email_subject=the-average-billionaire-pays-a-lower-tax-rate-than-most-teachers-firefighters-and-food-service-workers&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889)
---
It gets even worse: 55 of America’s largest and most profitable corporations, including FedEx, Duke Energy, and Nike, have paid $0 — ZERO dollars — in taxes over the last three years.
When you add in the fact that these corporations made $77 billion at a time when half of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, it’s enough to make your stomach churn.
If we’re going to create a country that provides opportunity and stability to every American, we must close the loopholes in our tax code that perpetuate the systematic inequality holding back working and middle-class families. No one should ever struggle to make ends meet in a country overflowing with such obscene levels of wealth.
Just imagine the benefits we could provide with the additional tax revenue: Accessible, quality healthcare, investments in our unequal education system, a Green New Deal that creates high paying, union jobs, revitalizes the economy, and paves the way for a clean energy future. **So much is possible if we demand fairness — nothing more or less — in our tax code.**
I’m proud to be running a campaign that’s unbought by corporations, lobbyists, or millionaire donors. [**Pitch in today to help our grassroots, people-powered campaign go toe-to-toe with the corporate establishment and deliver for working people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_MD_full_xx_l2&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-establishment-democrats-have-let-us-down-this-race-isnt-about-them-3&email_referrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889&email_subject=the-average-billionaire-pays-a-lower-tax-rate-than-most-teachers-firefighters-and-food-service-workers&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514308___subject_1976889)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: FWD: Our mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you
body:
I wanted to take just a minute to re-up my message from last week to you...
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,
I wanted to take just a minute to re-up my message from last week to you...
Nevada has had enough of politicians who poll-test every word and make sure some consultant in D.C. or even the far-left Governor of California approves of what they do before they take action.
Our state doesn't need more of them - it needs more of YOU.
The reason why momentum is building for our Keep Nevada Safe mission - and why we are currently BEATING Sisolak in key polls - is because people like you have rallied around important causes that you believe in. Our mission - and Nevada as a whole - needs you to stay in this fight.
When you continue to push for school choice, secure elections, and safer streets, our entire state is better off.
So I hope you'll keep up that fight today. Take just a minute to click the link below to continue to fight for what you believe in, and let's stay on the path to Keep Nevada Safe.
Can I Count On You? [https://secure.winred.com/lombardo-for-governor/our-mission-to-keep-nv-safe-needs-you-fwd ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012ed0fmdB5rRsHOTRzC_iI8SGfP9LlOOtlPBhF88rrs-Drqco75m8NjXZFVUyg-iXGiHfBYd0OpHG0BA-NcGIroGBlbIIz0XDJn48ich4oIaOyqoTmagovwItk-nDx3L5WMRcL7GkPh9HkexLKdHhx1fSR_Cb0f83uRgt-3u2JZOTXNhtuOQ_iYPBvMhl1hgS8b5OvH910ObByi8Q0wDflMkfTU85OElXnDwRM_kGIPY=&c=QdsSwERdIsfmawuWjjkoNQvdvXvZqfArXdP_yoG71KMfyeC3qiRG5A==&ch=S37RX-BkYYVbVlS_blBVqSL4J_8WD058tuDJ5PTPhAIPN8___xPAuQ==)
Thank you,
-Sheriff Joe Lombardo
Sent from my iPhone.
---
| \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Sheriff Joe Lombardo Date: Wed, April 13, 2022 at 12:55 PM Subject: Our mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you
---
| Peter,
With new polling showing our Keep Nevada Safe mission neck-and-neck with Steve Sisolak, now is the time to strike while the iron is hot.
A recent survey from Blueprint Polling even shows our campaign LEADING him by 3.2%!
Make no mistake - supporters like YOU are the reason for this. [If we can build on this momentum, it can put us over the top come November.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012ed0fmdB5rRsHOTRzC_iI8SGfP9LlOOtlPBhF88rrs-Drqco75m8NjXZFVUyg-iXGiHfBYd0OpHG0BA-NcGIroGBlbIIz0XDJn48ich4oIaOyqoTmagovwItk-nDx3L5WMRcL7GkPh9HkexLKdHhx1fSR_Cb0f83uRgt-3u2JZOTXNhtuOQ_iYPBvMhl1hgS8b5OvH910ObByi8Q0wDflMkfTU85OElXnDwRM_kGIPY=&c=QdsSwERdIsfmawuWjjkoNQvdvXvZqfArXdP_yoG71KMfyeC3qiRG5A==&ch=S37RX-BkYYVbVlS_blBVqSL4J_8WD058tuDJ5PTPhAIPN8___xPAuQ==)
YOU hold the ticket to no new taxes, more choice for parents, and less crime here in the state of Nevada! Together, I know our conservative mission is going to keep this great state safe.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012ed0fmdB5rRsHOTRzC_iI8SGfP9LlOOtlPBhF88rrs-Drqco75m8NjXZFVUyg-iXGiHfBYd0OpHG0BA-NcGIroGBlbIIz0XDJn48ich4oIaOyqoTmagovwItk-nDx3L5WMRcL7GkPh9HkexLKdHhx1fSR_Cb0f83uRgt-3u2JZOTXNhtuOQ_iYPBvMhl1hgS8b5OvH910ObByi8Q0wDflMkfTU85OElXnDwRM_kGIPY=&c=QdsSwERdIsfmawuWjjkoNQvdvXvZqfArXdP_yoG71KMfyeC3qiRG5A==&ch=S37RX-BkYYVbVlS_blBVqSL4J_8WD058tuDJ5PTPhAIPN8___xPAuQ==)

clean_body: I wanted to take just a minute to re-up my message from last week to you... | | | | | | | | | Peter, I wanted to take just a minute to re-up my message from last week to you... Nevada has had enough of politicians who poll-test every word and make sure some consultant in D.C. or even the far-left Governor of California approves of what they do before they take action. Our state doesn't need more of them - it needs more of YOU. The reason why momentum is building for our Keep Nevada Safe mission - and why we are currently BEATING Sisolak in key polls - is because people like you have rallied around important causes that you believe in. Our mission - and Nevada as a whole - needs you to stay in this fight. When you continue to push for school choice, secure elections, and safer streets, our entire state is better off. So I hope you'll keep up that fight today. Take just a minute to click the link below to continue to fight for what you believe in, and let's stay on the path to Keep Nevada Safe. Can I Count On You? == Thank you, -Sheriff Joe Lombardo Sent from my iPhone. | \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Sheriff Joe Lombardo Date: Wed, April 13, 2022 at 12:55 PM Subject: Our mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you | Peter, With new polling showing our Keep Nevada Safe mission neck-and-neck with Steve Sisolak, now is the time to strike while the iron is hot. A recent survey from Blueprint Polling even shows our campaign LEADING him by 3.2%! Make no mistake - supporters like YOU are the reason for this. == YOU hold the ticket to no new taxes, more choice for parents, and less crime here in the state of Nevada! Together, I know our conservative mission is going to keep this great state safe. | == | When momentum is on our side like this, we have to capitalize. == The mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you today. Can I personally count on your support? Thank you for choosing safety, security, and freedom for our state this year. | | | == | With gratitude, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

name: ICYMI News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7eo0gdf5a527knet49g6ccgmqgksfttrjsfmqvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp36oj3e5ir1ptmedib2p5kser72tb2cdp3ao74m5obappncoq7csdkeqp68d30sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6phgepjmcdb2mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg6cp37c5j62oh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrh5b29r7hd30r073dddtev35entnmb1j8ti229g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eob6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgjvkm131jc10h5cqkr5rkeqmhrg9post69j8o0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eob6c5h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0afqj1of0og5rlb1mqfvfm8jmun5n5kbg40mr5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eob6c5h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ce9u3rliu1ftn86iletktdjq33secppiku8deg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eob6c5h2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Really quick – we've got both good news and bad news.
**We'll start with the bad news:**

Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just reported that they have over **$72.3 million in the bank,** and they're planning to make "major investments" attacking Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.

This is on top of the over **$7.5 million** that extreme GOP groups have already spent against us.
**But here's the good news:**

We've seen this before, and we have a plan. The GOP will continue to throw whatever they can our way because they know flipping this seat is their best shot at taking back the Senate. But as long as we have your support, we can hold this seat and protect our Senate majority.
So here's what we need from you: [**If everyone who reads this chips in right now, we'll have the resources to stand up to McConnell's deep pockets. But not everyone will, so it's all the more important that you do.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44273223/340880785/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk927-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU5MTM2Ny01ZmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PS-QvLod2HmXdXL0Hi7OyfHUQpjUMzEetKn3QJX4eIU=)

Thank you.

name: American Action News
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlf1iklivir01g08923e45jo9h8hqkbgbgckreso_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uep3co746phbedthckqr1pj56iomatbic9hrbc9m61ge8ctl6sob3dtmctjm3dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmspmcc3mctj32cljchjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c1j68pr3cpge49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z124pqlds4drhiibk8msqamqs395slmhnslvq6b8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4k9k8hdahgsum9nsun9o0j2ccj61qj5alrluh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8m45acb0hjdhopm1dqfhsb5gb96mru4rb89o1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lom2erontoikv8oldqrp5ok9m5oti54q6lnb88_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpnackp56dkkfr2spv007il8fc1j7mrl8dr0hsn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcqkq4ur3rp6urepq14nmepcuatrph4nsbu3jav0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpi6eor6c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Peter, Kyrsten Sinema has a new ally on Wall Street. Sinema’s financial disclosure for the first quarter of 2022 shows that JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon and other top JP Morgan executives donated _thousands_ to her re-election campaign. ...after she blocked filibuster reform, making it all but impossible for Democrats to achieve President Biden’s legislative goals.... and after she promised her donors she’ll NEVER raise the corporate tax rate. **Wall Street wants to keep Kyrsten Sinema in the Senate to do their bidding, Peter.** But it doesn’t matter how much of their money she takes — we’re building a grassroots movement powerful enough to outmatch Sinema’s mega-donors. **_[Will you be a part of our movement? Rush a donation today to show Sinema we can keep pace with her campaign cash from Wall Street →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220418?refcode=em20220418&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda&email_referrer=email_1514383&email_subject=meet-sinemas-newest-ally-on-wall-street&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514383)_** **** **[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220418?refcode=em-20220418&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda&email_referrer=email_1514383&email_subject=meet-sinemas-newest-ally-on-wall-street&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514383)** There’s no question why Wall Street fat cats are lining up to fill Sinema’s coffers. It’s a small price to pay if it means corporations won’t have to pay their fair share in taxes. Time and time again, Sinema chooses her corporate donors over the people she was elected to serve — including 65% of U.S. voters who support corporate tax hikes to help fund key pieces of President Biden’s agenda. We can’t let her spend another term in the Senate. But according to her latest FEC report, Sinema has nearly $7 million in the bank. We’re counting on our grassroots movement to come together and ensure she can’t buy re-election. **_[Kyrsten Sinema must be ousted from the Senate. Sinema’s financial disclosure for the first quarter of 2022 shows that JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon and other top JP Morgan executives donated thousands to her re-election campaign. ...after she blocked filibuster reform, making it all but impossible for Democrats to achieve President Biden’s legislative goals.... and after she promised her donors she’ll NEVER raise the corporate tax rate. Wall Street wants to keep Kyrsten Sinema in the Senate to do their bidding, Peter. But it doesn’t matter how much of their money she takes — we’re building a grassroots movement powerful enough to outmatch Sinema’s mega-donors. ** There’s no question why Wall Street fat cats are lining up to fill Sinema’s coffers. It’s a small price to pay if it means corporations won’t have to pay their fair share in taxes. Time and time again, Sinema chooses her corporate donors over the people she was elected to serve — including 65% of U.S. voters who support corporate tax hikes to help fund key pieces of President Biden’s agenda. We can’t let her spend another term in the Senate. But according to her latest FEC report, Sinema has nearly $7 million in the bank. We’re counting on our grassroots movement to come together and ensure she can’t buy re-election. Thank you for your support, The Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=37df95f1a35b43159ff63e61915c76c2&_e=8H1-5F7RR85FXs6CxeD2B2lbbUtTnr73QfLxRtsW-2TpmpklAzZn0g5KS_HPeht-fb8y8l5l4ltF9iR_FUg-m5CBm0tE738a_gvIriUlnd2Xi5XafrP4_TbKQ7HrU7IIQ9Cg5EAwzGKJ-_5jTVJFAwIi6k4brL14dx4kWJSemn-rflVh6qXvnPMRxWUE2kAGR-wxIXoLXGqZi10BvjmiRQFnudgQQpTTNiuJsZuxNMH2Mmbz6ttIWTrulwZMkwOZzS_0OQX4uU78U5mm93wGPr7-aJnZOD9gZx7db2BS3nc%3D) My friend, From the beginning, I made a promise to **make this race about Ohio. ** Ohioans are suffering under the weight of rising prices, rising crime in our neighborhoods, and even drugs coming through our unsecured southern border. Ohioans need solutions to Joe Biden’s reckless policies.
My opponents are focused on fighting with and demeaning each other instead of solving Ohio's toughest problems. **Ohioans know the difference. ** I have spent my career delivering conservative solutions and I will continue to do that as your next U.S. Senator. As State Senator, I kept my promises to reduce the size and scope of government, protect Ohio communities, and delivered record-breaking tax cuts to Ohio families and businesses. [Will you join me and make sure this Senate seat stays in YOUR hands and donate today?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=37df95f1a35b43159ff63e61915c76c2&_e=8H1-5F7RR85FXs6CxeD2B2lbbUtTnr73QfLxRtsW-2TpmpklAzZn0g5KS_HPeht-fb8y8l5l4ltF9iR_FUg-m-nnhXZXEOX9d4LBzYWy72w-yZFOb35dqF8KAG4EhHKK37ntlb8-AXKWznfAStwoDEraLihH7aKCE6MxXTIiidur8FzwzEeHxIttCoGuLOV2R1XOPl5KMVdZ5H20vm6soc6-UcILm1AyCZzPK7VQzIcl7-Fz1g_yInLwu8SqNk1Tl-jPPFqbwsK-yiFKiGt4bgKiPj8pqBUnxnLNi-uuZ5I%3D) **This is your Senate seat. **Because Ohio is what matters. clean_body: Did you see it? My friend, From the beginning, I made a promise to make this race about Ohio. Ohioans are suffering under the weight of rising prices, rising crime in our neighborhoods, and even drugs coming through our unsecured southern border. Ohioans need solutions to Joe Biden’s reckless policies. My opponents are focused on fighting with and demeaning each other instead of solving Ohio's toughest problems. Ohioans know the difference. I have spent my career delivering conservative solutions and I will continue to do that as your next U.S. Senator. As State Senator, I kept my promises to reduce the size and scope of government, protect Ohio communities, and delivered record-breaking tax cuts to Ohio families and businesses. This is your Senate seat. Because Ohio is what matters. Thank you, Matt Dolan Make this about Ohio with an #OhioMatters donation today! Chip in with a grassroots donation now!

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Officially filed for re-election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] I’m excited and honored to announce that I am officially on the ballot for New Jersey’s 5th Congressional District!

Earlier this month, I turned in over 300% of the required number of signatures (more than any of my opponents) and officially filed for my re-election campaign.

I’m so grateful to the dozens of volunteers who showed up to help me collect signatures in over 40 towns and all three counties.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2204?amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2204?amount=20]
We’ve got a tough fight from here to November, but I know that with your support, we will win this election.

I’m so excited to continue speaking with constituents across the district, meeting people in my new Bergen County towns, and fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan progress.

Thank you for all of your support. Help my campaign continue our fight by clicking here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2204?amount=20]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2204?amount=20]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Higher education should be free for everyone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I firmly believe that every young adult in New Mexico deserves equal opportunity
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44266885/340849687/-2081290588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjZjQxMC00MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRcbR0UZcnsgT8a5wtehn1RjdMFokuoBT7ifh4V2d_E=&emci=2a3092dd-0cbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=02ecf410-42bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I firmly believe that every adult in New Mexico deserves an equal opportunity to achieve their dreams.
That's why I was so proud to sign a bill into law that will make **public higher education _completely free_ for all New Mexico students**, allowing adults to open new doors for their future careers.
New Mexico's free higher education program takes a massive step toward expanding opportunities for all New Mexico residents and surrounding tribal nations – investing in the potential of our state's next generation of leaders.
While New Mexico paves the way toward accessible education with our free college program, advocates in other states are calling on their governments to break down financial barriers to higher education as well.
**That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. [If you believe in New Mexico's free higher education program, will you sign my petition and call on states across the country to make college free for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44266886/340849688/901508962?code=jtk1216-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmlg-higher-education-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjZjQxMC00MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRcbR0UZcnsgT8a5wtehn1RjdMFokuoBT7ifh4V2d_E=&emci=2a3092dd-0cbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=02ecf410-42bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44266887/340849689/901508962?code=jtk1216-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmlg-higher-education-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjZjQxMC00MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRcbR0UZcnsgT8a5wtehn1RjdMFokuoBT7ifh4V2d_E=&emci=2a3092dd-0cbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=02ecf410-42bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Together, our progressive movement is working toward a more equitable future, in which every New Mexican who wants a higher education can get one for FREE.

Thank you for your advocacy,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2a3092dd-0cbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/02ecf410-42bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmVjZjQxMC00MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gRcbR0UZcnsgT8a5wtehn1RjdMFokuoBT7ifh4V2d_E=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Alexandra Hunt
subject: Fox News set its dogs on us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220418 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220418]
Hi Peter,
If you’re getting my emails, you probably aren’t regularly checking Fox News.
So you may have missed that, this weekend, Fox News put out a hit piece on the abortion I had at 18 years old and why I made that choice . . . which I have never regretted. If you can help us fight back, let’s send them a clear message: Attacking women who have made the difficult decision to terminate a pregnancy is never acceptable. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220418]
HELP US FIGHT BACK! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly&refcode2=]
https://www.foxnews.com/politics/alexandra-hunt-former-stripper-congress-abortion-decision-pennsylvania [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/alexandra-hunt-former-stripper-congress-abortion-decision-pennsylvania]
Since Fox News started attacking me, our campaign has been inundated with slurs and vicious hits online—calling me a murderer, saying I suffer from mental illness, that I should be in prison, that I should be killed, and that my mother should have aborted me.
Many of you don’t know this, but my parents fought through fertility issues and the death of their oldest son for me to be here today. I am only making decisions on how I want to live my life and navigating the current economic climate of the United States , which disfavors upward economic mobility for young people of my generation born into working and middle America.
But when Fox News targeted me, it also attacked tens of millions of women across the United States—1 out of every 4 of us—and around the world.
I know from personal experience that women do not make the decision to terminate pregnancy lightly. But it’s a decision between us and our doctors—and ultimately ours to make. What right does Fox News have to second-guess us?
Fox News is trying to shame women from speaking out about their experiences. But this woman, and this campaign, will not be intimidated into silence.
Will you help us send a message that you stand with us—that we have the backing and support of the people—by contributing today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220418]
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
Contribute $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=campaignly20220418&refcode2=] Contribute $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=campaignly20220414&refcode2=]
Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=campaignly2-&refcode2=] Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=campaignly&refcode2=]
Contribute $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=campaignly&refcode2=] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?express_lane_other=true&refcode=campaignly&refcode2=]
Or multiply your impact and make your donation monthly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?recurring=1&refcode=campaignly20220418&refcode2=]
With your help, we will show the right-wing attack machine that we won’t be scared or intimidated into silence.
Because we’re not.
Alexandra Hunt
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220418&refcode2=]
FOLLOW US ON
https://www.facebook.com/AlexandraHuntForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/AlexandraHuntForCongress] https://twitter.com/ahunt4congress [https://twitter.com/ahunt4congress] https://www.instagram.com/alexandrahuntforcongress/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/alexandrahuntforcongress/?hl=en] https://www.tiktok.com/@alexandrahuntforcongress?lang=en [https://www.tiktok.com/@alexandrahuntforcongress?lang=en]

Alexandra Hunt for Congress
PO Box 5615
Philadelphia, PA 19129

name: Chris for PA-17
subject: Our right-wing opponents are trying to buy this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022]
Derek,
I have good news and bad news. First the good: the first quarter fundraising numbers were filed with the FEC, and we raised more money than our Democratic primary opponent. Real people all across the district believe in our fight for the common good. And we did so without taking a cent of corporate PAC money. We have outraised our primary opponent throughout this race and have a financial advantage heading into these final critical weeks of the primary.
Now, the bad: our Republican opponents on the radical right are trying to buy this seat. They’ve already dumped almost $600,000 of their own money into this race this quarter.
They don’t believe in a campaign that is fueled by donations from voters because at the end of the day, they care more about protecting some profit line on a corporate balance sheet than families in western Pennsylvania.
PA-17 is listed as a top target district nationally, and we need to keep our grassroots momentum if we are going to beat the self-funding radical right in November. Can you chip in today to help us show them that Western Pennsylvania isn’t for sale? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022&express_lane=true&amount=10]

This grassroots campaign is built on the support of folks like you — who believe that our democracy isn’t for sale, and storming the Capitol isn’t the answer to losing an election. Thank you for being on our team and chipping in today to beat the radical right.
Team Deluzio
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-apr2022?refcode=04182022]

clean_body: | | | | We need to step it up. | Hi Peter! As Harriet’s campaign manager it is my duty to ensure we always have the resources to represent conservatives in Wyoming. So this morning, at our daily team meeting, I was disappointed to hear that we are off of our $22,000 goal by $3,145. Because we are so close, I asked Harriet if we could do something special. For the next hour, all donations will have a 300%-IMPACT After this hour, your 300%-IMPACT will have expired. Thank you, Carly Campaign Manager Hageman For Wyoming | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: A step in the wrong direction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
As governor, Andy is working to build a welcoming, compassionate, future-focused Kentucky. That's why he vetoed several pieces of harmful legislation passed by Republicans in the legislature, including: Peter,

As governor, Andy is working to build a welcoming, compassionate, future-focused Kentucky. That's why he vetoed several pieces of harmful legislation passed by Republicans in the legislature, including:
* An attempt to take critical funding away from our public schools and give it to private, unaccountable, for-profit charters;
* Selfish pay raises for state legislators – including himself;
* A ban on reproductive freedom so extreme that it doesn’t include protections for victims of rape and incest;
* A mean-spirited attack on transgender kids;
* And legislation that would quite literally take food off the table for our poorest kids and seniors.

Andy's vetoes were important to protect our progress, **but last week, the Republican legislative majority voted to override these vetoes.**

Republican legislators are once again proving they are putting partisan politics ahead of what's best for Kentuckians. While Andy is working to do right by _all_ Kentuckians, Republicans are trying to take us backward and do wrong by our most vulnerable neighbors.

Last week's overrides by Republican legislators were a step in the wrong direction for our Commonwealth, but Andy is committed to continue fighting to build a Kentucky where all can live and thrive. **Are you with him?**

**[Chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help Andy make progress for all Kentuckians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44267420/340852622/-1274636763?refcode=em22_220418_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab4g_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220418_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab4g_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM3NWI4Zi00NWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMFbJBa5zXsjHcE-vy7FbCINBBednRXn-zXw8oHihYc=)**

That's why he vetoed several pieces of harmful legislation passed by Republicans in the legislature, including: Peter, As governor, Andy is working to build a welcoming, compassionate, future-focused Kentucky. That's why he vetoed several pieces of harmful legislation passed by Republicans in the legislature, including: An attempt to take critical funding away from our public schools and give it to private, unaccountable, for-profit charters; Selfish pay raises for state legislators – including himself; A ban on reproductive freedom so extreme that it doesn’t include protections for victims of rape and incest; A mean-spirited attack on transgender kids; And legislation that would quite literally take food off the table for our poorest kids and seniors. Andy's vetoes were important to protect our progress, but last week, the Republican legislative majority voted to override these vetoes. Republican legislators are once again proving they are putting partisan politics ahead of what's best for Kentuckians. While Andy is working to do right by all Kentuckians, Republicans are trying to take us backward and do wrong by our most vulnerable neighbors. Last week's overrides by Republican legislators were a step in the wrong direction for our Commonwealth, but Andy is committed to continue fighting to build a Kentucky where all can live and thrive. Are you with him? = Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Brady Duke
subject: My backs against the wall.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRADY DUKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As bad as it gets

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168242:65OnGVoTN:m:1:3253819041:D216C7E823F7CA3463FF6D24BE26FC50:r)
Peter,

As you read this, Pelosi is on the march.

Her liberal elite donors and Hollywood pals raked in millions of dollars last month. They will stop at nothing to keep their woke agenda alive & will obliterate anyone who gets in their way.

Look, Pelosi and her D.C. Swamp allies are in an all-out assault to ruin me and every Trump patriot on the map. They are terrified of fighters like me who won't back down from defending our nation.

**They despise folks like you and me who won't comply with their progressive agenda & who put God before the government.** I don't know about you, but I am proud to be part of the silent majority of patriots who just want to live out the American Dream and work hard to provide for their families.

That shouldn't be controversial, but with the woke media and progressives controlling every major institution, this battle has never been tougher. Our kid's futures are on the line. Swift action is required if we're going to put an end to the indoctrination of our kids and the woke agenda.

[**That is why I'm humbly reaching out to you today and asking if you will join me on this mission to take America back? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168242:65OnGVoTN:m:1:3253819041:D216C7E823F7CA3463FF6D24BE26FC50:r)

**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168242:65OnGVoTN:m:1:3253819041:D216C7E823F7CA3463FF6D24BE26FC50:r)**
On SEAL Team One, I was taught to never give up, and I promise I won't give up on fighting for America's future. No matter what Pelosi and her pals throw my way, I am battle-tested and won't back down.

But, as they say, there is no I in team & I need you on my team so we can win this critical race in Central Florida and defeat the socialists in power.

_**Are you with me? **_
**[**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168242:65OnGVoTN:m:1:3253819041:D216C7E823F7CA3463FF6D24BE26FC50:r)**
_I hope I can count on you & I'm grateful for your time._

God Bless America,

Brady

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60168242:65OnGVoTN:m:1:3253819041:D216C7E823F7CA3463FF6D24BE26FC50:r)

PAID FOR BY BRADY DUKE FOR CONGRESS

| _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274823/340887424/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3Mjc1YS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngdTwSIaKcQLj2tlKT4Q66E1u2zYCJ-ZJu4IS7ghN9o=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a7a60dcd-64bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/f1e7275a-67bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3Mjc1YS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngdTwSIaKcQLj2tlKT4Q66E1u2zYCJ-ZJu4IS7ghN9o=&id=124172018)._ **[Friend, this is a long but important email about the community I serve and why I'm running to unseat GOP leader Kevin McCarthy. I hope you'll take a moment to read it, then chip in $3 to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274824/340887425/-674430938?refcode=em-4.18.22-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWU3Mjc1YS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngdTwSIaKcQLj2tlKT4Q66E1u2zYCJ-ZJu4IS7ghN9o=)**

I've been a public school teacher for 20 years here in the Central Valley.

For many parents, taking their kids to school is a daily reminder of the struggle to make ends meet. Prices have shot up, and basics like housing and food are taking up a bigger share of the budget.

I was encouraged when Democrats passed anti-poverty legislation like the expanded Child Tax Credit. That extra money went a long way for the kiddos I teach. But the Child Tax Credit ended in December -- leaving our kids in need of support at the worst possible time.

Here's the blunt truth:

**Rather than find a way to see the long-term savings and benefit of giving families a hand up, McCarthy would rather blame families for inflation and needing the Child Tax Credit in the first place. It's sickening, and frankly, it's total B.S.**

How some could know our kids are struggling, yet still vote against their interests is beyond me. But that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy is doing by trying to crush the Child Tax Credit.

Our community is ready to oust McCarthy, but winning will take A TON of supporters chipping in small amounts to help us get our message out. So I need to ask:

**[I need a boost from you today, friend. Will you join the 11 supporters from 18326 who already chipped in a contribution this week? clean_body: | We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . = I've been a public school teacher for 20 years here in the Central Valley. For many parents, taking their kids to school is a daily reminder of the struggle to make ends meet. Prices have shot up, and basics like housing and food are taking up a bigger share of the budget. I was encouraged when Democrats passed anti-poverty legislation like the expanded Child Tax Credit. That extra money went a long way for the kiddos I teach. But the Child Tax Credit ended in December -- leaving our kids in need of support at the worst possible time. Here's the blunt truth: Rather than find a way to see the long-term savings and benefit of giving families a hand up, McCarthy would rather blame families for inflation and needing the Child Tax Credit in the first place. It's sickening, and frankly, it's total B.S. How some could know our kids are struggling, yet still vote against their interests is beyond me. But that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy is doing by trying to crush the Child Tax Credit. Our community is ready to oust McCarthy, but winning will take A TON of supporters chipping in small amounts to help us get our message out. subject: re: transportation in Maryland
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274881/340887539/531951871?refcode=fl_em_pt_20220418transportation_am_90do_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFlNjA3ZS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-tDumSZonQ5cZkD6-yrPKb4Y_WRaXTs86pFKk8PabE=)

Friends, Before I became a representative in the Maryland House of Delegates, I was a civil and transportation engineer. I worked in Montgomery County for over 25 years helping improve the safety of the public and alleviate traffic, and creating equitable transportation access to connect people to opportunities. Needless to say, transportation is important to me, and there is no team better equipped to take on this challenge than me and Wes! Maryland has amazing economic, educational, natural, and cultural assets, but our transportation system needs to better connect our citizens to jobs, schools, parks, and other amenities in their communities. Transportation is linked to economic mobility, and as we work to improve our state’s transportation infrastructure, we must ensure that the economic opportunities that come with this investment are available to everyone. That’s why **Wes and I have a plan to build an efficient and equitable transportation system** that unharnesses economic growth in our region, drives billions in new investment, protects our environment and our neighbors, and connects people with employers. **[Read more details about our transportation plan and add your name to support it here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274882/340887540/-1036391054?refcode=fl_em_pt_20220418transportation_am_90do_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFlNjA3ZS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-tDumSZonQ5cZkD6-yrPKb4Y_WRaXTs86pFKk8PabE=&emci=431e607e-67bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=441e607e-67bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274883/340887541/-1036391054?refcode=fl_em_pt_20220418transportation_am_90do_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFlNjA3ZS02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-tDumSZonQ5cZkD6-yrPKb4Y_WRaXTs86pFKk8PabE=&emci=431e607e-67bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=441e607e-67bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)

— Aruna

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. clean_body: Your voice is essential. = Hi Peter, We wanted to take a moment to talk about the cost of prescription drugs. Recently, Liz’s opponent took a vote that disregarded the lives of so many Iowans – she voted against capping the price of insulin at $35. Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. | Ashley Hinson, Liz’s Republican opponent, voted against this life-saving legislation, and she has shown time and time again that she doesn’t care about Iowans. Unlike her opponent, Liz will take action to make life-saving medications affordable. subject: a humble request
