body:
I’m running for governor of Ohio because I believe it’s time for a change.

Team,
I’m running for governor of Ohio because I believe it’s time for a change.
The same corrupt crew has been running the show in our state capital for far too long now. I know that we can take back our state and get it working again all of our families, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
It’s going to take all of us standing together and building a movement that will last.
**[My team just let me know that we need to raise $15,000 in the next few days to stay on track toward our final filing deadline before the primary. So I’m asking: will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275138/340888570/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220418_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGVlMWUyYi02OWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GwhN0stKp1kzH_KlCPu-YebDNI_aplzGYMp3aU8qfY=)**
As the mayor of Dayton, I’ve seen some of Ohio’s biggest challenges up close and personal. From the devastating opioid crisis to the COVID-19 pandemic to a mass shooting in our city, Dayton has been a microcosm of what so many communities are experiencing across the state.
I worked hard to lead Dayton’s response to these issues – and I believe it will take someone with that kind of experience to help Ohio build back even stronger from the biggest crises we’ve ever seen.
It’s time to turn the page in Columbus and elect a governor who will truly work for the people. And I think that we need more leaders like me from the middle class, not another millionaire.
**Team, are you ready to take back Ohio this year? The fight starts right now:**
**[Stand with me now and make a $5 contribution toward our final filing deadline before the upcoming primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275139/340888571/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220418_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGVlMWUyYi02OWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GwhN0stKp1kzH_KlCPu-YebDNI_aplzGYMp3aU8qfY=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275140/340888572/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220418_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGVlMWUyYi02OWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GwhN0stKp1kzH_KlCPu-YebDNI_aplzGYMp3aU8qfY=)****

## The danger of government bureaucrats and corporations making medical decisions for the rest of us cannot be understated.

Too many in Idaho leadership celebrate mass conformity and scorn questions from regular folks as ignorant. But conformity and conscience don't go hand in hand. Forcing others to undergo medical treatments for the "collective good" is wrong, plain and simple. Make no mistake, the aim of the collective good is collective control.
The danger of government bureaucrats and corporations making medical decisions for the rest of us cannot be understated. An individual's power to make their own health decisions must be preserved and promoted. Families should be empowered to make their own medical decisions, and choose the treatment options that best fits their beliefs, values, and needs.
---

## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### April 16 - Jerome & Twin Falls, ID

Our current Governor celebrated the 2+ year anniversary of the state of emergency by announcing that he will neither meet, nor answer to Idahoans (unless they're corporate lobbyists). Folks in Jerome & Twin Falls are DONE with career politicians!
---
| | |
---
|
### April 12 - Canyon County, ID

We are at a crossroads. On the left is central planning, where the experts make decisions for us. On the right is a radical idea called FREEDOM. We had a great turnout with the Canyon Country Republican Women.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success: promises kept.

Too many in Idaho leadership celebrate mass conformity and scorn questions from regular folks as ignorant. But conformity and conscience don't go hand in hand. Forcing others to undergo medical treatments for the "collective good" is wrong, plain and simple. Make no mistake, the aim of the collective good is collective control. The danger of government bureaucrats and corporations making medical decisions for the rest of us cannot be understated. An individual's power to make their own health decisions must be preserved and promoted. Families should be empowered to make their own medical decisions, and choose the treatment options that best fits their beliefs, values, and needs. | == | | | If you want to abolish the income tax, cap property taxes, and implement school choice in Idaho donate RIGHT NOW! | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | April 16 - Jerome & Twin Falls, ID Our current Governor celebrated the 2+ year anniversary of the state of emergency by announcing that he will neither meet, nor answer to Idahoans (unless they're corporate lobbyists). As a proud conservative Hoosier, Jennifer-Ruth has some insight into this hot topic issue.

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/46275c3e4b51/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7108917?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
From announcing strong fundraising numbers and the Congressional Leadership Fund's endorsement to the Ahwatukee Easter Parade and a visit with Sheriff Lamb discussing the border crisis, this was a BIG and BUSY week for Team Tanya.

**We raised almost $400,000 together! Thank you!!**

This week we announced that our campaign raised almost $400,000. We couldn't have done it without your generous support and Tanya is so grateful to have each and every one of you on our team. Our team is just getting started as Tanya continues to build a war chest to keep Incumbent Greg Stanton on notice and flip this seat in November.

**The Congressional Leadership Fund's Trailblazer Fund endorsed Tanya this week.**

The Congressional Leadership Fund's Trailblazer Fund announced their endorsement of Tanya this week. The Congressional Leadership Fund is a super PAC backed by House GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy and all of the House GOP leadership and dedicated to securing a Republican majority in Congress, Tanya is proud to have CLF on her side as we fight for a GOP Majority in the House this year.
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We must act to protect our wildlife (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
From bison to bumblebees. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275454/340890222/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_GET_GEN_PET_AC_20220418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTAxOWM0MS02YmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WG6q_W3J9gqmNn862OvLNjxx3J6-wbUEtvl1X4bmets=&emci=6b273f89-65bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=da019c41-6bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
We’re closer than ever to seeing the bipartisan _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ become law after it passed a Senate committee, folks. Just take a look at what local New Mexico paper _Carlsbad Current-Argus_ had to say: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275455/340890223/880343897?refcode=AU_MTH_GET_GEN_PET_AC_20220418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTAxOWM0MS02YmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WG6q_W3J9gqmNn862OvLNjxx3J6-wbUEtvl1X4bmets=&emci=6b273f89-65bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=da019c41-6bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) We’ve seen a lot of momentum lately behind this bill I’m co-sponsoring alongside Senator Roy Blunt. That’s because folks on both sides of the aisle know the importance of conserving our wildlife for generations to come. The _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ will fund conservation efforts for more than 12,000 species of wildlife and plants — from bison to bumblebees. Enacting this legislation will ensure we treat the symptoms of climate change AND enact key wildlife protections to prevent species from ever being listed as endangered. **But we must act quickly.** [**As the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ heads to the Senate floor, we need to keep up this momentum. Can you add your name right now to show your support for this critical bill?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275456/340890224/880343897?refcode=AU_MTH_GET_GEN_PET_AC_20220418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTAxOWM0MS02YmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WG6q_W3J9gqmNn862OvLNjxx3J6-wbUEtvl1X4bmets=&emci=6b273f89-65bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=da019c41-6bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275457/340890226/880343897?refcode=AU_MTH_GET_GEN_PET_AC_20220418_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTAxOWM0MS02YmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WG6q_W3J9gqmNn862OvLNjxx3J6-wbUEtvl1X4bmets=&emci=6b273f89-65bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=da019c41-6bbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

Thank you for your support on this,
Martin

Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re less than 6 hours away from our important fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44275750/340890903/-42398318?refcode=em20220418pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDNjNWQ2Mi02YmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1GTQjE1377yNSY0bD4-sJiXG6jpqOiHLg1MksOkuV8=)

clean_body: Hello, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now. I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service. In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa. There’s one reason: Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate. Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley. I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. We’re less than 6 hours away from our important fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = No amount you can give is too small. Every dollar counts in hitting our goal and ensuring we have the resources to fight back against all the Super PAC lies. Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Ron Wyden
subject: While billionaires brag, we'll organize.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44268782/340858340/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzcwNzU0ZS00YWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuTltw9TV_jPiZY27brIw5m2fQvS6aC1OY_Y3zRrsmA=&emci=184f3370-d8be-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5c70754e-4abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9818364)
---

| | While millions of families across the country are gearing up to file their taxes before the deadline, America's billionaires are continuing to use every loophole in our flawed tax code to avoid paying theirs. For decades, America's wealthiest have been able to get away without paying the taxes they owe. What's worse, it's all perfectly legal. Republicans have spent decades building up a tax code that rewards the wealthy and well-connected, instead of hard-working families. Enough is enough. It's time for a Billionaires Income Tax. Roads, child care, lower health care costs, and schools. Protections and public safety. Infrastructure, public health, and the social safety net. These are just some of the critical resources our country could invest in by ensuring billionaires pay what they owe. **For years now, Republican leadership has been shouting on Fox News that there's no such thing as a public good, and that their wealthy funders have no responsibility to the country that supports them.** Now, the ultra-wealthy and corporations gleefully avoid paying taxes – Donald Trump even bragged about it – all while enjoying the benefits of living in our society. [**I am hopeful that, as we organize ahead of the 2022 election, we don't forget this fact.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44268783/340858341/-2044921950?refcode=2022-04-18-taxday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5c70754e-4abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzcwNzU0ZS00YWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuTltw9TV_jPiZY27brIw5m2fQvS6aC1OY_Y3zRrsmA=) Let me be clear: billionaires have a duty to pay their fair share, to contribute to the strength of this country if they want to reap the benefits, just like everyone else. **But Mitch McConnell and his buddies have made clear that their biggest priority (maybe their**** _only_****priority) is to give the wealthy and well-connected a free ride, and stick working families with the bill.** We're fighting back. The next step, of course, is getting the word out and electing bold, progressive fighters to Congress. Together, we can build a Congress committed to our communities, to fairness, to an economy that works for everyone. [**Donate today. Let's make it happen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44268784/340858342/-2044921950?refcode=2022-04-18-taxday&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5c70754e-4abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzcwNzU0ZS00YWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuTltw9TV_jPiZY27brIw5m2fQvS6aC1OY_Y3zRrsmA=) clean_body: | | | While millions of families across the country are gearing up to file their taxes before the deadline, America's billionaires are continuing to use every loophole in our flawed tax code to avoid paying theirs. For decades, America's wealthiest have been able to get away without paying the taxes they owe. What's worse, it's all perfectly legal. Republicans have spent decades building up a tax code that rewards the wealthy and well-connected, instead of hard-working families. Enough is enough. It's time for a Billionaires Income Tax. Roads, child care, lower health care costs, and schools. Protections and public safety. Infrastructure, public health, and the social safety net. These are just some of the critical resources our country could invest in by ensuring billionaires pay what they owe. For years now, Republican leadership has been shouting on Fox News that there's no such thing as a public good, and that their wealthy funders have no responsibility to the country that supports them. Now, the ultra-wealthy and corporations gleefully avoid paying taxes – Donald Trump even bragged about it – all while enjoying the benefits of living in our society. = Let me be clear: billionaires have a duty to pay their fair share, to contribute to the strength of this country if they want to reap the benefits, just like everyone else. But Mitch McConnell and his buddies have made clear that their biggest priority (maybe their onlypriority) is to give the wealthy and well-connected a free ride, and stick working families with the bill. We're fighting back. The next step, of course, is getting the word out and electing bold, progressive fighters to Congress. Together, we can build a Congress committed to our communities, to fairness, to an economy that works for everyone. = Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. The Republicans aren’t even trying to hide it anymore: [] The Intercept found that in Texas, the GOP’s new restrictive voting law made it next-to-impossible to run elections in heavily Democratic precincts, while nearby Republican-dominated precincts ran just fine. We’re seeing the consequences of the ‘big lie’ in real-time. The GOP’s plan to suppress Democratic votes is right out in the open, and it’s working. [] With voting rights legislation stalled in DC, the only way to stop and undo these anti-democratic laws is to elect and re-elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the country. [] Democracy itself is on the line. Will you rush $10 right now to help us elect pro-voting Secretaries who will fight to save democracy from the ‘big lie’? >>> [] RUSH $5 >>> [] RUSH $10 >>> [] RUSH $25 >>> [] RUSH $50 >>> [] ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [] DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today! Donate Now []

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20LaPierre?=
subject: EDUCATION REFORM AND SCHOOL CHOICE
body:
EDUCATION REFORM AND SCHOOL CHOICE | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aeece67431b1/happy-new-year-6070705?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** _**EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:**_**·** Parents have a responsibility and a right to safeguard their children’s education**·** Tax dollars should follow the student based on parental school choice options**·** Moral and spiritual principles must undergird foundational elements of education**·** Accountability and education outcomes should drive teacher performance reviews**·** Students should be able to come to school anticipating a safe environment _**FULL COMMENTARY:**_ Our country desperately needs a system of education that brings the basics of morality, common human decency, and a focus on the principles of God’s Word, back to the classroom. For the most part, the classrooms in our public schools have become void of the spiritual nourishment needed to sustain a healthy and vibrant society. We see the atrocities occurring across our country at an alarming rate. Undeniably our educational system plays a role in some of these results. Prayer in public schools and an increased awareness of Christian history, including the Ten Commandments, should all be part of a student’s educational exposure.**1.** **What is the purpose of education?** The primary purpose of education is to train our children in the nurture and admonition of the Lord. Parents have a stewardship responsibility to make sure their children are productive, law abiding, God honoring, and concerned members of society that want to positively influence others and impact the culture.**2.** **What is the role of the Federal government in education?** The Federal government should not have any authoritative or decision-making role in the education system. The Department of Education should be disbanded and the responsibility should be given back to “We the People” at the state level. We must allow parents the ability to craft the educational experience fit for their child’s specific needs through school choice initiatives.**3.** **What is Common Core?** Common Core is nothing more than the Federal Government indoctrinating our children with Secular Humanist values. It is a standardized form of teaching where students march in lockstep with federally mandated propaganda. The things being taught, amount of class time, types of testing, accountability practices, and teacher evaluations are all designed to create human robots that support a statist worldview. The humanists (anti-God faction) want to secularize our country through education and currently have free reign in doing so. A common-sense approach to education that de-institutionalizes and de-standardizes the experience will allow teacher and student the ability to form the sacred bonds of trust, as it once was in our country.**4.** **Why are standardized testing practices harmful?** Standardized test practices are a poor judge of students’ abilities and harmful because teachers start teaching to the requirements of the testing, versus preparing them with real world skill sets. We need to return to classical forms of education where the basic fundamentals of reading, writing and arithmetic are the foundation upon which higher levels of thinking are taught. It is critical in the current era of knowledge that our children are taught to think logically about what they are seeing and are encouraged to test those boundaries with debating skills. This helps challenge and inspire students to think and reason for themselves, compared to the rote memorization approaches in our current school systems.**5.** **Why is school choice important?** School choice is important because it brings the responsibility back to the parents and allows them to design just the right education for the individual needs of their children. This choice helps craft and stimulate a thirst for both education and excellence. Technology has opened a very wide door for school choice to flourish beyond our wildest imaginations. We believe that school choice, inclusive of technology, has created a pathway for everyone to have access to the key learning principles found in the highest quality educational systems.**6.** **How Suppressing Freedom of Religion in Schools is Harmful to Education.** A great problem to our education system and the moral well-being of our children is that schools**** have removed all traces of spirituality in the classroom. We need to allow Biblical**** principles to be taught in the classroom and we need to allow prayer back in our public**** schools. We continue to be the mouthpiece**** for bringing the Released Time programs in our state from the shadows of obscurity to**** mainstream USA. Faith-based training during the public-school day is a tremendous tool**** that is both underfunded and underutilized. The Supreme Court has ruled that the Released**** Time program is constitutional. When conditions of faith are removed from the classroom, you**** are left with worldview teaching that aligns with both the Secular Humanist religion and**** the Democrat Socialist political ideology. The strategic endeavors of both are to control**** all aspects of society with uniform thinking and practice. This is extremely harmful to the developing minds of young children.**7.** **Thoughts on non-ideological content in schools.** Personal bias and ideology**** play a huge role with individual teacher’s methods of educating. We have a**** responsibility to allow students to understand life from a variety of perspectives. Children**** should not be constrained to accept a secular humanist worldview only. What we have**** now is a slanted perspective in education content. There is no way to strip all ideology from the teaching**** environment. Every teacher has a worldview of some type that will influence their**** teaching. What we do know is that we need to “crowd in” the principles of common human**** decency to include a respect for God, country, and family. Pragmatically, the best thing**** that we could do is to have a proper balance. While in the Bible-belt, we certainly have**** pockets of both secular and spiritual worldviews being taught, unfortunately that is not the case in every school district. We must fight to broaden our student’s exposure to**** various ideologies. We must also be careful not to confuse ideology with religious****(Humanistic) intent and undercurrents. School choice helps “smooth away” the**** preconditions of unwanted ideology.**8.** **What can we do to reform education and put a healthy balance back into schools?** First, we need to put prayer back in our public schools. We believe that this is a critical**** piece of any educational legislative initiative. Second, we need to pass legislation**** that allows Christianity to be taught with equal weight and measure in the classrooms.Third, we need to pass legislation holding our public universities accountable for “truth**** filled” identification of course content. I believe that we have one of the largest cases of**** “consumer fraud” going on in the history of the United States of America. We are**** allowing our public university professors the ability to misrepresent the underlying**** educational theme, through improper naming conventions (course titles) and**** misrepresentation in the syllabus. Unfortunately, I have had firsthand experience with**** this type of fraud. Parents and students need to know EXACTLY what they are going to**** be taught.Fourth, we need legislation to decrease the Department of**** Education over a 10-year period and push the educational responsibility back to the**** parents at the state level. “We the People” must be in charge of our children’s education. I would leave nothing at the Federal level except 100 representatives, (2 from each**** state), as an administrative body, with ZERO decision making authority or influence. Their only job would be coordinating, so that the states would have the benefit of being able to learn from one another. In other words,**** no federal authority standardizing educational practices, but a communication channel**** that can share state of the art approaches to education. Finally, it’s time to restore the wisdom of the Ten Commandments to the walls of our educational facilities, at all levels of education. Scripture says that the Word of God shall not return void. With all of the messaging that our children receive, shouldn’t they be allowed to also learn the simple truths of right and wrong?**9.** **How is leadership accountable for these changes?** We need to consult a broad range of parents, students, teachers, professors,**** pastors, Christian educators, businessmen, and other faith-based organizations who**** are connected to the educational space. We need to take a methodical and studied**** approach to how we can de-institutionalize and de-standardize our educational system,**** while looking to energize the parent/student/teacher relationships. These traditional**** relationships were once the backbone to developing the next generation of genuine and diverse leaders.**10.** **What about a State Superintendent of Education?** While the office of the U.S. House from SC has no official decision-making authority in this matter, I would advocate for an appointment. We must hold our Governor accountable for getting results relating to education. Furthermore, those holding the position of Secretary of Education typically**** manage educational standards and standardized tests that support Common Core**** standards at the federal level. We need to go in the opposite direction and hold our local**** school boards accountable for results. We need to put our local school boards in a glass**** house and expect results. However, if the Department of Education and Common Core**** were dismantled and a State Superintendent of Education’s job responsibility was defined (by law) to**** support school choice alternatives and effectiveness, that is another conversation**** entirely.**11.** **Should we increase taxes to provide more funding to local school districts?** No. Taxes are not the answer to the educational dilemma in**** South Carolina. The reform needed in South Carolina is foundational and throwing more**** money at current practices, would deliver the same results. Ramping up school choice to**** a high priority level will produce the results that we**** desire. Florida is a prime example of this. Over the past twenty years, Florida has been focusing on allowing students the freedom to choose which schools they attend. The outcome is that their students have improved drastically, and their high schools currently rank 6th in the nation (according to the U.S. News & World Report), compared to our ranking of 30th. We could learn a few things from our neighbors in the south.**VOTE MIKE LAPIERRE FOR CONGRESS!**
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|

clean_body: EDUCATION REFORM AND SCHOOL CHOICE | | | | TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:· Parents have a responsibility and a right to safeguard their children’s education· Tax dollars should follow the student based on parental school choice options· Moral and spiritual principles must undergird foundational elements of education· Accountability and education outcomes should drive teacher performance reviews· Students should be able to come to school anticipating a safe environment FULL COMMENTARY: Our country desperately needs a system of education that brings the basics of morality, common human decency, and a focus on the principles of God’s Word, back to the classroom. For the most part, the classrooms in our public schools have become void of the spiritual nourishment needed to sustain a healthy and vibrant society. We see the atrocities occurring across our country at an alarming rate. Undeniably our educational system plays a role in some of these results. Prayer in public schools and an increased awareness of Christian history, including the Ten Commandments, should all be part of a student’s educational exposure.1. What is the purpose of education? The primary purpose of education is to train our children in the nurture and admonition of the Lord. Parents have a stewardship responsibility to make sure their children are productive, law abiding, God honoring, and concerned members of society that want to positively influence others and impact the culture.2. What is the role of the Federal government in education? The Federal government should not have any authoritative or decision-making role in the education system. The Department of Education should be disbanded and the responsibility should be given back to “We the People” at the state level. We must allow parents the ability to craft the educational experience fit for their child’s specific needs through school choice initiatives.3. What is Common Core? Common Core is nothing more than the Federal Government indoctrinating our children with Secular Humanist values. It is a standardized form of teaching where students march in lockstep with federally mandated propaganda. The things being taught, amount of class time, types of testing, accountability practices, and teacher evaluations are all designed to create human robots that support a statist worldview. The humanists (anti-God faction) want to secularize our country through education and currently have free reign in doing so. A common-sense approach to education that de-institutionalizes and de-standardizes the experience will allow teacher and student the ability to form the sacred bonds of trust, as it once was in our country.4. Why are standardized testing practices harmful? Standardized test practices are a poor judge of students’ abilities and harmful because teachers start teaching to the requirements of the testing, versus preparing them with real world skill sets. We need to return to classical forms of education where the basic fundamentals of reading, writing and arithmetic are the foundation upon which higher levels of thinking are taught. It is critical in the current era of knowledge that our children are taught to think logically about what they are seeing and are encouraged to test those boundaries with debating skills. This helps challenge and inspire students to think and reason for themselves, compared to the rote memorization approaches in our current school systems.5. Why is school choice important? School choice is important because it brings the responsibility back to the parents and allows them to design just the right education for the individual needs of their children. This choice helps craft and stimulate a thirst for both education and excellence. Technology has opened a very wide door for school choice to flourish beyond our wildest imaginations. We believe that school choice, inclusive of technology, has created a pathway for everyone to have access to the key learning principles found in the highest quality educational systems.6. How Suppressing Freedom of Religion in Schools is Harmful to Education. A great problem to our education system and the moral well-being of our children is that schools** have removed all traces of spirituality in the classroom. We need to allow Biblical principles to be taught in the classroom and we need to allow prayer back in our public schools. We continue to be the mouthpiece for bringing the Released Time programs in our state from the shadows of obscurity to mainstream USA. Faith-based training during the public-school day is a tremendous tool that is both underfunded and underutilized. The Supreme Court has ruled that the Released Time program is constitutional. When conditions of faith are removed from the classroom, you are left with worldview teaching that aligns with both the Secular Humanist religion and the Democrat Socialist political ideology. The strategic endeavors of both are to control all aspects of society with uniform thinking and practice. This is extremely harmful to the developing minds of young children.7. Thoughts on non-ideological content in schools. Personal bias and ideology play a huge role with individual teacher’s methods of educating. We have a responsibility to allow students to understand life from a variety of perspectives. Children should not be constrained to accept a secular humanist worldview only. What we have now is a slanted perspective in education content. There is no way to strip all ideology from the teaching environment. Every teacher has a worldview of some type that will influence their teaching. What we do know is that we need to “crowd in” the principles of common human decency to include a respect for God, country, and family. Pragmatically, the best thing that we could do is to have a proper balance. While in the Bible-belt, we certainly have pockets of both secular and spiritual worldviews being taught, unfortunately that is not the case in every school district. We must fight to broaden our student’s exposure to various ideologies. We must also be careful not to confuse ideology with religious(Humanistic) intent and undercurrents. School choice helps “smooth away” the preconditions of unwanted ideology.8. What can we do to reform education and put a healthy balance back into schools? First, we need to put prayer back in our public schools. We believe that this is a critical piece of any educational legislative initiative. Second, we need to pass legislation that allows Christianity to be taught with equal weight and measure in the classrooms.Third, we need to pass legislation holding our public universities accountable for “truth filled” identification of course content. I believe that we have one of the largest cases of “consumer fraud” going on in the history of the United States of America. We are allowing our public university professors the ability to misrepresent the underlying educational theme, through improper naming conventions (course titles) and misrepresentation in the syllabus. Unfortunately, I have had firsthand experience with this type of fraud. Parents and students need to know EXACTLY what they are going to be taught.Fourth, we need legislation to decrease the Department of Education over a 10-year period and push the educational responsibility back to the parents at the state level. “We the People” must be in charge of our children’s education. I would leave nothing at the Federal level except 100 representatives, (2 from each state), as an administrative body, with ZERO decision making authority or influence. Their only job would be coordinating, so that the states would have the benefit of being able to learn from one another. In other words, no federal authority standardizing educational practices, but a communication channel that can share state of the art approaches to education. Finally, it’s time to restore the wisdom of the Ten Commandments to the walls of our educational facilities, at all levels of education. Scripture says that the Word of God shall not return void. With all of the messaging that our children receive, shouldn’t they be allowed to also learn the simple truths of right and wrong?9. How is leadership accountable for these changes? We need to consult a broad range of parents, students, teachers, professors, pastors, Christian educators, businessmen, and other faith-based organizations who are connected to the educational space. We need to take a methodical and studied approach to how we can de-institutionalize and de-standardize our educational system, while looking to energize the parent/student/teacher relationships. These traditional relationships were once the backbone to developing the next generation of genuine and diverse leaders.10. What about a State Superintendent of Education? While the office of the U.S. House from SC has no official decision-making authority in this matter, I would advocate for an appointment. We must hold our Governor accountable for getting results relating to education. Furthermore, those holding the position of Secretary of Education typically manage educational standards and standardized tests that support Common Core standards at the federal level. We need to go in the opposite direction and hold our local school boards accountable for results. We need to put our local school boards in a glass house and expect results. However, if the Department of Education and Common Core were dismantled and a State Superintendent of Education’s job responsibility was defined (by law) to support school choice alternatives and effectiveness, that is another conversation entirely.11. Should we increase taxes to provide more funding to local school districts? No. Taxes are not the answer to the educational dilemma in South Carolina. The reform needed in South Carolina is foundational and throwing more money at current practices, would deliver the same results. Ramping up school choice to a high priority level will produce the results that we desire. Florida is a prime example of this. Over the past twenty years, Florida has been focusing on allowing students the freedom to choose which schools they attend. The outcome is that their students have improved drastically, and their high schools currently rank 6th in the nation (according to the U.S. News & World Report), compared to our ranking of 30th. We could learn a few things from our neighbors in the south.VOTE MIKE LAPIERRE FOR CONGRESS!** God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA! | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 LaPierre for House. All rights reserved. Thank you for your continued interest in LaPierre for House. we appreciate volunteers, friends, or family members who have opted in at our social media outlets. LaPierre for House1436 Hwy 414Suite 177Travelers Rest, SC 29690 |

name: John Fetterman
subject: Easter at the White House [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You’re probably wondering how I got here.
#
*record scratch*
*freeze frame*
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?refcode=em20220418-5439&t=1&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)
Yep, that’s me. You’re probably wondering how I got here...
**This year our family had the honor of being invited to the annual White House Easter Egg Roll in Washington, DC.**
Gisele said I could go, as long as I put on pants and not my shorts 😂
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?refcode=em20220418-5439&t=2&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)
It was a big, big day for our crew. We’re so grateful for a family adventure we’ll *never* forget.
As it turns out, taking a White House selfie is easy when you have selfie sticks for arms.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?refcode=em20220418-5439&t=3&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)
To be clear, I did *not* wear a bunny suit — or any suit — for this fine occasion. That would have been “Like, totally cringe” according to Gracie.
Speaking of my Gracie pie, check out these cotton candy Peeps she got today!
Fun Fact: Did you know that Peeps are made in Bethlehem, PA? 😋 (Sadly, the White House did not have G’s favorite sponge candy from Romolo’s in Erie.)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?refcode=em20220418-5439&t=4&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)
We have to hit the road now (headed to Somerset County), but I hope you’ve enjoyed these family photos.
Thank you for your endless support of this campaign. Gisele and I just can't thank you enough. Together, I know we can win this primary (just under a month away) + flip this seat in November.
—John
P.S. My family is the reason I can make the following pledge + mean every single word: **If you help send me to the U.S. Senate, I will fight for you + your family just the same way I'd fight for my own. That's what I believe we all deserve from our Senators.**
**[If you're with me, if you’re ready to make this country a better place for our kids and theirs, and if you’re ready to fight hard for what really matters, will you please chip in $5 or even just a couple bucks today? I'd be so deeply grateful for every single ounce of your support.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?refcode=em20220418-5439&t=5&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)**
**[Contribute »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47361?amount=5&refcode=em20220418-5439&t=24&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220418-5439-footer&t=25&refcode2=5439_434096_Vmm4sg&akid=5439%2E434096%2EVmm4sg)**

clean_body: You’re probably wondering how I got here. record scratch freeze frame Yep, that’s me. You’re probably wondering how I got here... This year our family had the honor of being invited to the annual White House Easter Egg Roll in Washington, DC. Gisele said I could go, as long as I put on pants and not my shorts 😂 It was a big, big day for our crew. We’re so grateful for a family adventure we’ll never forget. As it turns out, taking a White House selfie is easy when you have selfie sticks for arms. To be clear, I did not wear a bunny suit — or any suit — for this fine occasion. That would have been “Like, totally cringe” according to Gracie. Speaking of my Gracie pie, check out these cotton candy Peeps she got today! Fun Fact: Did you know that Peeps are made in Bethlehem, PA? 😋 (Sadly, the White House did not have G’s favorite sponge candy from Romolo’s in Erie.) We have to hit the road now (headed to Somerset County), but I hope you’ve enjoyed these family photos. Thank you for your endless support of this campaign. Gisele and I just can't thank you enough. Together, I know we can win this primary (just under a month away) + flip this seat in November. —John P.S. My family is the reason I can make the following pledge + mean every single word: If you help send me to the U.S. Senate, I will fight for you + your family just the same way I'd fight for my own. That's what I believe we all deserve from our Senators. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: What makes our campaign different

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3342%2E3611125%2Ebc_zy5 ][IMG]

Folks, if you wanted to count all the ways I’m different from my
Republican opponents, we’d be here all day.

But let me give you one stat: 97% of donations to my campaign are $100 or
less.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10826?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3342%2E3611125%2Ebc_zy5 ]Donate

Look, I’ve raised more money from individual supporters than all of my
extremist opponents COMBINED—but thanks to billionaire backers and
dark-money super PACs, we’re definitely at a disadvantage.

My GOP opponents are flooding Ohio with millions of dollars trying to buy
this seat, but we’re not going to let that happen—because we’ve got a
grassroots movement behind us powered by people like you.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10826?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3342%2E3611125%2Ebc_zy5 ]We can win this race, folks, and bring positive change to the
Buckeye State—but to do that, I need your help. Can you chip in $25 so we
can counter GOP spending and prevent Ohio from being auctioned off to the
highest bidder?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10826?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3342%2E3611125%2Ebc_zy5 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10826?t=1011&amount=50&akid=3342%2E3611125%2Ebc_zy5 ]Donate $50

Let’s show them that Ohio isn’t for sale.

Thanks,

Tim

2022 White House Easter Egg Roll [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7A463043555645596167524B67346830627A2B4B4B4364533239734768495A3463596B3141394B4A543370746147566942576B5A4A5867726437594E49396B37/editor_images/IMG_5167.jpg]
Friend,
Today, I had the privilege of attending the White House Egg Roll with my family. There, I was reminded that many doubted Democrats could win back the White House in 2020. When President Biden’s team asked me to lead his Texas campaign, I knew I had a moral obligation to help get our country back on track. My team worked tirelessly and we WON on Super Tuesday — helping solidify Biden as the Democratic frontrunner.
My faith has taught me that hope is not static; it is dynamic, and it requires OUR action and service. We don’t passively receive hope; we must work towards hope. It was active hope that got Donald Trump out of office.
Living in a time of great uncertainty and upheaval – a global pandemic, a war against innocent civilians in Ukraine, rising hate crimes, skyrocketing costs – it’s easy to lose hope. Jesus’ resurrection on Easter tells us that we must have hope that the story isn’t over — that chaos and hardship will soon subside, and prosperity will reign.
2022 White House Easter Egg Roll [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5156664E64626E525A4B726F496A5833535645544B32394B697A4A315172614E6E7043532B516A54726C64315A4F677652577344432F4C63746656766B574338/editor_images/easter.png]
While things are not perfect, so much progress has been won since Biden went into office. I am hopeful because Kamala Harris is the first Black Woman Vice President. I am hopeful because Justice Ketanj Brown Jackson is the first Black Woman on the Supreme Court. I am hopeful because Texas is set to receive $27 billion in federal funding to rebuild our crumbling communities. I am hopeful because God has blessed me and our campaign with the resources and momentum needed to win .
As we celebrate Easter, friends, take a moment to reflect on the hope God has given us, and think about how we can serve our neighbors and our communities to spread more hope.
Donate Today [secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask]

name: Dan Rowe, Organizing Director for Team Morgan Harper
subject: Help flip Ohio blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We need your help to contact enough voters to put Morgan over the top on May 3.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220418-963-footer-ak&t=2&akid=963%2E90090%2ECLG6aq)
We’re almost there.
Since this campaign launched in August, Morgan has been working non-stop to make sure every Ohioan knows that they have a real chance to elect someone who will fight for them in the US Senate.
Morgan won’t stop putting in the work to win on May 3, but she can’t do it alone. As we approach election day, for all of this hard work to pay off, we need to contact as many voters as possible to make sure that everyone who supports Morgan has a plan to vote.
That’s where you come in.
**Join our call team to help us make phone calls from home to voters across the state.** We’re going to be making calls to voters every day between now and May 3 to make sure they know everything they need to know about Morgan, how they can vote, and how they can help the campaign in other ways. When you sign up at the link below, you’ll get an email with next steps on how to get involved!
**[Sign up here to join our call team!](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220418-2&t=3&akid=963%2E90090%2ECLG6aq)**
Morgan, our staff, and volunteers like you have put in countless hours to help us get to where we are today. Thank you so much for your support, and I’m looking forward to working with you these next couple of weeks and celebrating with you on election night.
Thanks so much,
Dan
Organizing Director
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
P.S. All of our organizers and volunteers need lit about Morgan, yard signs, and snacks to make our GOTV efforts as effective as they can be. [**_If you can afford it, can you chip in a contribution of $15 to support organizing for the next 15 days until the primary?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32017?t=4&akid=963%2E90090%2ECLG6aq)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220418-963-footer&t=5&refcode2=963_90090_CLG6aq&akid=963%2E90090%2ECLG6aq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=963%2E90090%2ECLG6aq)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Morgan, our staff, and volunteers like you have put in countless hours to help us get to where we are today. Thank you so much for your support, and I’m looking forward to working with you these next couple of weeks and celebrating with you on election night. Thanks so much, Dan Organizing Director Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate P.S. All of our organizers and volunteers need lit about Morgan, yard signs, and snacks to make our GOTV efforts as effective as they can be. | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Josh Harder
subject: the worst day of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f8TLP0XFhMFFH0BY6ZpVhg5iD-qH_tMLOgA8irr0EWQ=/xPflyP3IbNcUifgJoAtYwYeLSLpoU3_8GTDxAToOYQA=?refcode=E15139-20220419-TaxDay-header-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey Peter, Today is Tax Day. (If you haven't filed yours yet you have full permission to stop reading this and go do that). I don't know about you, but with such high prices right now this year my taxes definitely hurt more than usual. And look, I get why we pay taxes - they help us fund programs that are near and dear to my heart like afterschool programs, salaries for firefighters and clean water programs. However, around this time of year, I also get a bit angry. I remember that billionaires like Jeff Bezos get away with paying $0 in taxes while the people boxing up his products are taxed in full. It really boils my blood. Our tax code (and all its loopholes) was built to take care of the wealthy and the Trump tax cuts made it even worse. **I strongly believe we need real tax reform that lowers taxes for our working families and makes billionaires pay their fair share. And if that means a billionaire decides to run millions of ads to try to get me out of office, I 'm prepared to face it. That's why this grassroots team is so important.** [**If you haven 't donated this month, please chip in a grassroots donation today so I can keep speaking up and fighting back!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/f8TLP0XFhMFFH0BY6ZpVhg5iD-qH_tMLOgA8irr0EWQ=/xPflyP3IbNcUifgJoAtYwYeLSLpoU3_8GTDxAToOYQA=?refcode=E15139-20220419-TaxDay-SL-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/f8TLP0XFhMFFH0BY6ZpVhg5iD-qH_tMLOgA8irr0EWQ=/xPflyP3IbNcUifgJoAtYwYeLSLpoU3_8GTDxAToOYQA=?express_lane=true&refcode=E15139-20220419-TaxDay-EL-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

Friend,

Have you seen this? Ron DeSantis has been schmoozing with far-right donors with virtually no connections to Florida for years, and now we can all see why — he’s trying to secure his place as the frontrunner for the Republican presidential nomination with their special interest money.
“The jockeying for 2024 is already very much underway in the GOP. And DeSantis just **bulled** his way to the **front of the line.** ”

_— CNN Politics_
---
**Clearly, he’s getting ready to throw everything but the kitchen sink at us — so we need to be ready to fight back.** [_Will you make a quick contribution to help us restore compassionate leadership to Florida by electing Charlie Crist as our next governor?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276636/340894524/1278717326?&amount=5&refcode=20220418_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmU5ZTk0My03MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvoHfkEse3akVEP9DnzHWCqUs_CtddlJwC-qZ-4owtE=)

Right now is our chance to stop DeSantis before he takes his extreme agenda to the next level. He thinks he can use our state as a stepping stone to the White House, but he isn’t counting on one thing: A strong grassroots campaign made up of folks who believe that Florida should be a place for _all_ Floridians.

Polls show an extremely tight race. Many are within the margin of error, but some have me winning outright. Together we can keep the momentum going and work to make Florida a better place for everyone. But I’m going to need your help along the way.

**I don’t have far-right billionaires, but I’ve got _you_! So please, pitch in any amount today to help us stop Ron DeSantis’ career ambitions right here in Florida this November:**

| | Dear Friends,

April 26th is the last day to make sure your voter registration is up to date. This includes making sure you're a registered Republican so you can have a voice in the most important primary election in recent memory!

If you'd like to double check that you're registered to vote in the May Republican primary, [please follow this link](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=de19dc919c&e=7e91be8cad) or click the button below!

| | | Oregonians are sick and tired of the status quo. _**It's time we elected an outsider with business experience who can restore balance to Salem.**_ Don't miss out on the greatest opportunity we've had in decades to elect a Republican governor -- double check your registration and help us make history!

Sincerely,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:
We need to get to work , Peter! | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2022bte-wrapper-email_LOGO&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159) Peter, some of you may remember Mayor Ed Gainey as our endorsed BTE candidate in the General Election but for those of you who are new, let us introduce you!

Mayor Ed Gainey is Pittsburgh’s first ever Black mayor. He previously represented the 24th State House district, which includes parts of the City’s East End neighborhoods. He beat an entrenched Democratic incumbent mayor in the 2021 Primary election, and in November 2021, he went on to defeat the Republican nominee, Tony Moreno in the General.

We are coming to you today not only to talk about Mayor Gainey’s work in office, but also as a former Barrier To Entry Candidate. Being a BTE endorsed candidate really resonated with Mayor Gainey. Growing up, he saw firsthand the economic hardships his family, friends, and neighbors faced. He was raised by a single mother who couldn’t afford to send him to high school, and college was not even a thought that crossed his mind. Mayor Gainey relied heavily on his community to help build a stable life for himself. With the support of his community and a hell of a lot of hard work, he got through high school and college.

Early on in college he recognized that he had a passion for uplifting working people in communities and cities— cities like Pittsburgh. When working as a State Representative, he found his voice to fight injustice and uplift the communities in Pittsburgh and he knew he had to continue this work. Today, he continues to fulfill that work as Mayor.

Since being in office, he has made it his life's mission to build back a better community that he could be proud to say his children grew up in. Not only for his children, but for as many children and working families as he could reach. Mayor Gainey is fully devoted to making sure the next generation has a safe and opportunistic future ahead of them.

Take a look at some of Mayor Ed Gainey’s latest accomplishments in office:

[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2022bte-wrapper-email_LOGO&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159)

[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2022bte-wrapper-email_LOGO&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159)

[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2022bte-wrapper-email_LOGO&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159)

[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2022bte-wrapper-email_LOGO&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159)

This work is why being a BTE candidate resonated with Mayor Gainey— because he can lift others up through his role as an elected official and as a leader in Democratic politics. Mayor Gainey, along with BTE PAC, is committed to fighting for affordable housing, safety in communities, living wage and benefits, and so much more.

Here at Barrier To Entry PAC, we are laser focused on giving individuals from low income backgrounds resources to run strong campaigns to advocate for opportunity and equality in their communities, and that is exactly why we are thrilled to support Pittsburgh’s new Mayor.

[**Friends, we ask you, can you make a $22 contribution today so leaders like Mayor Ed Gainey can run strong campaigns and WIN in 2022?**

](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/barriertoentrypac?refcode=220418EdGainey_L1&link_id=5&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-remember-shenise-turner-sloss&email_referrer=email_1514039___from_1977159&email_subject=mayor-ed-gainey-update&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514039___from_1977159)

name: Christina Bohannan (D)
subject: personal request for you >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I know how important it is to put working Iowa families first.
| Hi there – my name is Christina Bohannan, and I’m running to flip Iowa’s 1st District from red to blue. Today, I’m reaching out with a personal request:

[**_My far-right opponent is wasting no time to rally her national Republican donors and crush our movement. So before you read on, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and VPP today? »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9776?t=7&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX) | [RUSH $3 TO HELP CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FLIP IOWA BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9776?t=9&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
---
I know how important it is to put working Iowa families first.

I was thrilled to move my family to Iowa more than two decades ago – because I know that Iowa’s values of decency, fairness, and hard work are my values too.

But national Republicans, including my opponent, have thrown working families under the bus time and time again.

During my time in the Statehouse, I’ve prioritized the issues that matter most to working families – _like protecting our kids from COVID-19 and looking out for seniors._

**But I’m counting on your help to get to Washington and create a government that works for the people, not special interests.**

[**_My far-right opponent won’t back down without a fight, so I’m humbly asking: Can you split $3 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project? Together, I know we can give every American a fair shot to get ahead »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9776?t=11&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9782?t=17&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9783?t=18&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9784?t=19&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
I truly appreciate your support,

_\- Christina_
Democrat for Iowa’s 1st District
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1856%2E878179%2EsD4VIX)

| | Dear Peter, Today is the first day of Earth Week! Join in the fun by signing up for one of this week’s events. We’re kicking things off tonight with our Mad Hatter’s Letter to the Editor Tea Party at 6pm. [**You can RSVP for all events here!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44270148/340866130/-630065742?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjOGE4ZjIwLTUyYmYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e_2qHwkXvB6J5AJblCEh3dSpM9FBY4jZ1gjfq01JHmY=&emci=402d4412-f6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ec8a8f20-52bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) Earth Week is the perfect time to get involved–especially with the primary election just a few weeks away. You can make a big difference by helping climate champions get elected! Here’s the schedule: **Monday 4/18 **
* Mad Hatter’s Letter to the Editor Tea Party - 6pm to 7pm on Zoom
_Join us as we spill some political 'tea' over our favorite cup of tea, and draft Letters to the Editor to help elect pro-climate candidates._

**Tuesday 4/19 **
* Virtual Phone Bank for Jackie Leung (HD 19) - 4pm to 7pm on Zoom
* Virtual Phone Bank for Tina Kotek for Oregon Governor - 5:30pm to 8pm on Zoom

**Wednesday 4/20**
* Virtual Phone Bank for RJ Navarro (HD 21) - 5pm to 7pm on Zoom
* Virtual Phone Bank for WLnsvey Campos (SD 18) - 5:30pm to 8pm on Zoom

**Thursday 4/21**
* Virtual Phone Bank for Aaron Woods (SD 13) - 6pm to 9pm on Zoom
* Canvass for Mark Gamba (HD 41) - 5pm to 7:30pm in SE Portland

**Friday 4/22**
* Earth Day Social Media Day of Action
_Use OLCV's toolkit and join us in posting why you're voting for climate champions this May._

**Saturday 4/23**
* Joint Canvass for Jessica Vega Pederson for Multnomah County Chair and Lynn Peterson for Metro President - 11am to 1:30pm in NE Portland
* Canvass for Tina Kotek for Oregon Governor - 2pm to 5:30pm in N. Portland
* Climate House Party for Mark Gamba (HD 41) - 4:30pm to 6:30pm in NE Portland

**Sunday 4/24**
* Canvass for Farrah Chaichi (HD 35) - 11am to 1pm in Beaverton
* Canvass for Catherine Thomasson (HD 45) - 11am to 2pm in NE Portland
* Virtual Phone Bank for Eric Swenson (SD 11) - 5pm to 7:30pm on Zoom

[**Sign up for Earth Week here!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44270149/340866131/1527695943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjOGE4ZjIwLTUyYmYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e_2qHwkXvB6J5AJblCEh3dSpM9FBY4jZ1gjfq01JHmY=&emci=402d4412-f6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ec8a8f20-52bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) We hope to see you there, knocking doors, phone banking, or writing LTE’s with us. Happy Earth Week,
Tia Hatton
Engagement Organizer, OLCV |

|
|

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Our moment for climate action is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276972/340898325/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3Mzg1Yi03NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mGQ_k5IhB6ijgi_9DPiIsY6UHlQsqv73fE5UiOtAiE=&emci=6148e63c-43bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=31d7385b-74bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Arizona and the American West are facing a reckoning.
We are already dealing with an unprecedented water crisis as Lake Powell, a massive reservoir that millions of people rely on for water and power, dipped to a critical point last month.
**Now, federal officials are warning the escalating water crisis could result in cutting off drinking water for as many as 7,500 residents.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276973/340898326/2089498197?refcode=X_041822_WaterIssue&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3Mzg1Yi03NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mGQ_k5IhB6ijgi_9DPiIsY6UHlQsqv73fE5UiOtAiE=)
---
I'm not kidding when I say that here in Arizona, every drop of water is precious.
We must take action to better conserve the water we have, use it more efficiently, and make serious efforts to reduce greenhouse gas emissions responsible for the climate change driving these shortages.
As your Congresswoman, I will do everything I can to encourage smart investments, and find solutions to ensure we have a safe, reliable water supply for the future.
I hope you will support me in my fight.
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276974/340898327/416963966?refcode=X_041822_WaterIssue&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3Mzg1Yi03NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mGQ_k5IhB6ijgi_9DPiIsY6UHlQsqv73fE5UiOtAiE=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276975/340898328/416963966?refcode=X_041822_WaterIssue&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3Mzg1Yi03NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2mGQ_k5IhB6ijgi_9DPiIsY6UHlQsqv73fE5UiOtAiE=)

Friends,

We are at a turning point for the Republican Party and the nation. We know the GOP’s conservative policies are the right ones for our country - which is why Liz still strongly supports those policies - but unfortunately the party has become more about one person who is at war with the rule of law.

Now we must decide - will Republicans continue down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories and radicalism, or return to being **the party of truth and fidelity to the Constitution?**
| [**CHIP IN $15 FOR TRUTH** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2a1896175a754882bb0966708d1db554&_e=llQnyHurkB9UHzIgMxXIQDYpCH6P_XflPJA1jxAxibVculiKrRbuunvklK2VRn5AcaZKFtpex6r8lCqUTA27qrHyfvnDcZlJ_ghCDYCdBz02JCyppV6jMENTrRTdpilbMdsp0nZKN8zqHizD51rrsw961e3g4QOQ1MSY72C4x7x4Jbpwbi_q8uBS46B9Vl1hqPXejlmNyOQVKSgA5NxwSpkrV7rQjcJQlHehAQmj0NpG3OEF1IbV2nQrqsHLZ-tt2BoTuPd-m4mJewaKTHQec86F-siKaOHwIrG2l53SzGsVfWDHNH-Qp6m4Tp5t6zErp_q2SuZVknd0gQsf2EkHc5x-xWxtWlmLjGi7Dn1OYdbJ_e02cK8QjFfN3POF3g3qeqC2N2sSeza8S8ef7vRJhixkZ80ZdYjc2pNV0dRzs2GpqGzFFqz-vu3BylpsAboI0aD5KTvbKhtMvu-Z_YC2PRKrTMaKsSJH4crq33KGUexRxEb0eWW2RE9E5AsNDFKOggR-ajDF24dW6z4wyIh6kvtfKbUlwpDsG_Qv_a2Is4C-Je4aqq4GlikphN6QWv48-bCYb-lDxMTh5uq4EvFzci17AhY8HRdgpIm3AVoQN-0%3D)
---
[**SUPPORT FIDELITY TO THE CONSTITUTION WITH $25** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2a1896175a754882bb0966708d1db554&_e=llQnyHurkB9UHzIgMxXIQDYpCH6P_XflPJA1jxAxibVculiKrRbuunvklK2VRn5AcaZKFtpex6r8lCqUTA27qrHyfvnDcZlJ_ghCDYCdBz02JCyppV6jMENTrRTdpilbMdsp0nZKN8zqHizD51rrsw961e3g4QOQ1MSY72C4x7x4Jbpwbi_q8uBS46B9Vl1hqPXejlmNyOQVKSgA5NxwSpkrV7rQjcJQlHehAQmj0NpG3OEF1IbV2nQrqsHLZ-tt2BoTuPd-m4mJewaKTHQec86F-siKaOHwIrG2l53SzGsVfWDHNH-Qp6m4Tp5t6zErp_q2SuZVknd0gQsf2EkHc5x-xWxtWlmLjGi7Dn1OYda-71Oj5g3cSLk11-xajq37_9d3i-5YOIMxauUjYzr5LdDknFO4sCBRRm3nSM4YVsDyBrgZTeXWoGy8OvPKhWDSvWDQ7ehZ8ekxa7gP0X-YgDKOyFgnej2K3YRpCreZ5lBQ4AmBNmuaprXNHekEhvxCzY0KCwQpb3YJDZuL9xqYR9Wo9dDZP7lYNpvmWv8k_acuxrw84NS1-AYSQOSUP4xY7HTYiiY135iRvWbX4DAEbb-3Wk3C2A97P_k9X2ZQFeU%3D)
---

As we move forward, we must remember that our duty to country comes before any allegiance to a political party. Throughout her tenure in public service, Liz Cheney has demonstrated that. She knows that our Republic cannot endure if elected officials put loyalty to party above loyalty to the Constitution.

Her ethics, experience, and determination continue to serve as a **beacon within the GOP.**
**Will you join Liz in providing leadership for the Republican Party?** **[(Join Liz Cheney HERE)](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=2a1896175a754882bb0966708d1db554&_e=llQnyHurkB9UHzIgMxXIQDYpCH6P_XflPJA1jxAxibVculiKrRbuunvklK2VRn5AcaZKFtpex6r8lCqUTA27qrHyfvnDcZlJ_ghCDYCdBz02JCyppV6jMENTrRTdpilbMdsp0nZKN8zqHizD51rrsw961e3g4QOQ1MSY72C4x7x4Jbpwbi_q8uBS46B9Vl1hqPXejlmNyOQVKSgA5NxwSpkrV7rQjcJQlHehAQmj0NpG3OEF1IbV2nQrqsHLZ-tt2BoTuPd-m4mJewaKTHQec86F-siKaOHwIrG2l53SzGsVfWDHNH-Qp6m4Tp5t6zErp_q2SuZVknd0gQsf2EkHc5x-xWxtWlmLjGi7Dn1OYdZrIalZMMa6OViR-rEShNmJ6EXmGm6TE3Dcg_6VWs_12KWx2JxEDakl9TeJQqrnNzgXg1WtGE25qex3r2adIsBRyOhO8wVeHagsfyn6pthItbcl6iv7hByJZST4ppfM3Tj_07pa_4zQS0vIdfBlx3A1tIcUbmEboA03qPovI1m8xio0m3bPh0IPBJmutlsN8Dxpd6pOuYHWH-4KuBHy30ssqU8JVX5s15jQ281PBns0uh_lNIZ1AdUz3O_GB4JMMWo%3D)**
Today, help put common sense and principled leadership back at the forefront of this party. With your help, we can build the Republican Party on a foundation rooted in conservatism, substance, and honesty.

Sincerely,
Team Cheney
