clean_body: The turning point of the Republican Party | Friends, We are at a turning point for the Republican Party and the nation. We know the GOP’s conservative policies are the right ones for our country - which is why Liz still strongly supports those policies - but unfortunately the party has become more about one person who is at war with the rule of law. Now we must decide - will Republicans continue down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories and radicalism, or return to being the party of truth and fidelity to the Constitution? | As we move forward, we must remember that our duty to country comes before any allegiance to a political party. Throughout her tenure in public service, Liz Cheney has demonstrated that. She knows that our Republic cannot endure if elected officials put loyalty to party above loyalty to the Constitution. Her ethics, experience, and determination continue to serve as a beacon within the GOP. Will you join Liz in providing leadership for the Republican Party? Today, help put common sense and principled leadership back at the forefront of this party. With your help, we can build the Republican Party on a foundation rooted in conservatism, substance, and honesty. Sincerely, Team Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Mask Mandate Struck Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
| [ ](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziook9GM6ZCJmtpUFYCf-NUON&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, I have an important message below, but I wanted to let you know about some breaking news: A federal judge just struck down the airplane mask mandate. The order covering planes, airports, and public transit is _void._ After two years, courts are starting to do their job.
* * *
With ballots going out in three weeks, I’ve got good news and bad news. The good news is we're about to hit the airwaves. I think our 30 second TV ad really captures the heart of our campaign. [You can watch it here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G3QYlRFxTgA_PuBIOmzFLWC&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=2). We are finalizing our ad buy now, and if you use [this link](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=3), your support will directly increase the amount of airtime we get. The bad news: it’s no secret we’re about to face an onslaught of attacks. But I’m a strong believer that the best defense is a good offense. By getting out our positive message, we can drown out the vitriol. This is a vast district, larger than many states. I’m not known to every voter. That’s why it’s so important that [we have the resources to tell our story](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=4) – and not let our opponents tell it for us. If we win this seat in Congress, we can tell our story to all of America: how radical policies are ruining the greatest state in the country, and how we simply can’t let them ruin the greatest country in the world. At this moment, we are in the lead. But our opponents see the June 7 Primary as their best chance to knock us out. That’s why Pelosi and the DCCC have been focusing their fire on us for months. The last thing they want is for us to shake up the U.S. Capitol like we've shaken up the State Capitol. They’re terrified of what a citizen-back representative could do. Let's make sure they soon find out. [Help me drown out the attacks](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=5) With gratitude,
Kevin p.s. Every dollar donated today allows **10 additional voters** to see our TV spot. For example, $100 gets the ad to 1,000 voters. You can make a contribution [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=6).
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr18_final&n=7).

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: BREAKING: our billionaire opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
They’ve already booked hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of television ads
#

**BREAKING NEWS: We’ve got a billionaire opponent, and POLITICO reports that he’s already booked more than $600,000 in television ads this week alone!**
[**Rush a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla today to fight back >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220418-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=740_159979_mJfKeE&akid=740%2E159979%2EmJfKeE)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220418-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=740_159979_mJfKeE&akid=740%2E159979%2EmJfKeE)**
Here's the deal:
Over the weekend, we found out that one of Alex’s opponents — a billionaire defense contractor — has already booked hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of television ads airing this week alone.
And that’s just to start. Before this race is over, it’s not out of the question to think he’d spend millions or even tens of millions of dollars.
We’re doing things a little differently. Alex is not a billionaire, and we fund this campaign one $5 donation at a time. **But that means we need your help in order to keep up with the money surging into this race:**
[**Please make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign today. Now more than ever, it’s important that we have as many people as possible getting involved to keep Alex in the Senate. It’s the ONLY way we’re going to have the resources to compete against our deep-pocketed opposition.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220418-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=740_159979_mJfKeE&akid=740%2E159979%2EmJfKeE)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220418-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=740_159979_mJfKeE&akid=740%2E159979%2EmJfKeE)**
Thank you for standing with Alex, especially today.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=740%2E159979%2EmJfKeE)

subject: GMAIL may be blocking our emails.

body:
Google and GMAIL are censoring conservative emails. But you might not know it. Up to 72% of Republican fundraising emails have been marked as SPAM! We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=80f5e940f0ab419bbebf2c417c4ef74c&_e=NXOXtkiUFIpp6R9nFG_5JYbcjF4RnjLK6dNJfF9D7d4pHCS3q2zUUTc5CgneDLa4HRB_Lfqpppi1IPfKnTTJ4yU7qTuU4Je0fgtyLceEhnX1g9Jlr1VD2_uiuVMH2qBZwzSRIQeH9ALwJEtdfEGlI8Wna6GYkBHkusU5tYkdo7XJ9fQS_ug2pOph5hb95nl3x3FkOno00XIQ4e-2K6Lf-2FsXwVv3nufG3VlDSHrvam6ui7CpieDNLuPu8evoGpNIwaeMu8zYNuynYVvlaA0MtbYq4utYyuJobb4z9SdPztQDJWuTiC5LRvMj2XFTM2u9Alh0aULcRB1B_4yM_i9LpRgvqMPa2zTrau2WXAgrjE29YTMORntRaW21REcp0YrYigLAhRL8F2IOBKaGi3BuhQfSmipmiaTyIcYCRxxoXJ6LC54VswcDwkE6sVu_zhM)

_
_
Peter,

Are our emails still making it into your inbox?

We’re sending out this email to see how many people on our mailing list receive it and open the content within.

_**Why?**_

Because if reports out this week are to be believed, then you might not have been receiving our communication recently if your're a a gmail user. **Yep - Google and their GMAIL brand are sending Republican fundraising/communication emails to spam** while at the same time allowing nearly all of Democrats’ emails to deliver into inboxes like yours.

What’s more - Google’s political bias is costing campaigns like ours to miss out on major sums of cash that could use to win races like the hotly contested race I’m running in. **Since 2019, GMAIL is said to have cost Republican candidates across the nation nearly $1.5 billion in contributions**.”

Would you do me a favor and**[let us know if you received this email?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=80f5e940f0ab419bbebf2c417c4ef74c&_e=NXOXtkiUFIpp6R9nFG_5JYbcjF4RnjLK6dNJfF9D7d4pHCS3q2zUUTc5CgneDLa4HRB_Lfqpppi1IPfKnTTJ4yU7qTuU4Je0fgtyLceEhnX1g9Jlr1VD2_uiuVMH2qBZwzSRIQeH9ALwJEtdfEGlI8Wna6GYkBHkusU5tYkdo7XJ9fQS_ug2pOph5hb95nl3x3FkOno00XIQ4e-2K6Lf-2FsXwVv3nufG3VlDSHrvam_9kocPTyJNDCGB3FeLNjdmMj84JCxGlqGiwdvP0JC_uTWWQ60kqA2NUEs8ehAfsKXh--uYqnsM8NuyC9cs134PyLm1LR5g-Ts51iPp-T8WJM5rBYPz5MhLPVMz1N9YHsZ3Jt1s8K37Q0S9pSRur4C-NSzSXLN0UmvMIcwkoH4rHJCo2yEk1NBFuQWWn1r2WI7leHf5G7rvRF9EoAqKXNi)**

It would really go a long way in helping us to ensure google is treating our campaign’s online communication the same they’re handling our opponent’s.

body:
| | | I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time. | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_LOGO&amount=25.00&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)

---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_P1&amount=25.00&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision)
| Team,

I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can assure you it’s a gift.

And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important to our success.

The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.

We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.

You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. Many of you were a part of that victory.

But now we have a new mission: Re-election.

And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you.

So please:

**[Can you make a $10 contribution to the Arizona Democratic Party? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_L1&amount=10&&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_EL5&&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
[DONATE $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_EL25&&link_id=5&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
[DONATE $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_EL50&link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
[DONATE $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_EL100&&link_id=7&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
[DONATE $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_EL250&&link_id=8&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
[DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/az_defendkelly?refcode=EM_FR_220418MarkKellyresend_N_MKelly_270do_6_G_N_ELOTHR&&link_id=9&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-i-have-about-15-minutes&email_referrer=email_1512194&email_subject=my-decision&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512194)
Thank you again. For everything.

Mark Kelly

name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Rand’s scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, our team
recently found out that Rand Paul has raised a record number of corporate
donations in an attempt to stop our movement.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220418?refcode=em20220418-1777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1777_346206_2v9sYI&akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI ][IMG]

Let’s make this clear: 75% of Rand Paul’s campaign money comes from
corporate money, rich people, and big business.

And when you look at his voting record in the ten years he’s been in
office, it makes perfect sense. Rand Paul has catered his agenda time and
again to the rich and powerful, leaving the rest of Kentucky behind.

Meanwhile, our campaign raised nearly half of our donations from
Kentuckians – an unprecedented demonstration of the energy on the ground
for this race. 98% of our donations were from grassroots supporters like
you.

It just goes to show how scared Rand Paul is of our movement. If we keep
growing this grassroots momentum, we know we’ll be in a strong position to
end this era of failed leadership and bring real change to Kentucky.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220418?refcode=em20220418-1777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1777_346206_2v9sYI&akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI ]Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to
help us continue building our people-powered movement? Every dollar you
give helps us reach more voters in every corner of Kentucky so we can pull
off a historic win this November.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220418?refcode=em20220418-1777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1777_346206_2v9sYI&akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI ]Contribute $5

THIS is how we’re going to elect a new chapter of leadership that will
always put people first.

THIS is how we’re going to finally elect a leader who will fight for
urgent policies like Medicare for All.

THIS is how we’re going to transform the future of our Commonwealth and
our Country.

It costs $0.05 for our campaign to contact 1 voter in Kentucky. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220418?refcode=em20220418-1777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1777_346206_2v9sYI&akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI ]Can
you chip in $20 right now so we can contact 400 voters in Kentucky and
start doing the hard organizing work it’ll take to defeat Rand Paul?

Thank you,

Leo
Deputy Campaign Manager, Charles Booker for Senate

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220418-1777-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1777_346206_2v9sYI&akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1777%2E346206%2E2v9sYI

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Vicky Hartzler for U.S. Senate
subject: Kansas City Star Attacks My Faith
body:
A front-page attack on Easter Sunday!! [](http://links.hartzlerforsenate.org/u/click?_t=1feb8b824d3a4bea8a2ff68de85e7950&_m=29e03b76974f4b64b17cb3bb5cb20697&_e=CdST5y3QDve22y58FFXTNha-e14jmAkDCWVBz-F0BWOAorHbszyQ4pD1g5O5ieJmJmy8iY-YCmDIXWMsM09rkBSDDozg2opG_69QCZhohPF1hTR3R3kqRSA09cJTe9kW9rKuUgqYIDi5_rxeLS8UH6rvoXbp4tTZGF2tYiDqK8auc5YAiHDS1w3WBv5DkKTy1T2b8OdAisIh0s-bUjL6lh8k0gQcb-30PKdofateTIxxrNNFQuBkmgjiJjw9wmtbTbR7qvDT3aLOY7e9WcWbQsXN9Df4q0bs8XodgQNN-dFCHExkqHrKW-grQ8Gyh4kbq_xuB37AScMWoLOhI4VIU-Ic6exC1H-dcTg4fK6_AyQkGtLXyMxGPEOQJr8bCgRlFQGCGzwjvXFwh9ctARay9A%3D%3D) Friend, This week — on Easter Sunday, no less, the Kansas City Star published a front-page spread attacking my faith in Jesus. _**They view the fact that my Christian faith guides my life as a threat.**_ _Vicky Hartzler says religion guides her politics — and her opposition to LGBTQ rights. Will it win her a seat in the U.S. Senate?_ When the Kansas City star disingenuously asks that question, they fail to acknowledge a key fact. _**My Christian faith guides EVERY aspect of my life.**_ My faith is my foundation — it’s who I am. name: Ron Johnson
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Friend -- First and foremost, thank you. I decided to run again because, like you, I believe our nation is in peril. We are currently witnessing what happens when Democrats who want to “fundamentally transform” America have the power to do so. The results are disastrous. Open borders, millions of illegal immigrants, out-of-control deficit spending sparking 40 year high inflation, a war on fossil fuel causing record high gasoline prices, rising crime, and the embarrassing and dangerous surrender in Afghanistan all leading to a significantly weakened country. If we had an honest and unbiased media, they would be reporting the destructive results of Democrat governance, and the public would be outraged and demand change. Instead, we have media outlets that are advocates for Democrats and the radical left and are covering all this up. And of course, they want the Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat to be occupied by a radical leftist like them, so they’ve made me their number one target. **That’s why I need your help.** Along with this letter, I have included the link to my nomination form below. Without the required number of nomination signatures, I cannot be on the November 8th ballot and cannot continue my ongoing fight for freedom. I would be grateful if you would complete the nomination form by collecting 10 signatures and sending the form to the P.O. Box that is in the top left corner of the form. If you are willing and able to collect more than 10 signatures, you can print additional forms on my website, **[ronjohnsonforsenate.com](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=OeVyA9su1s4m_kM4IBsHlhJxUsqhfAUUilO2HKKfLClnBzJp2qGPqJOsMpe3hF0s&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ron_johnson_letter_x_1&n=1)**. You have probably seen all the false attack ads run by Democrat candidates and liberal dark money groups. To date, they have spent $19.3 million engaging in the politics of personal destruction. Unfortunately, I have only been able to spend a fraction of that amount defending my record and personal integrity. Any contribution you are willing to provide will be greatly appreciated. Please share this with your family, friends and neighbors - we will need as much help and support as possible to win in November. Thank you, Ron | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ron_johnson_letter_x_1&n=2 "Click here to view Nomination Form") [Click here to view Nomination Form](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ron_johnson_letter_x_1&n=2)

clean_body: Friend -- First and foremost, thank you. I decided to run again because, like you, I believe our nation is in peril. We are currently witnessing what happens when Democrats who want to “fundamentally transform” America have the power to do so. The results are disastrous. Open borders, millions of illegal immigrants, out-of-control deficit spending sparking 40 year high inflation, a war on fossil fuel causing record high gasoline prices, rising crime, and the embarrassing and dangerous surrender in Afghanistan all leading to a significantly weakened country. If we had an honest and unbiased media, they would be reporting the destructive results of Democrat governance, and the public would be outraged and demand change. Instead, we have media outlets that are advocates for Democrats and the radical left and are covering all this up. And of course, they want the Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat to be occupied by a radical leftist like them, so they’ve made me their number one target. That’s why I need your help. Along with this letter, I have included the link to my nomination form below. Without the required number of nomination signatures, I cannot be on the November 8th ballot and cannot continue my ongoing fight for freedom. I would be grateful if you would complete the nomination form by collecting 10 signatures and sending the form to the P.O. Box that is in the top left corner of the form. If you are willing and able to collect more than 10 signatures, you can print additional forms on my website, . You have probably seen all the false attack ads run by Democrat candidates and liberal dark money groups. To date, they have spent $19.3 million engaging in the politics of personal destruction. Unfortunately, I have only been able to spend a fraction of that amount defending my record and personal integrity. Any contribution you are willing to provide will be greatly appreciated. Please share this with your family, friends and neighbors - we will need as much help and support as possible to win in November. Thank you, Ron | "Click here to view Nomination Form" "Click here to support Senator Johnson's Fight for Freedom!" Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

name: Jessica LaVigne
subject: too little, too late
body:
Tina Kotek's housing plan is too little and far too late.
---
| | Dear Peter,

If you want to see the choice facing Oregon Democrats in this race, just take a look at the housing plans. I’m proud of Tobias Read’s housing plan. **It calls for immediate, decisive action to get people into safe housing, clean up our public spaces, and invest in housing affordability for our future.** But when I take a look at former Speaker Tina Kotek’s housing plan I see a lack of urgency and phrases like “by 2033” and “next ten years.”

[**The choice is clear: Tobias Read is the only candidate with a plan to address our homelessness crisis NOW. Will you sign up to support _immediate_ housing action?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44271380/340872970/-1919635367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDIwNWQ0ZS01OGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xb-ATtam5SMqhY0VuFX0Dl_YmOdnseRaU-R7rX5zjdk=&emci=d43e4848-58bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9d205d4e-58bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)

As Speaker, Tina Kotek set the legislative agenda in Salem for the past ten years. It was under her leadership that homelessness reached all-time highs and Oregon’s housing stock languished. And her housing policy if elected governor? To issue an executive order to come up with a new 10-year plan. This is directly from her website: **By the time Tina Kotek’s housing plan gets moving it will be far too little and far too late.** People are dying on our streets as a result of being homeless. Our families feel unsafe and our small businesses are struggling. Oregon must do better. We owe it to our homeless neighbors and to all Oregonians to take action right away, not five or ten years from now.

[**Please sign on if you agree: We need immediate action on housing the homeless.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44271381/340872971/-1919635367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDIwNWQ0ZS01OGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xb-ATtam5SMqhY0VuFX0Dl_YmOdnseRaU-R7rX5zjdk=&emci=d43e4848-58bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9d205d4e-58bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)

Thanks,
Jessica LaVigne
---

subject: Tax Day Reminder: David Will Eliminate State Income Tax
body:
As Governor, David will completely eliminate the state income tax and allow you to keep more of your hard-earned money. | | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=4330795c43&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Tax Day isn't fun for anyone, but wouldn't it be nice to slash your bill?

As Governor, David Perdue will **_completely eliminate the state income tax and allow you to keep more of your hard-earned money._**

Career politicians say it can’t be done, but David is a business guy who knows how to get results.

Georgia is home to an outstanding workforce, but we’re falling behind states like Florida, Texas, and Tennessee, which all have no state income tax. It’s time to make our state **more competitive** to ensure economic opportunity for everyone.

As renowned economist Art Laffer [said](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=e3fb824ad3&e=89fb4d5220), "David Perdue is totally correct. By lowering tax rates and bringing prosperity back into Georgia, you'll create more wealth, more jobs, higher incomes. **Perdue's got the right answer here**."

President Trump has endorsed David because he knows David is true to his word and will fight to get this done for Georgia.
---

Hello Peter, **The primary election is now just _FOUR WEEKS AWAY_ on May 17th, and it’s all hands on deck to help Mark come out on top!**

You know that Mark is the proven conservative leader who will get the job done to protect this seat, and will lead the charge in Washington to end the Democrats’ fiscal insanity, secure our nation’s southern border, and defend our liberty and the right to life.

It’s vital that we reach our end-of-month grassroots goal as we ramp up to win, and right now we’re behind pace.

If we fall short, we’ll be forced to scale back our plans for the final push to Election Day.

[**Will you rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation now to help us get caught up?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0736aa984a5a6303/111f51e216022734c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

Mark is FED UP with the disastrous Biden-Democrat agenda in Washington.

**We know you are too... and we need to KEEP NORTH CAROLINA RED this November to elect a new Republican majority, take back our country, and stop the left!**

Stand with Mark and our team in this fight. Every day and every dollar counts right now.

[**Please pitch in as generously as you can to help Mark win on May 17th.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/0736aa984a5a6303/8fae555e72f85980c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

If not, I encourage you to go **[watch it here.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuyKG_DfyVBY8yEu5978v3XCNEbdHXHAL7CByvkBjHbN_exDk-jn89L8TcaR_LZOJAQHaevfLqAkgPrbrBEOmxgBzul6GTa-WhGlHHLZdTvDa9QqBpdaN4VnUAG7SyvhvAODW8KxG3D8PnE0hEvFXYNdAIW0kASKBSbK4PMsyjSuxpyIqaNRK2M0AQHXWnslyVF3_o9CvEU4ZZ423_qnMIciA%3D%3D)** As a United States Navy combat veteran, I give my analysis of what’s happening on the ground in Ukraine. **[Please click below to watch the video!](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuyAsn3IOQDboaMuI5SF292-FgZwL9ZC7KCnzfViymVxu0R_vG7ztPubdK-qsGqc_p3Ohetn2rYvehFRtYx1OtrHG92aR9hubgfG7D2gIzZ9zl776Nk1trLyEhUc7frz3db2-L7GE-6wPYU2wKc8I2MzApCoXcEWorFU_AcXdjMVKSFcK17GXRRlOPyfeywWOXNAOqT2QUeeKwuHB-74qUgNQ%3D%3D)**

[**WATCH MY NEWSMAX INTERVIEW >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuydhZkoBjRlrSZIEJT-FhcuZ9CWfUCysKti1gi5NrtY4Sz6Z9MV43I1AEMChZF6PZdIwmAfH5rVOxSnRYL5JCesFN3cOCeBts6QJJFplrUsuSk2YctBtgyxfQBWJDJ1k-WSRQHNt8VmdoJUbX8Cmf6s234vQ_El06tL8Wdh_xO6kNoxxLw-mF55Ny5BPVOod15gGjLPBAZBI8RR5WSHIV6fw%3D%3D)
We're seeing reports of Russian troops getting frostbite, shooting themselves in the leg so they can be sent home, and having to bury their fellow soldiers in mass graves. This is turning out to be a bit of a disaster for Putin. I can tell you firsthand from serving three deployments overseas that morale is a big factor in a war.

It’s hard to fight and keep focus on your mission when you are not motivated to continue your fight. In this case, Russian soldiers are often fighting against their family members. When this mission began, soldiers were told by the top, Putin and his rank and file, that they’d be in and out in 3 days, but here they are a whole month later. So, my guess is that the Russian soldiers are beginning to give in - defying orders, and committing sabotage.

It all boils down to what each side is fighting for. On one side you have Russian soldiers who are just following orders and on the other side you have people who are actually fighting for what they believe is their freedom. Freedom serves as the Ukrainians’ motivation, which carries significantly more weight than Putin’s orders for the Russian soldiers.

A few days ago, President Zelensky asked NATO to “never again say that the Ukrainian forces don't meet NATO standards.” And then, he went on to slam NATO and the United States for slow-walking aid to his country. Friend, I think he’s 100% in the right to do this.

President Biden and his gang of Left-wing social advocates have completely bungled the handling of this situation and it’s left **[the American people looking for new leadership to step up.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuy7cmTjgBQi6n_pXeUvlZi0EBfM4GItwJJJBNT5PUZReTCBIg2CzLhChYPVG7v2d0woruUJwraZUTI5F0zJVexjqhTSTcMamEHw0c9BgIgXpYCi8GcXIB93Jro83ynw3cynrtSu_zxX-VMXNmq2h7MoBpHzqUDo4zkhZjXF4aYydJ0weV-QqKNWjG8b2GP912jlGuKB5uXDPQie8RSQkt99g%3D%3D)**

**Well, I would love the opportunity to represent Florida on the House floor and add a Republican vote in favor of sending Nancy Pelosi back to the hole in California from which she came.**

**[If you can spare $5 or $10, it would help me immensely as I ramp up my campaign efforts for the coming primary. Can you chip in just $5 or $10 today to help a Navy veteran, and first generation American get on the ballot this November for the Republican Party?](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuykUDH3Vo3Q4tdTWhQRqs5ZW15goKqHMgCHM28791A8DE_wkuoJ3odA8qiU1jGUSXPiEHGDZ9KkZ2mCdEMlUmfyN37F9qatkbe5G8XEZZq6Dk6AvowKCZYNiHDTfnhFEM8_zpzhi-fJZ1u2bS-OJs-GaemXasogN7kSfsLKOndWe2nUD1KOiv9OssuMcz80cREFFDCDyizxsGgENJxXVq2kA%3D%3D)**

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuy26lkXAK5l_g_1mzH1ld4uL2Z3UVeIJL89W361xIdxqgoHemqovM3aDfr3tor4eALc2u7e-UNkVojp6J5cn30ssjr0thlEDto_f-yhoBiY6Z6gQWE6U2RVFtHFfWvqd6bYnAhuFOhRcg-WAnDHgpsSI9r53yhMzM66EeCRLPC2-FfVKbAzq4oRUyxW3j3H6dWxjYeegbOgMQFxyRIhyQ_QA%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=0260172078f2401fa921650e0efa2676&_e=nsFcmO-BbZc8ntLxs9ByVfGajOdVxmkprBPl7oi-yRMWq7P1BRbRp49mOYS1xyrIVIkAZckEtwP2y9KRt1h1XhatFDC64kAvgNH3dH2qMqRPzLD1rhydI2Fqk2QlnxagHyxEM8pV5iFZgHd4mYzV4tNtg8Iq9SsBsUaRzS6qqUsCd8B4yQOmhU3Zse5nF3sGFqXu820_tb0rN6Hoy-TDdS0kiSQ-UaJgTVXZTli_PSdYypAfDH2ID5dzvA7SjDuyVi04TSUVgJWePk1qR3z51KA6fPOdRF3p-p60uqlyz-oQBkjHh4lYsrD9w4im0fcxKBTl7WdBTllvYjiJ3ayxzILbyT7ER-64hr1UmUPB71CnBsXejXc6uyPendEHbI9kOLqopZUY1pyo3LYyNq0HAFm2PT6Vvi8RSi5cbM7x00J2XPEz_SUgjm_d-lbwsgw_74CnozdKqLLnv1_j7fVzJg%3D%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3cc72b17d0f0471998bf1085ce6c0205&_e=JH9mJlAyPYhw1940PIaIh5trBy-1ErBHxsUPGXJ6la4JW1Smf7uNGpJLJ57LSc8pqZ0czw1con_D-HOJKdUM_JH1w_GyAtTfxoxh4y2FcIBOqlPcUbkWlP2pBKUgro-W_ZW1vMcEpXWsEFAO_xKb79qgUozGHt6L4l7X6QSHedHk_Xv4Xykm91NG9oCd1xyDY-KJeJP6bNl6_E69AR8XQzwsiRRwHVIxj2U2MVJ58J9woYyIihMCRQsdM63pv0wF9EEn0hnjlUQBVR_nNaYQ_kIq3YruZkPqYWT2l2DNHu5ec4cnG9llISBXoOJthXsa0oV8cs8KM0UT4m6QI4vMf0DRlr4qj5survvvTxRY-jWhV8_p1YnVM6zocyHa4xCZK1FwdfpLOMFbJrohs9AvaZIP9CAF4I2Di5ePU3vP-a--CUIL0x6vVcABTeAHFqH9FDw4Gf1_ZD4LlhJyO4mwH_A0ZKP_Vc-2xSnFa8l0XxrBJpdoCK4cYybTeDNKPh6RCUEvI1Jeh1JT9XLw-9qB6ykhJjSbwk2u7_0pUlhZMRE%3D)
---

Peter,

We have another exciting announcement! **Marianne Williamson has officially endorsed David for Congress in the NJ-08 race. **

**Here's what she said: **

_"I’m proud to endorse David Ocampo Grajales for NJ-08! David is a first-generation American from a working class family. He’s a fearless progressive taking on a machine and exactly the champion we need in Congress. Let’s help him get there!" - Marianne Williamson_

Team Ocampo

name: Adam Schiff
subject: CA’s record-breaking gas prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=186%2E5257348%2Eg-ugTJ ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

If you’re from the Golden State, you won’t be surprised to hear that gas
prices in California are the highest in the country.

With fossil fuel companies price gouging at the pump, Big Oil is raking in
record-breaking profits while California residents suffer the expense.
Putin's war of aggression in Ukraine also demonstrates how vulnerable the
US and our European allies are when we rely on despots and dictators for
our energy needs.

California Republicans are leading protests and — believe it or not —
voter registration efforts at gas stations while falsely accusing
President Biden of the increases in gas prices. Meanwhile, my Republican
colleagues in Congress are accepting big checks from fossil fuel
executives and prioritizing corporate profits over their constituents.

These high gas prices don’t make the case for more of a reliance on fossil
fuels and petro-dictatorships, but less. And the only way to permanently
deprive Putin of the money to make war is by devaluing his only resource —
oil and gas.

And here’s the other uncomfortable truth: The United Nations’
Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) recently published a
report outlining the dire state of the planet and the urgency of reducing
emissions and calling on governments to address the impending climate
disaster facing our planet.

We’re not talking about a matter of decades. We’ve got a couple of years —
just the next few elections — to maintain and build a Democratic majority
that will act on climate.

Derek, we need to pass legislation this year to invest in clean
renewable energy so we can provide relief for consumers and protect the
planet, and no matter what, we cannot lose the House or Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220418_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=186_5257348_g-ugTJ&akid=186%2E5257348%2Eg-ugTJ ]Can you pitch in $10, $25, or $50 right now to fuel my work fighting
for comprehensive climate legislation in the House and to keep our
Democratic majorities working for climate solutions and clean energy?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: I would have signed these bills
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Vetoing commonsense legislation that would benefit Kansans has been a hallmark of Laura Kelly’s tenure as governor. In years past, she vetoed a grocer Friend, Vetoing commonsense legislation that would benefit Kansans has been a hallmark of Laura Kelly’s tenure as governor. In years past, she vetoed a grocery tax cut, a scholarship program for students in need, better civics education for our kids, a rural development program advocated by community banks, and so much more. So it’s no surprise that she did it again last week. The Kansas Legislature recently sent three important bills to Governor Kelly’s desk that she has now vetoed: ❌ Measures that would prevent biological male athletes from competing in K-12 and college women’s sports, ❌ Proposals that would provide parents greater transparency and input when it comes to their children’s education, ❌ And requirements to ensure that every adult who is able to get a job and has no children either get a job or enroll in job training before they can become eligible for food stamps. These bills have broad support across Kansas and are aimed at ensuring fairness in women’s sports, keeping parents informed about what their children are being taught, and getting more Kansans off government benefits and back to work. They were passed with large majorities in both the Kansas House of Representatives and Kansas Senate. If these bills had come to my desk as governor, I would have signed them without hesitation. **[Will you stand with me in support of these important bills?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f90217e4b35846bba08e35d7491a96b0&_e=cbF2LnNShLxVM20oLOFi3bL2M4ZwzL3bF-3NIdN2xpvRugTvFZ1Sg-HHzbXc5liL0Pmk1PObglqJFurkRF8_Ht0qQjJqBnMwUvWGFOJfhdl5oiIWhOv-3RgHTJ3SIGkqPgD9Vl2s8y-kmJa_RQTvwUu_GRshsMDmgckdRF96ZmuJUiOQ-cxWvc7MWrR96lYvrPBsXa1PNqIOSOIDgbrWP7n4DQCpHEPbCM5JPYt8i7Qm-7gnoWTyouus0wj4WoQ8_m5cAU53SVaVqN7RXlsjKQeyjrG2wcmwMDFMNqCYSNgN3L6HwGqkWsgtQN4vKTnF9tYJfEK0IPHMd0REwDrboOphirrzc-VrpuofgnaqiOVd2jEcY_rfgoxk03wHVuJNmR3A1fgmTPstd_Yjg1F_eJeEMFJJewmduQRx7HFWcYu-rja0VQJlS6V9D-zNETXTfUHXdiuMXdkN_NRKQHjZpq6VKIe1uwyiaJXXv1LyPxGqJFMLxZWfUkVQNEloZxlJ)** subject: Freedom isn’t Free

I’m proud to be a U.S. Army veteran, and after my years as an officer in the intelligence unit, I know that _no one_ knows leadership like someone who’s fought for our country.

Hunt For Congress,
clean_body: Peter, We’re only able to enjoy our freedom as Americans because of the brave men and women who serve our country in uniform. I’m proud to be a U.S. Army veteran, and after my years as an officer in the intelligence unit, I know that no one knows leadership like someone who’s fought for our country. That’s why I’m proud to be working with fellow conservative veterans Hung Cao and Pat Harrigan to launch ourAmerica First Veterans Initiative. America’s veterans have skin in the game of our country’s future like no other, Peter. We put our lives on the line to defend everything that makes America great. So now, watching radical socialists trying to destroy what we’ve fought for lights a special fire in us to defend our values. Conservative veterans aren’t just the key to taking back the House, they’re the ONLY way we can get America back on track. We were willing to give up EVERYTHING for America. Now, we need America to have our backs in the fight to preserve our great country. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Jeremy for Georgia. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

clean_body: Tuesday Maxine Waters will be back in front of a judge to defend her campaign’s brazenly illegal behavior during the 2020 election. We’re approaching our first end of quarter deadline so it’s crucial we keep the momentum going in our mission to FIRE Ted Lieu, Maxine Waters and Nancy Pelosi and keep the far-left from ruining our country with their radical policies! Can I count on your support to help save this nation? | Peter, Tuesday Maxine Waters will be back in front of a judge to defend her campaign’s brazenly illegal behavior during the 2020 election. Her lawyers used every legal loophole in the book to make this case go away. There were delays, postponements and Maxine even ignored a court order hoping we’d run out of money. Peter, we didn’t drop our case and after Tuesday Maxine could be facing serious legal consequences for her actions. Maxine and the DNC are spending millions to protect her and they’re going to try and drag this case out even longer. The charges against Maxine Waters aren’t trivial. We take down Maxine, it will destroy Nancy Pelosi’s leadership and eliminate any chance the Democrats have of keeping their majority. We’re fighting a two front war here, a legal battle against Maxine and a political campaign to defeat her biggest lackey in Congress, Ted Lieu. The last thing he wants is to see Maxine dragged out of court in handcuffs. We’re playing hardball with two of the most corrupt leaders in Congress. Peter, the evidence is on our side. Thank you for your support, Joe E. Collins III CA-36 Congressional Candidate Proud Navy Veteran | | JOE COLLINS is a Navy Veteran from South Los Angeles. LET’S GROW TOGETHER! Fellow American,

Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race:
1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia.
2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race.
3. The Republican Senate majority will come down to this Georgia Senate race.

**Fellow American, unfortunately, the fundraising gap we're seeing in Georgia is happening across the country.**

The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. **DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE!**

_**It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back.**_

clean_body: We need your immediate support to pick up the pace and win this critical U.S. Senate race. | Fellow American, Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race: 1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia. 2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race. 3. The Republican Senate majority will come down to this Georgia Senate race. Fellow American, unfortunately, the fundraising gap we're seeing in Georgia is happening across the country. The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE! It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back. Our country cannot afford two more years of Senators Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock passing President Biden's agenda through the Senate. It's absolutely critical that Republicans flip the Senate and get America back on the right track. If we're going to pick up our fundraising pace and increase our lead in the Georgia polls, We cannot afford to fall any further behind - everything is on the line. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade6weeks?refcode=whem0418 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade6weeks?refcode=whem0418]
Good evening Peter,
We hope you had a good holiday weekend and were able to spend time with friends & family! In between campaign stops, Wade has been taking every opportunity to see the newest member of his family, his grandson (and Easter Bunny) Isaac!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0418edit_3.jpg]
Getting back out in the neighborhood last Saturday, Wade attended the Savannah Regional Central Labor Council’s 32nd Annual Fish Fry! It was another opportunity to discuss the importance of organized labor in our community. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0418edit.jpg]
On Monday, Wade headed out to Riceboro for a meet and greet at Briar Bay Park. Events like this remind him of why he’s running for office – to serve the incredible community he’s lucky to be a part of. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0418edit_1.jpg]
Wade also attended the Girl Scouts Legacy of Leadership Luncheon, where the first Legacy of Leadership Award was presented to State Rep. Edna Jackson. It was inspiring to meet strong women from across the country and to celebrate, in the Girl Scouts’ birthplace, their mission of building girls of courage, confidence, and character. And it’s always good to see our friend Alderwoman Linda Wilder-Bryan! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0418edit_2.jpg]
Folks, we are quickly approaching the May 24th primary election, so we are asking – Can you pitch in a small amount today to power our TV, digital, and print advertising throughout the First District? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade6weeks?refcode=whem0418]
Wade is busy talking to as many voters as possible, but we need the resources to make our message heard. This election is crucial to moving our state forward, and we need your support!
Let’s flip this District!
– Wade Herring HQ
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade6weeks?refcode=whem0418]
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cef88b19-46bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/b40b5fc9-60bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDBiNWZjOS02MGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eD_kvMwBDn8UcrSYnJzL36OJVqYmG9hsyywDkr9FY_4=&id=127098231 .

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Tax. The. Rich.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [_Ballots drop in only 88 days! Rush a donation now to help me pay for voter outreach, yard signs, and other essentials._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44277627/340923329/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmM5OTA2OS04M2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e1ZOR8WvUZiOye04alyRe8UidPPKITXlyNNFChEe-NA=) People on food stamps pay a higher tax rate than billionaires. Yes, it’s true. A _ProPublica_ report found that the 25 richest Americans pay a true tax rate of only 3.4%. By contrast, the median American household pays 14%. This is dangerous for two reasons. One, it worsens income inequality, which destabilizes society. We now have greater income inequality in the US than we did during the Gilded Age. Two, it allows billionaires to accumulate so much money that they can buy politicians and legislation with it. Money has so corrupted Congress that seats on committees are even for sale. Yes, we need to repeal Citizens United — and we also need to tax the rich so they simply don’t have enough money to buy seats on committees for their Congressional puppets anymore. [**If you can, please chip in to help me win my election to Congress, so I can fight to tax the rich and fight for clean_body: | | | Hi there, = People on food stamps pay a higher tax rate than billionaires. Yes, it’s true. A ProPublica report found that the 25 richest Americans pay a true tax rate of only 3.4%. By contrast, the median American household pays 14%. This is dangerous for two reasons. One, it worsens income inequality, which destabilizes society. We now have greater income inequality in the US than we did during the Gilded Age. Two, it allows billionaires to accumulate so much money that they can buy politicians and legislation with it. Money has so corrupted Congress that seats on committees are even for sale. Yes, we need to repeal Citizens United — and we also need to tax the rich so they simply don’t have enough money to buy seats on committees for their Congressional puppets anymore. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is embarrassing . . .
body:
My RINO opponent's nickname, "Do-Nothing Dan", holds firm now that the latest FEC reports have just come out.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wvjPktvE892Dei53tUVEhqTg/i0pkeU48uEbomLxjvlsEpQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wvjPktvE892Dei53tUVEhqTg/i0pkeU48uEbomLxjvlsEpQ)He's been in Congress for 10 years, he's the former Speaker of the House for the Florida State Legislature, and is ranked one of the least effective members of Congress . . . and now, he's been outraised again - **THREE TIMES OVER** - by me, a feisty, America First challenger.

My RINO opponent's nickname, "Do-Nothing Dan", holds firm now that the latest FEC reports have just come out.

Daniel Webster raised a mere $52k in the first quarter of 2022.

**And $25,500 of that came from Political Action Committees (PACs)!**

Webster is relying on the NRCC to save his seat for him, as he's not willing to put in the hard work to win . . . **and that 's why he donated TWENTY GRAND to Kevin McCarthy's NRCC in February!**

I can win this race, but there is no time to waste! The Florida redistricting maps are expected to be finalized tomorrow, and then it's a race to victory from now until the Primary Election Day on August 23, 2022.

So please, [help me beat Do-Nothing Dan in the upcoming Republican Primary by donating today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wvjPktvE892Dei53tUVEhqTg/i0pkeU48uEbomLxjvlsEpQ)

The clock is ticking, and [I'll need every dollar we can raise to help us get in front of every Republican voter in the district](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wvjPktvE892Dei53tUVEhqTg/i0pkeU48uEbomLxjvlsEpQ)!

We need leaders who WORK and who put AMERICA FIRST.

We don't need members of Congress who sit on their hands most of the year, show up to work when they feel like it, and only pretend to serve their constituents during an Election Year!

If you haven't already done so, [please donate to help kick off the 2nd Fundraising Quarter of 2022!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wvjPktvE892Dei53tUVEhqTg/i0pkeU48uEbomLxjvlsEpQ)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

I’m confident that, if you help me win this fight, we _will_ build the New York of our dreams: A New York where every resident, from our rural towns to our massive cities, is treated with dignity and respect. A New York where no one has to choose between a lifesaving prescription or a roof over their head. A New York where no one has to live in fear of gun violence or hate crimes. **A New York that embraces our beautiful diversity and ensures that all New Yorkers have an equal opportunity to build the life they wish to live.**

name: Pfaff HQ
subject: Starting to worry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
We fell short of our goal.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274021/340884999/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.18_b1_mmd-short_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2JiZWM0Yi02NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kY8mCgI53ZWtV8X6oRpM3X6xb9M0TP5jciMBfKO_ns=)
---
Friends,

Last Friday was our mid-month fundraising deadline and unfortunately we have some bad news:**we fell short of our goal.**

We promised Brad we would raise another $1,500 to make sure he has the resources to defeat our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent.

**So we’ll be honest -- we’re starting to worry.** We need to make up the difference today to get back on track.

I also know that we have a dedicated group of grassroots supporters that has always risen to the occasion and helped us meet every goal we’ve set, and I’m really counting on that right now.

clean_body: We fell short of our goal. | = Friends, Last Friday was our mid-month fundraising deadline and unfortunately we have some bad news:we fell short of our goal. We promised Brad we would raise another $1,500 to make sure he has the resources to defeat our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent. So we’ll be honest -- we’re starting to worry. We need to make up the difference today to get back on track. I also know that we have a dedicated group of grassroots supporters that has always risen to the occasion and helped us meet every goal we’ve set, and I’m really counting on that right now. = | = = = = = = We can’t fall short again, especially since Derrick Van Orden has already raised more than $900,000 last quarter and will have countless dark money groups coming in to spread more lies about his Capitol Insurrectionist record. = Thank you, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: The super rich pay the lowest taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Tax Day 2022 is here. Let’s talk about why we need to reshape our economy.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220418-2957-header&t=1&akid=2957%2E2526796%2E-itl3Z)
Every day is a good day to talk about taxing the rich.
But today is officially Tax Day, so we want to go into a little more detail on what exactly we mean when we say "tax the rich." Our leaders have historically taken the opposite approach: cutting taxes for the rich and expecting wealth to "trickle down" to the rest of us (spoiler alert: it doesn't).
As we work to reshape our economy and make it work for everyone — not just the people at the top — taxing the rich is the clear and necessary solution.
### **So, why do we need to tax the rich?**
* **The super rich pay lower taxes than the poorest Americans.** The United States has a regressive tax system in which the richest people actually pay lower effective tax rates across all levels of government than the poorest people in our country. Seems hard to believe, right? But it’s true.1

* **Taxes on the rich are much lower than they used to be.** Check out this graph from _The New York Times_ comparing rates from 1950 to 2018.2

* **Two men — Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos — own more wealth than the bottom 40% of Americans combined.** 3
* **During the pandemic, U.S. billionaires saw their wealth go up 55% from $2.95 trillion to $4.56 trillion.** 4
* **U.S. income inequality has returned to Gilded Age levels from the early 1900s.** Our inequality levels are the highest of all G7 countries (UK, Italy, Japan, Canada, Germany, France).5,6
* **CEOs at large companies in the U.S. now make an astonishing 264 times what the average U.S. worker makes.** 7 In 1989, the ratio was 58-to-1, and in 1965, it was 20-to-1.8
* **Polls show Americans don’t believe the rich pay their fair share, but Republicans keep lowering their taxes.** Gallup polls as far back as 1992 have shown that the vast majority of Americans want to tax the rich more.9 Even then, Presidents Bush and Trump pushed through massive tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans.

### Are you fired up and ready to tax the rich?
Good — because we can’t win this fight without grassroots activism and organizing. **If you know someone who might benefit from reading the facts above, please forward them this email.** If we can unite the working people of this country, we can tax the rich, close the inequality gap, and bring about a just economy for all of us.
– Team AOC
In 2016, Alexandria paid more in income taxes as a bartender than Donald Trump did as a billionaire.10 That’s proof that our system is broken on a fundamental level.
We’re building a movement to pass economic reforms that center the struggles of working people.
[**Can you help us keep up that fight by donating to Alexandria’s reelection? Any amount makes a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220418?refcode=em20220418-2957-P_FND_EXP_TAX&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2957_2526796_-itl3Z&akid=2957%2E2526796%2E-itl3Z)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220418?refcode=em20220418-2957-P_FND_EXP_TAX&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2957_2526796_-itl3Z&akid=2957%2E2526796%2E-itl3Z)**
* * *

](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8911?t=4&akid=2957%2E2526796%2E-itl3Z)2 - [New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8911?t=5&akid=2957%2E2526796%2E-itl3Z)

My dogs help me keep my spirits up and remember to find joy even as we confront the pressing issues at stake in the 2022 elections.

That joy reminds me that we can build a better future for all of us– but we can only do that by electing a new generation of progressive leaders to Congress.

In order to win this race, we need to be able to fully fund our field program to talk to voters all across NC-04 by:
* Hiring experienced field organizers to build our grassroots movement up
* Printing campaign materials to distribute to voters
* And supplying our dedicated team of volunteers with everything they need to go knock some doors!

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d497fde595b240d4852bcaef128415d4&_e=EC4hoiScwQS5xwcr7y-TGv3M3HFY-4PDB71IZa_kyRzqPyniYsyy02lbteUISFmlg5qTsskApKFRHxM2HHYJgQMtS2V7_REaYJNltyuLLP75PjyqRdjw2CzwWevrlpzfkNKszZev1shmH50x3kG64UfHYC7RwtBJRdWvIGVGN4jNvy5VtrVFVNpNO66biT_GPfXH1iKzJGy_i8dfLLSeElscmL8rE9JU_YhxK1iU7ZsuHjrW8jZ6gniPwh0O2DRYzEqpfxNNq_tRdnkU_TM0sKV26agpHtIxXsJ9OGy6PR_xNw5JjfTjXzLihhTPzYFUSYMdsyz4gkatdJNCpYBlVODBTGtf6X4WT5pdUZH9N_U%3D)
---
Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d497fde595b240d4852bcaef128415d4&_e=EC4hoiScwQS5xwcr7y-TGv3M3HFY-4PDB71IZa_kyRzqPyniYsyy02lbteUISFmlg5qTsskApKFRHxM2HHYJgQMtS2V7_REaYJNltyuLLP75PjyqRdjw2CzwWevrlpzfkNKszZev1shmH50x3kG64WYCm7HPUa0MXv_xMT0FNP046hkQoWHSefSVcZ1FFHNcjADsV1-Br5mOYG3eTRbX97dfguMvqMdErWYjTOFwaxGnOZ2UkIfsgb9P20RXRQ3IK-deQlUTNlpS840bYb3kdQTS1xj1ehtvJgTbiNKisaN7RASB71xF5CkPIKHoOj_ZjSq0RNDRaj3S_C-xLaJWIg03aRUaEQoWRASsc8jk_kg%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d497fde595b240d4852bcaef128415d4&_e=EC4hoiScwQS5xwcr7y-TGv3M3HFY-4PDB71IZa_kyRzqPyniYsyy02lbteUISFmlg5qTsskApKFRHxM2HHYJgQMtS2V7_REaYJNltyuLLP75PjyqRdjw2CzwWevrlpzfkNKszZev1shmH50x3kG64fPcXjHeZx64p7IAWZOIP5uEA7V0dZkPQFK5Ylelmoftr2zbwadfNiBVSmDpzQKkN0-PfI0g0vo0UBn-sb-MZy23X8dTSJMvroq5RogzU2jB_HfgEg2KnNVJyDwu7jnsvpuc4LRvViAZEveEYA8Ulcn1Ql_Z6RddJ-CUr44XUWY9WykWa4vrwfVm7OYgC_dEI0Q2OqTdhvSC5hjgP-3e8-E%3D)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d497fde595b240d4852bcaef128415d4&_e=EC4hoiScwQS5xwcr7y-TGv3M3HFY-4PDB71IZa_kyRzqPyniYsyy02lbteUISFmlg5qTsskApKFRHxM2HHYJgQMtS2V7_REaYJNltyuLLP75PjyqRdjw2CzwWevrlpzfkNKszZev1shmH50x3kG64TDAMqSaIUlPw92UYbyXy8e1jclVI4EIKJ3a-y3mtLiftIoN3aHaMveEumomDtTHyjADKbxmGhrkQ6DukAT0h8-2xoz9Msao6ZD0quWVqyY1ok9lL834r10eOw0Yc8dkUKKVMxeZdbnlDB3OVvA2YNfafUd9ds8fzu1dA9UiW6vz3V5eK4tZ_zmon_rh92KQFGLzOUDg1-MCkvFPWaGWu0s%3D) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d497fde595b240d4852bcaef128415d4&_e=EC4hoiScwQS5xwcr7y-TGv3M3HFY-4PDB71IZa_kyRzqPyniYsyy02lbteUISFmlg5qTsskApKFRHxM2HHYJgQMtS2V7_REaYJNltyuLLP75PjyqRdjw2CzwWevrlpzfkNKszZev1shmH50x3kG64ceovUfBdDKOi2cShfwQ4vJhCiM23YTTBEqlLQ6KAHfUgQP70JSeuQXsp02wX51hapylQ4gF-kwvHBQjApd7lXPrOPTW3EErRSx70bcyC3wQla9qkrWrjtA0NB41zSuu9HFowd7Pei5sV5oCOpG4ZhIN-jMlOmxeXXajE5b7PBTwuNOrum_voSxXHIRLBQA0sw0NXBWNWN35ex0vaLmaNoU%3D)

---

Friends,

We live in a country where our Free Speech comes under attack each and every day.

Let’s be clear: **Critical Race Theory steals the American Dream away from children by teaching them that success or failure is solely based on skin color, not hard work, education, or character.**

Can you explain to me why anyone would want to teach this to kids? We are ranked 11th in Science and 30th in Math when compared to other countries around the world. We should be teaching Math and Science in our classrooms, not divisive, hateful rhetoric.

**[I am writing to you today to stand up for the parents fighting back against Critical Race Theory, and I hope you’ll join me.](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=7a79d5a61e354c5a93ea84d7a6b8c1a4&_e=lOaEwyyU_bmf3uNARH6m5qFPLU4Y7BTqwZhht0j4gMv6p5tXV8JuLrL4UrqxFk9YgS_3NM-x0992FXPA1PbRNfPR5K6imcujDU3MK8-2B3oBX9reenGPP0_fEZ9rxYwb2oo1IDbYsHdwJBDCWoyv0dfx_8_SFlQbeeGrm3Y34cz7lPB8Y-vU6KDiAmyQrVl81EDi-_7B74LVtg_pr9wpLsf4oBiNsvDEjhRPzAqDZvfWLuXuxE09ooxnfDo_iH-d8OboUqGHUBN8Zs_FuZq9M1VghBntIKuxg2OJPiTRd9c1_PaKkm7wnOq0kc3Pvv6AJvsO_lhSk7fzKu5Hhq5p_fhloQaS84JQhMLISH-nehv3_l0XYbqA59RmtSiK6IYNt3QWQMzzDvCW1cFwOc-FqeXI4rdK-etbNfFmjjCa-rprTsp_P6-XmhjBXVYJR09284Ssp72l_IKJtxmJIe4XbLcM3JoazJctsx0IqeFnens%3D)**

We cannot fight back unless we Take Back the House and put people in power that fight back against hateful ideologies that are **WRONG!**
[**STAND WITH PARENTS**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=7a79d5a61e354c5a93ea84d7a6b8c1a4&_e=lOaEwyyU_bmf3uNARH6m5qFPLU4Y7BTqwZhht0j4gMv6p5tXV8JuLrL4UrqxFk9YgS_3NM-x0992FXPA1PbRNfPR5K6imcujDU3MK8-2B3oBX9reenGPP0_fEZ9rxYwb2oo1IDbYsHdwJBDCWoyv0dfx_8_SFlQbeeGrm3Y34cz7lPB8Y-vU6KDiAmyQrVl81EDi-_7B74LVtg_pr9wpLsf4oBiNsvDEjhRPzAqDZvfWLuXuxE09ooxnfDo_iH-dt2QHqtpMYfmWn6B9J5IAkkDpD4TyjL145eg3GMRfhhitu-hzQRmyyWFuYi15PFcfbsGu4scsF6OsS5NjJ0C3_2M2MbB8IoPXXSh8ZuS13hFkuLzdn7PGzBRDcfB6x4DQj65-NrqpJRD7Dxr_69IDhd0bnO_eeASsUGZ_YJYFl7PS51F9KIIEwmwgK3X8WN39q5ZHgCwRLoQovkgAnQKFPaybOn1UDZ51Za0dl5s747k%3D)

subject: Tax Day: It’s time to make the ultra-rich pay their fair share
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274888/340887548/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_dyc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI2NTQ3OC02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WWNR2j8v7PKG8paPlhm_xc_Nf78pvpyGjk5XfXH7uU=)

It’s Tax Day, Peter. While the average American worker making less than $100,000 per year will pay about 24% of their income in taxes today, the richest 400 families in this country will pay an average of _just 8.2%_ of their wealth. Even worse, 55 of the biggest, most profitable American corporations, including Nike and FedEx, paid ZERO dollars in taxes over the last three years. At a time when more than half of American families are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to make ends meet, the systematic unfairness is appalling. **It has to change — we must make corporations and the super-wealthy pay their fair share.[I’m running to stand up for working families in Congress and bring fairness to our tax code. Can you make a grassroots contribution today to help me do it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44274889/340887549/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220418taxday_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI2NTQ3OC02N2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WWNR2j8v7PKG8paPlhm_xc_Nf78pvpyGjk5XfXH7uU=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = It’s Tax Day, Peter. While the average American worker making less than $100,000 per year will pay about 24% of their income in taxes today, the richest 400 families in this country will pay an average of just 8.2% of their wealth. Even worse, 55 of the biggest, most profitable American corporations, including Nike and FedEx, paid ZERO dollars in taxes over the last three years. At a time when more than half of American families are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to make ends meet, the systematic unfairness is appalling. It has to change — we must make corporations and the super-wealthy pay their fair share.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = In a country as rich and wealthy as America is, no one should ever have to worry about basic needs like putting food on the table or a roof over their kids’ heads. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58661&L=27168&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHVibGljLWNvbGxlZ2UtcHJvZi1jb252aWN0ZWQtb2YtaGlkaW5nLXRpZXMtdG8tY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Public College Prof. Convicted of Hiding Ties to China under Trump Initiative Nixed by Biden DOJ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58661&L=27168&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHVibGljLWNvbGxlZ2UtcHJvZi1jb252aWN0ZWQtb2YtaGlkaW5nLXRpZXMtdG8tY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** A Chinese public university professor has been convicted of fraud for concealing ties to China’s government thanks to a Trump initiative—recently nixed by the Biden administration—designed to crack down on the Communist nation’s pervasive theft of American-funded research. A federal jury found the University of Kansas (KU) chemistry professor, Feng Tao, guilty of three counts of wire fraud and one count of false statements for deliberately concealing that he was also employed by a government-affiliated university in the People’s Republic of China (PRC) while working on research funded by the U.S. government. The drones are observing federal, state, county, and city agencies near the Mexican border, including the U.S. Border Patrol, Texas Department of Public Safety, Texas National Guard, county sheriffs and local police. ### [California has public ‘shame list’ of rebellious companies not reporting diversity ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58661&L=27120&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtaGFzLXB1YmxpYy1zaGFtZS1saXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Washington Examiner Some of the nation’s most famous corporations, including Lions Gate Entertainment and Live Nation, have not reported compliance with a California law that required boards of directors to meet a diversity quota.

The law has just been declared unconstitutional by a Los Angeles judge, and yet a “shame list” remains online for the public to scrutinize which corporations have the most ethnic minorities on their boards. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58661&L=27120&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2EtaGFzLXB1YmxpYy1zaGFtZS1saXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

### [DOJ Election Threat Taskforce Appears to Have ‘Something to Hide’: Watchdog Group President ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58661&L=27122&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9qLWVsZWN0aW9uLXRocmVhdC10YXNrZm9yY2UtYXBwZWFycy10by1oYXZlLXNvbWV0aGluZy10by1oaWRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Epoch Times Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said the U.S. Justice Department (DOJ) is being weaponized against opposing voices.
