clean_body: Plea to NIH Includes Research Information about Grafting Human Scalp Tissue onto Mice | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 18, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced today it obtained 34 pages of new records revealing that the Associate Senior Vice Chancellor for Science Strategy and Planning in the Health Sciences at the University of Pittsburgh, Dr. Jeremy Berg, contacted then-Director of the National Institutes of Health (NIH), Francis Collins requesting help to combat, “efforts to undermine important science using fetal tissue.” = ---|--- | | | | == | == A Chinese public university professor has been convicted of fraud for concealing ties to China’s government thanks to a Trump initiative—recently nixed by the Biden administration—designed to crack down on the Communist nation’s pervasive theft of American-funded research. A federal jury found the University of Kansas (KU) chemistry professor, Feng Tao, guilty of three counts of wire fraud and one count of false statements for deliberately concealing that he was also employed by a government-affiliated university in the People’s Republic of China (PRC) while working on research funded by the U.S. government. == ---|--- | | | | = | = “These documents show Major was a dangerous dog and the Biden White House lied about it, placing Secret Service and other White House personnel at needless risk,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “And it seems the Secret Service management seemed more concerned about managing press relations than taking care of its agents. In fact, the agency is still withholding information about this mess!” = ---|--- | | | | == | == Mexican drug cartels have conducted more than 9,000 drone flights into U.S. airspace in the last year to surveil American law enforcement and security operations in the southern border region, a senior Homeland Security official told Judicial Watch this week. The drones are observing federal, state, county, and city agencies near the Mexican border, including the U.S. Border Patrol, Texas Department of Public Safety, Texas National Guard, county sheriffs and local police. == ---|--- | | | = The Washington Examiner Some of the nation’s most famous corporations, including Lions Gate Entertainment and Live Nation, have not reported compliance with a California law that required boards of directors to meet a diversity quota. The law has just been declared unconstitutional by a Los Angeles judge, and yet a “shame list” remains online for the public to scrutinize which corporations have the most ethnic minorities on their boards. = == The New York Post Secret Service agents were outraged last year by the White House’s attempt to downplay bite injuries caused by then-first dog Major — even trying to get President Biden to personally pay for a damaged coat, newly released documents show. == = The Epoch Times Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said the U.S. Justice Department (DOJ) is being weaponized against opposing voices. Fitton’s group filed a lawsuit against the DOJ recently to get documents connected to the department’s election threat task force, after almost a year of no response to their Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request. Fitton thinks the DOJ has something they don’t want the public to know. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

body:
Once again, we have been ignored. | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kc-email-wrapper?refcode=em-header&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-2&email_referrer=email_1515037&email_subject=we-have-cried-out-for-accountability&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515037) Dear Team, Today, U.S. Attorney John Lausch [announced](https://chicago.suntimes.com/crime/2022/4/18/23030955/jason-van-dyke-no-federal-charges-u-s-attorney-john-lausch?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-2&email_referrer=email_1515037&email_subject=we-have-cried-out-for-accountability) that former Chicago Police Officer Jason Van Dyke will not face federal charges for the 2014 murder of 17-year-old Laquan McDonald. This announcement comes two and half months after Van Dyke was released from prison, after serving less than half of his 81-month prison sentence. **This is disgusting. It is a dereliction of duty from the U.S. Attorney and the federal government he represents. It is a slap in the face to Black Chicagoans and all Americans.** For years, the Black community here in Chicago has protested and cried out for accountability. And for months, we have pleaded with our broken system to bring federal charges against Van Dyke—the same charges that Derek Chauvin pleaded guilty to in December. We’ve even gotten arrested while trying to ensure that this message gets across. Once again, our words have been ignored. And once again, our nation’s criminal justice system is proving to be more criminal and less just. It’s once again telling Black Chicagoans that our lives—and our deaths—do not matter. So let me say this to U.S. Attorney John Lausch, because he clearly doesn’t understand: Sixteen bullets into Laquan’s body is a clear cut violation of his civil rights. A white officer shooting sixteen bullets into the body of a seventeen-year-old Black child—and then reloading his gun with more—warrants federal charges. End of discussion. **And let me say this to every elected official in Chicago and across the country: If you believe Black lives matter, now is the time to prove it and call on Attorney General Merrick Garland and the Justice Department to do their jobs and bring federal charges against Van Dyke. The buck doesn’t stop at a U.S. Attorney who refuses to do his job.** ****In solidarity, Kina Collins
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

If you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[Update your information](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/kc-update-your-information?clear_id=true&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-2&email_referrer=email_1515037&email_subject=we-have-cried-out-for-accountability)
[Unsubscribe](https://actionnetwork.org/email_unsubscribe/kina-collins?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_id=email_1515037&list_type=group&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-2&email_referrer=email_1515037&email_subject=we-have-cried-out-for-accountability)

subject: Today Only: Choose what program your donation will fund!

body:
Today you can choose what program your donation will fund. We have two critical programs that need support, make a contribution today and select where you’d like it to go.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220418-965-footer-ak&t=2&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)
Here’s where we’re at:
**Since the start of the campaign,** we’ve been traveling across the state so voters can meet Morgan personally and hear her plans for a better Ohio firsthand.
**Then,** just a few weeks ago, we aired our first TV ad to break through the noise and ensure we reach every single Ohioan with our grassroots, progressive message.
**But now,** Donald Trump has endorsed one of our right-wing Republican opponents, ensuring a wave of dark, Trump-affiliated money will flow into our race. So, we’re counting on you to make sure our message doesn’t get drowned out.
We’re just 15 days away from our primary election. We can’t afford to slow down and lose out on critical resources that allow us to amplify Morgan’s message and get voters to the polls on May 3.
[Today YOU can CHOOSE what program your donation will fund. We have two critical programs that need support. Make a $5 contribution today and select where you’d like it to go here »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32018?refcode=em20220418-965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32018?refcode=em20220418-965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)**
**Our Ads**
As you now know, we’re launched our first TV ads, and we’ve been running ads online all campaign. But these ads take significant resources to keep up. Your $5 contribution today would help ensure we have the funds needed to keep our ads on the air, drown out our corporate opponents, and spread Morgan’s message for a better future across the state.
[Donate now to keep our ads on the air »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32018?refcode=em20220418-965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)
**Organizing**
Your $5 contribution today would help us keep the organizing team supplied with literature, paper, clipboards, food, gas and everything else they need to keep organizing communities. Speaking with voters one on one is an important way to educate and mobilize folks to get out to the polls and vote for Morgan on May 3.
[Donate now to grow our organizing program »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32018?refcode=em20220418-965&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)
No matter which program you choose to send your donation to, we couldn’t be more grateful for your support. Both of these areas of our campaign are essential to guaranteeing our victory on May 3, and they both need more grassroots support NOW to be successful.
Thank you for stepping up today.
Team Morgan
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220418-965-footer&t=7&refcode2=965_90090_TpqLML&akid=965%2E90090%2ETpqLML)**

body:
We must hold MTG accountable at the ballot box. Read more >>>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/78df1161f2c4/voter-registration-deadline-8936713?e=daf3f68050)
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/pg_e_mtg-russia?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-russia_20220418&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-russia&utm_agency=PG&amount=5
Peter,

Every time we think she’s reached a new low, MTG opens her mouth again.

In recent weeks, as Russia has bombarded Ukraine and committed horrific war crimes targeting civilians – killing thousands of innocent men, women, and children – she’s called the people of Ukraine Nazis and suggested that Ukraine is to blame for the invasion.

She’s heaped praise on the Kremlin and she’s parroting Vladimir Putin’s vicious lies! She's even been featured on Russian state-owned television multiple times being used as a tool for Putin's war propaganda machine!

To call MTG’s pro-Russia rhetoric ignorant and disgraceful is an understatement. She cannot be allowed to continue to serve as our “representative” in the U.S. House.

We need to HOLD HER ACCOUNTABLE and SEND HER PACKING on May 24th.

Please make your plan to vote and rush critical support to help Jennifer WIN! (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/pg_e_mtg-russia?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-russia_20220418&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-russia&utm_agency=PG)
PITCH IN HERE >> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/pg_e_mtg-russia?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_mtg-russia_20220418&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=mtg-russia&utm_agency=PG)
It’s time to end this circus sideshow once and for all. Jennifer is running to restore our voice – she is a serious and focused fight-to-win conservative, who we can trust and be proud to call our representative in Congress.

With JUST WEEKS TO GO in this primary election we can’t let up!

Thank you for any donation you can send to help Jennifer DEFEAT MTG.

- Team Strahan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dellicker to visit all four PA-7 counties this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Meanwhile, Scheller dodges another debate | | | |
---
| | |
# **Dellicker to Visit All Four PA-7 Counties This Week**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Happy Easter everyone. I truly hope you all had a wonderful holiday weekend and spent some quality time with your families.

Last week, I had a great interview with Alan Jennings on WDIY Lehigh Valley Public Radio ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1dddae7c60&e=1090c5c412)) and appeared on PCN TV ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b9af598686&e=1090c5c412)). Our friends at the Steel Club in Bethlehem hosted a well-attended Town Hall with at least 50 people who asked questions about issues important to Lehigh Valley voters. I also went to an Easter Egg Hunt in Allentown and got to go fishing with my boys on Saturday morning. It was a great week.

This week, I'll be visiting all four PA-7 counties. On Wednesday, I'll be distributing yard signs in Carbon County and heading to Stroudsburg for a dinner with the women of the Monroe County GOP. On Thursday, I'll be in Lehigh County at the Leonard Buck Award Banquet to honor local police officers in Allentown. And on Saturday, I'll be in Bethlehem with my wife Susan for the Lehigh Valley Walk for Life.

In other news, Lisa Scheller declined a debate on WFMZ Business Matters, which is now the fourth offer she's dodged in the past two weeks. But she continues to court Washington politicians and out-of-state donors, as evidenced by her latest financial filing. I will continue to ask her about conflicts of interest in China ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=88a08baf79&e=1090c5c412)) and her outsourcing of jobs overseas ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=71f57c1599&e=1090c5c412)). If she can't answer the tough quesitons voters ask, how can she face the challenges ahead of us in Congress?

We just got a new shipment of yard signs, so if you would like to display one please email [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer) to make pickup arrangements.

Thank you for all your prayers and support!

God Bless,

---
|
---
| [Donate to Kevin's Campaign](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c48fe6e054&e=1090c5c412 "Donate to Kevin's Campaign")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8aeaccf157&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | **Yard Signs are In!**
If you would like to show your support for Kevin Dellicker by displaying a Dellicker for Congress Yard Sign, please email: [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer) or click on the "Volunteer" button below.
---
| [Volunteer](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f42b0b0b5b&e=1090c5c412 "Volunteer")
---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| On Saturday, Susan and I will be participating in the Lehigh Valley Walk for Life to benefit the Bright Hope Pregnancy Support Center. Bright Hope provides pregnancy support and life skills to women, men, and youth across the Lehigh Valley to help families choose life for their unborn children. They save lives and build strong families and deserve our support. I hope to see you Saturday.

Protecting life is our sacred obligation. When I get to Congress, I will be a consistent and reliable leader to protect unborn children. I oppose the abortion pill RU-486; Lisa Scheller supports it. I support a pro-life amendment to the U.S. Constitution; Lisa Scheller opposes it. I oppose health exemptions to anti-abortion legislation. Lisa Scheller supports them.

Don’t be fooled. Not everyone who says they are pro-life will fight to protect unborn children. I will.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4bece50fcd&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| Today is tax day. Often, on the campaign trail I tell the story of my sons’ landscaping business. It’s worth repeating even if you’ve heard it before.

During the COVID-19 lockdown in 2020, my three teenage sons started a landscaping company. They were concerned about getting jobs and paying bills, so they took matters into their own hands. They worked hard all summer long, earning $4,000 and learning difficult lessons about keeping customers happy, paying bills on time, and working together to get the job done.

Everything was great, until it came time to pay their taxes. Even though I’d been in business more than 15 years, I couldn’t figure out how to help them file a limited liability partnership return. After trying for a couple of days, we gave up and called an accountant.

He sent us a $1,000 bill and 151 pages of tax forms and filings. That’s right, my sons paid 25% of their profits on tax compliance with an average of 50 pages apiece. Remember, this was for three teenage boys spreading mulch and whacking weeds for the summer.

It’s no wonder we have a jobs problem. We want more tradesmen and self-sufficiency, but we make it nearly impossible for ordinary Americans to navigate all the rules and regulations to start a simple business.

Here’s an idea. Let’s break down the bureaucracy and get out of the way. Let business owners spend their time serving customers and practicing their trades instead of filing paperwork. I know what it’s like to wrestle with stifling rules and regulations. When I get to Congress, I hope to get on the Small Business Committee and work to make life easier for entrepreneurs, shopkeepers, restauranteurs, and mom-and-pop shops across the greater Lehigh Valley, even the budding landscapers in the photo above.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=37ee1620d1&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f33b462f3e&e=1090c5c412)
---
| On April 19 in 1775, colonial militiamen at Lexington and Concord engaged British regulars in the first battles of the American Revolutionary War. Since then, “citizen soldiers” have played a unique and vital role in American history, taking up arms when their nation requires and returning home when the battle is over. It’s a uniquely American tradition that continues in the National Guard.

I’m proud to serve my country as a “citizen soldier.” It’s a difficult life, as any of the 19,000 members of the Pennsylvania National Guard can attest. It’s a part-time job with a full-time commitment that affects the entire family. They fight overseas, support domestic law enforcement, assist with natural disasters, and do it all with a fraction of the resources available to the active duty.

When I’m elected to Congress, I’m going to propose a package of legislation that improves the family support infrastructure for the Guard and Reserves. Services should be delivered where troops live instead of where they train. They should cut across service components, so military bureaucracy doesn’t prevent a soldier from receiving help from an airman, and vice versa. And they should recognize the contributions of family members, so vulnerable spouses and children can access vital services too.

Thank you to all the members of the National Guard and Reserves who continue to serve their country as citizen soldiers. A grateful nation salutes you!

Military information and photos of Kevin in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Air Force, Army, or National Guard.

---

clean_body: Meanwhile, Scheller dodges another debate | | | | | | | Dellicker to Visit All Four PA-7 Counties This Week Dear Friends and Neighbors, Happy Easter everyone. I truly hope you all had a wonderful holiday weekend and spent some quality time with your families. Last week, I had a great interview with Alan Jennings on WDIY Lehigh Valley Public Radio () and appeared on PCN TV (). Our friends at the Steel Club in Bethlehem hosted a well-attended Town Hall with at least 50 people who asked questions about issues important to Lehigh Valley voters. I also went to an Easter Egg Hunt in Allentown and got to go fishing with my boys on Saturday morning. It was a great week. This week, I'll be visiting all four PA-7 counties. On Wednesday, I'll be distributing yard signs in Carbon County and heading to Stroudsburg for a dinner with the women of the Monroe County GOP. On Thursday, I'll be in Lehigh County at the Leonard Buck Award Banquet to honor local police officers in Allentown. And on Saturday, I'll be in Bethlehem with my wife Susan for the Lehigh Valley Walk for Life. In other news, Lisa Scheller declined a debate on WFMZ Business Matters, which is now the fourth offer she's dodged in the past two weeks. But she continues to court Washington politicians and out-of-state donors, as evidenced by her latest financial filing. I will continue to ask her about conflicts of interest in China () and her outsourcing of jobs overseas (). If she can't answer the tough quesitons voters ask, how can she face the challenges ahead of us in Congress? We just got a new shipment of yard signs, so if you would like to display one please email mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer to make pickup arrangements. Thank you for all your prayers and support! God Bless, | | "Donate to Kevin's Campaign" | | | | Yard Signs are In! If you would like to show your support for Kevin Dellicker by displaying a Dellicker for Congress Yard Sign, please email: mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer or click on the "Volunteer" button below. | "Volunteer" | | Strong Families | | On Saturday, Susan and I will be participating in the Lehigh Valley Walk for Life to benefit the Bright Hope Pregnancy Support Center. Bright Hope provides pregnancy support and life skills to women, men, and youth across the Lehigh Valley to help families choose life for their unborn children. They save lives and build strong families and deserve our support. I hope to see you Saturday. Protecting life is our sacred obligation. When I get to Congress, I will be a consistent and reliable leader to protect unborn children. I oppose the abortion pill RU-486; Lisa Scheller supports it. I support a pro-life amendment to the U.S. Constitution; Lisa Scheller opposes it. I oppose health exemptions to anti-abortion legislation. Lisa Scheller supports them. Don’t be fooled. Not everyone who says they are pro-life will fight to protect unborn children. I will. | "Learn More" | | Good Jobs | | Today is tax day. Often, on the campaign trail I tell the story of my sons’ landscaping business. It’s worth repeating even if you’ve heard it before. During the COVID-19 lockdown in 2020, my three teenage sons started a landscaping company. They were concerned about getting jobs and paying bills, so they took matters into their own hands. They worked hard all summer long, earning $4,000 and learning difficult lessons about keeping customers happy, paying bills on time, and working together to get the job done. Everything was great, until it came time to pay their taxes. Even though I’d been in business more than 15 years, I couldn’t figure out how to help them file a limited liability partnership return. After trying for a couple of days, we gave up and called an accountant. He sent us a $1,000 bill and 151 pages of tax forms and filings. That’s right, my sons paid 25% of their profits on tax compliance with an average of 50 pages apiece. Remember, this was for three teenage boys spreading mulch and whacking weeds for the summer. It’s no wonder we have a jobs problem. We want more tradesmen and self-sufficiency, but we make it nearly impossible for ordinary Americans to navigate all the rules and regulations to start a simple business. Here’s an idea. Let’s break down the bureaucracy and get out of the way. Let business owners spend their time serving customers and practicing their trades instead of filing paperwork. I know what it’s like to wrestle with stifling rules and regulations. When I get to Congress, I hope to get on the Small Business Committee and work to make life easier for entrepreneurs, shopkeepers, restauranteurs, and mom-and-pop shops across the greater Lehigh Valley, even the budding landscapers in the photo above. | "Learn More" | | Safe Communities | | On April 19 in 1775, colonial militiamen at Lexington and Concord engaged British regulars in the first battles of the American Revolutionary War. Since then, “citizen soldiers” have played a unique and vital role in American history, taking up arms when their nation requires and returning home when the battle is over. It’s a uniquely American tradition that continues in the National Guard. I’m proud to serve my country as a “citizen soldier.” It’s a difficult life, as any of the 19,000 members of the Pennsylvania National Guard can attest. It’s a part-time job with a full-time commitment that affects the entire family. They fight overseas, support domestic law enforcement, assist with natural disasters, and do it all with a fraction of the resources available to the active duty. When I’m elected to Congress, I’m going to propose a package of legislation that improves the family support infrastructure for the Guard and Reserves. Services should be delivered where troops live instead of where they train. They should cut across service components, so military bureaucracy doesn’t prevent a soldier from receiving help from an airman, and vice versa. And they should recognize the contributions of family members, so vulnerable spouses and children can access vital services too. Thank you to all the members of the National Guard and Reserves who continue to serve their country as citizen soldiers. A grateful nation salutes you! Military information and photos of Kevin in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Air Force, Army, or National Guard. | "Learn More" | | | Kevin Dellicker in the Community Wednesday, 04/20: Yard Sign Dropoff Various Locations | Carbon County Wednesday, 04/20: Monroe GOP Women's Dinner Terraview at Stroudsmoor, Stroudsburg, PA | 5:30 PM Thursday, 04/21: Leonard Buck Award Banquet | 5:30 PM Palace Center, 623 Hanover Avenue, Allentown, PA Saturday, 04/22: Lehigh Valley Walk for Life | 8:30 AM Bethlehem Township Community Center, Bethlehem, PA Email kevin@dellickerforcongress.com with questions or Visit our page: or Find us on Facebook: | | Get Involved! Please consider volunteering to help his campaign or making a donation to help him spread the message. He needs your help to KEEP AMERICA FREE! | "Donate" | | "Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress" | Military information and photos of Kevin in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Air Force, Army, or National Guard. | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Kevin Dellicker for Congress, All rights reserved. My primary opponent is anti-American energy, and during a gas crisis, the last thing we need in DC is a Republican that will support Biden’s disastrous policies on oil. We’re just two months away from the GOP primary, and in order to win, we need to hit our huge mid-April fundraising goal so we've extended our deadline to tonight. subject: Bill McSwain for Governor: Updates From the Campaign Trail
body:
Get involved to help Bill McSwain achieve a primary victory on May 17! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-for-governor-updates-from-the-campaign-trail?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| |
##
Bill McSwain for Governor: Updates From the Campaign Trail
April 18, 2022 Friends and Supporters,

Good evening! I hope each of you had a restful and relaxed Easter weekend. Yesterday, Easter Sunday, marked ONE month until the Republican primary election on May 17.

Starting today, we will be emailing you on a weekly basis to share the latest news from the trail, updates on Bill’s travels, and information on how you can get involved! This campaign is powered by you, our supporters, and we need your help every step of the way to achieve a primary victory!

We have many opportunities for you to help Bill win this election. From door knocking to phone banking, writing postcards to your neighbors or hosting a meet and greet, we have an opportunity that will fit your skillset.

**Want to get involved?** _All you have to do is fill out[this form](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=1adc4dc291&e=b1ec95759b) and someone from the campaign will contact you shortly. _

Thank you for your time, support, and generosity! With your help, in one month Bill McSwain will be the GOP nominee for Governor. We can’t wait to hear from you!

Best,

Derek Rockey
Field Director
Bill McSwain for Governor
717-706-2719
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=1f7b8a6c59&e=b1ec95759b)
---

| [**_DEVELOPING REPORT ISSUED TO YOU:_**
**Sen. Kyrsten Sinema throws cold water on President Biden’s Build Back Better revival**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/approve-kyrsten-sinema/?source=VPP_20220418_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1861%2E878179%2EPZq5gf)

We’re FURIOUS – because Sen. Sinema could BLOCK Build Back Better... _AGAIN!_

**Before she blocks President Biden’s premiere legislation, we need to show a WAVE of disapproval for Sen. Sinema’s anti ‐Biden obstruction.**

[**Let us know: Do you APPROVE of Sen. Kyrsten Sinema?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/approve-kyrsten-sinema/?source=VPP_20220418_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1861%2E878179%2EPZq5gf)

**FIRST:** Sens. Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin BLOCKED President Biden’s amazing Build Back Better agenda. It was a HUMILIATING defeat for Biden...

**SO THEN:** President Biden announced a new push to revive Build Back Better – **but Kyrsten Sinema is ALREADY opposed to the President’s plan!**

**SO NOW:** We’re conducting this urgent poll to show Sen. Sinema that her numbers will PLUMMET if she continues to block our Democratic priorities.

That’s why we need 7,500 Democrats – _including YOU!_ – to show a WAVE of disapproval for Sen. Sinema before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
**Please, let us know before MIDNIGHT:**
[**Do you APPROVE of Sen. Kyrsten Sinema?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/approve-kyrsten-sinema/?source=VPP_20220418_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=13&akid=1861%2E878179%2EPZq5gf)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1861%2E878179%2EPZq5gf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1861%2E878179%2EPZq5gf).**

Friends,

There’s one thing Alabama and the United States doesn’t need:**MORE CAREER POLITICIANS**.

Why? I’ll give you a couple of reasons.
* **Career politicians are _out of touch_**
* **Career politicians are always making _backroom deals_ with special interest groups and lobbyists**
* **Career politicians don’t have your interests in mind, they have _theirs_ **

That’s why I signed the **TERM LIMITS PLEDGE** , and that’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Alabama. I want to represent your interests, not my own. [ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=860becc7bf1c4c028a4b8ef80b1d9ddc&_e=OZS41A2DcyKalK6XeRKtLJRgnJsq0myDFeqqWQFJdquJmaKo7N_0xPQpAuoWYHIGU3qC6y4yAD3UicI5bjOJOyuFij_Bw_lcECmqqm6tSlS6VFFLkNoNWH6vcRFgjoNDm4LhSA6Spv-xPO9GvwixKWLcPivuvk-75iL3F8TWH2JHuti3BNjCvHSgj6-9CXHvzcMkhUdTlIzFwWECCWwJvUQms0G2o9liyESpRjEuztKgofuf0ANRtHcWTO_5d-Sf3GfFr3BDdnDCWcT-uufgeWZ_uXARSjxztxfxxamtfym6VsPqZgw23PMmYY-Z5kaI_ZvnhUHHtYsU-I3tC5sSVFPTUTamNJ0Vu9PtOnzsAHdV4PXGCMdijJJ_Omohy5mWQQjcZ76sPBhBEFW9CI8dw0xZFjuwZFFkPVUY4EtpCKiDHZnbaZS4lQxl4yfjU0swL-ipIRI1MoJ1SqNZq06t_DFa1D4AiM4LEz1uAqVzvo85bikV6vhZ9ISUiWldY2yfiZJ6buw8cM1LefUjedt-Y9vCymv6noG86ak314sKZbg%3D)
**I’m committed to serving you.**

I want to make sure that we have a better tomorrow for our children and their children, and we’re not going to get there by electing career politicians who don’t care about our country’s well-being.

If you agree and you’re able, please rush a donation below to power our campaign and fight for a better tomorrow, safe from career politicians.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f32cdab0c3954d1ebb6cd590936cd94d&_e=sG7Huf70_6cFicAuJTnoEkrpuoOGUwawzzSGr8qT9aCkrMmqL-c11FRTMQIib5OragYA2vt3SNT9mXwm4t1A8Evw8jkZP51DBw_t9lAgjCe-B7BTJP38ZJQ2sdbjU6fjJBXwevtWyyBqJLcgnQyQVKChTa2Sd09JuOBhitx2eRYZCUp2p46SbW3vqaV6bm1EZI_QK2K-1Nx6NWSHX_Hs3KZCxuIk69C2pr9Yio2tmDa0AkNKXa5wt4tYiGWMsc_4M25LakB1S8w1fn_av-bU9WZB7P_LaQpn0SzPaIXriwzIBh56qbPKOBRuXkhgtDz-8JE2nk4d9axJPQJ67qe0F_ANZdfQmgcf5ktx7BCKH1A%3D)
---
Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f32cdab0c3954d1ebb6cd590936cd94d&_e=sG7Huf70_6cFicAuJTnoEkrpuoOGUwawzzSGr8qT9aCkrMmqL-c11FRTMQIib5OragYA2vt3SNT9mXwm4t1A8Evw8jkZP51DBw_t9lAgjCe-B7BTJP38ZJQ2sdbjU6fjJBXwevtWyyBqJLcgnQyQVLMSoWg-2DrNYWCcThF5LsCcqzV4vOL-nELCx4MDD63TnKuOytGb_N4CQWjFwAGJqQTQdNujrD8bwFWrK3MORozr60BgAZXCZK1x_TmoFVNtjvlLA_728yASWGFR5wI18exxWg4YG_D61byGCnn4MTrqPeC8B53A7vk2UYfvC6FK9t9JN6O5_Z-YsqM3WezFeR9XiW5yU0k9AFCoSNCow_k%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f32cdab0c3954d1ebb6cd590936cd94d&_e=sG7Huf70_6cFicAuJTnoEkrpuoOGUwawzzSGr8qT9aCkrMmqL-c11FRTMQIib5OragYA2vt3SNT9mXwm4t1A8Evw8jkZP51DBw_t9lAgjCe-B7BTJP38ZJQ2sdbjU6fjJBXwevtWyyBqJLcgnQyQVL2mMCBc3u2lKnVfMCe1q31_V9-7ZSL2pTO4alQ5fIjVKLsNKWWapw-Hhk84gghI88LBz7OpZFB3e135k1aewo7wdIcM6uRi6izLHbRQH6Scuw2FOQmzaHzDpRXeSlAb5XkUDhYS96gczPhAKdv8xhpIrejeFbfRJ7K2RJw9zIUSoPK4P2QyyIzgM4mmrSlkMny9khGiO6inSRLoRoIZO7c%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f32cdab0c3954d1ebb6cd590936cd94d&_e=sG7Huf70_6cFicAuJTnoEkrpuoOGUwawzzSGr8qT9aCkrMmqL-c11FRTMQIib5OragYA2vt3SNT9mXwm4t1A8Evw8jkZP51DBw_t9lAgjCe-B7BTJP38ZJQ2sdbjU6fjJBXwevtWyyBqJLcgnQyQVBq_tRG0sKRQUGT6UHpxAggYAfTNbpcfruVTYja-1N-5q8mf8Mv_0MjImkvyAwh_LoO_QypW1XskDlX1BVLo70biBfJkWwE13_zpKyAebDEcXn7TOh7Iji0NbNF9EWo31rT8OyheysdWwuvKubA3OB8lbMjiPN8p6k8mXId8-nJ2Ks5MRJHI1sfafOF1FeKLneP2GpAHeXF_2Wl8NOdYK5M%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f32cdab0c3954d1ebb6cd590936cd94d&_e=sG7Huf70_6cFicAuJTnoEkrpuoOGUwawzzSGr8qT9aCkrMmqL-c11FRTMQIib5OragYA2vt3SNT9mXwm4t1A8Evw8jkZP51DBw_t9lAgjCe-B7BTJP38ZJQ2sdbjU6fjJBXwevtWyyBqJLcgnQyQVK14bIlyjunTyE_UrJfMgucOJqQss9MhkFuvnHFL0kzo0-oaxoKsOotxPVvbsVWK_LL3yHcCMzugT2ZsLOPq2XkuNCyk2a5bNo_qBP20gF3UhqcIzwhgAyK4HFmtnrf3BxISxJdORaUmE-KmVGCOzBWz9PsyGNM4fHPlejz1hapNV5rHxlVzFkQ398neLpVnjcARZkJQqCKN4pzi2o7OMZA%3D)
---

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more. Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Hi, fellow patriot.

I'm just checking in. I wanted to make sure you're still with me.

When we launched Elder for America PAC in January, the response we got from you out of the gate was overwhelming.

But lately our numbers have been lower, [**and I wanted to make sure I didn't lose you.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1486c26eeafa4244a986ca503eda0895&_e=nmlD9rIj6_1j-N2zrQTRv12M4cyW0ZKO85Vf3aVMLNQMU0Yk2dm20-_YCNF1Pg81jNS0eMJXYCT0Kau-fTM8aq3fVJR_N_ef9LZemm7iK9Tr7m3Zl7y7cXKbkaBkk5YqV-dmYrTO2czBtObo7S7ePB3zAP3M_72f_3r0WJ7tJt5LFtx0RH7bBRPbKzOVA361urX9PH9SKCwIqH1bNDD2yeoGRv4fu6X5ubICrlL88Gohyom6YQ4xPT5OU0pGkmOL6ByFQ6BWt1wQmWs-o0NY0xikEe7gtXZ4lhvfpqrrE3FZaKhq_LMVq_Dtkf1qsEZpxQpisN-OBSSNFGf6K8QdakWDWasOPTpmA2lUjM-HpLPqiKDv-F3DRFq-ycpKx6zG5jmbhIfJqnXkKOoPXg-D5b07uHcGI0nmyI6shyHa94pmAEzBWLXynmGrGOzkhc84)

Our mission is to help secure Republican victories in key Senate and House races in 2022 and defeat the woke leftist agenda at the local level.

But we have a long way to go yet, and if you're already done supporting me and our fight there's no way we can win.

So, I need you to let me know - **_are you still with me?_**

If so, **we really need you this month** , as the primary election season is kicking off.

body:
Protecting reproductive rights is about more than abortion and birth control.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276567/340894171/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220418-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5NTZiNi03MGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZTqONtgdCIg-sNuomKVxOzRUnBocnM4x-QChQLN7m8=)

| Team,

Recently, we have seen multiple states work to limit abortion access. Like Oklahoma who made performing an abortion a felony carrying a sentence of up to ten years, and states like Arizona, Wyoming, and Texas enacting near-total bans on this lifesaving procedure.

If the conservative-majority Supreme Court moves to overturn Roe v. Wade, even more states will make it practically impossible to access reproductive health care. **We need overwhelming majorities in Congress to do whatever it takes to protect reproductive rights at a federal level — and as a co-chair of recruitment at the DCCC, I’m helping lead the charge to elect more pro-choice members of Congress.**

[_**If you have the capacity, please consider contributing to my campaign today to ensure we hold our Democratic majority in Congress and don’t lose the rights we secured nearly 50 years ago.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276568/340894172/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220418-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5NTZiNi03MGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZTqONtgdCIg-sNuomKVxOzRUnBocnM4x-QChQLN7m8=)

clean_body: Protecting reproductive rights is about more than abortion and birth control. | = | Team, Recently, we have seen multiple states work to limit abortion access. Like Oklahoma who made performing an abortion a felony carrying a sentence of up to ten years, and states like Arizona, Wyoming, and Texas enacting near-total bans on this lifesaving procedure. If the conservative-majority Supreme Court moves to overturn Roe v. Wade, even more states will make it practically impossible to access reproductive health care. We need overwhelming majorities in Congress to do whatever it takes to protect reproductive rights at a federal level — and as a co-chair of recruitment at the DCCC, I’m helping lead the charge to elect more pro-choice members of Congress. = | = Protecting reproductive rights is about more than abortion and birth control — it’s about standing up for reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy for everyone. = Thank you for standing with me on this crucial issue, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Folks,

Mike Gibbons is a far-right, Trump-loving extremist, and one of the
wealthiest candidates in a GOP field heavy with out-of-touch
millionaires—his estimated worth is between $83 and $286 million dollars.

While Ohio working families face challenges like the rising costs of
health care and prescription drugs, stagnant wages, and inflation on
everyday items, Gibbons is pouring millions of his own fortune into trying
to buy Ohio’s open Senate seat.

name: Rick Scott
subject: The Washington Post has it out for us
body:
Peter, **The Washington Post just released a baseless article attacking me for standing up for Republican values.**

**Let me be clear: my ONLY two goals are to Rescue America and to retake Republican control of the Senate.**

The Washington Post, its woke owner Jeff Bezos, and the rest of its woke staff can’t stand that citizens are on board with our conservative mission, so they’ll do _whatever it takes_ to take us down.

People have attacked me my whole life. I’m not afraid of that.

_But what I AM worried about is the mainstream media tricking unassuming Americans into believing their lies._

**I know you’re smart enough not to fall for the fake news, so I need your help to set the record straight on our conservative message.**

**[Pitch in today so we can STOP the Liberal mainstream media and RESCUE name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Picket Signs & Posters: A History of Campaign Art
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5983882dc3dd/picket-signs-posters-a-history-of-campaign-art?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=cf7240fbf0&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,

What was your **earliest memory** of politics? Of campaigns?

For many of us, **understanding politicians and their campaigns** started with one small, impactful detail: campaign posters.
---
| |
---
Political campaign posters have been a**cornerstone of American art and culture since 1844.**

Between their **eye-catching colors and messages about their candidate,** campaign posters are a way of **blending a candidate’s mission with the art and culture of the decade. **

So, **after 178 years of campaign posters,** what do we know about them? And how do they work?
---
|
---
| Prior to 1844, **before candidates made poster art a staple of political campaigns,** they used cloth prints. One of the earliest examples is **Abraham Lincoln's run for the presidency in 1860.**
---
|
---
Howard, H. C. (ca. 1860) For president, Abram Lincoln. For vice president, Hannibal Hamlin. , ca. 1860. [Philadephia: publisher not identified] [Photograph] Retrieved from the Library of Congress, https://www.loc.gov/item/2003656570/.
| After 1844, **following the advent of the lithographic printing press,** American companies like Currier and Ives would use the lithographic printer to make bulk black and white prints. Later, a **specialized team of women would color the posters by hand** to add depth. One of our favorite examples of this technique is this poster** from 1848: **
---
|
---
N. Currier,_ Grand Democratic Free Soil Banner_ (Martin Van Buren and Charles F. Adams), 1848, lithograph with watercolor, 33 1⁄4 × 23 inches (84.5 × 58.4 cm)
| **The end of the nineteenth century** brought more innovation to the printing industry and more flare to campaign posters. **With more colors and less time on the printing press,** candidates were getting creative.

In 1908, **color lithographs** were all the rage:
---
|
---
John De Yongh, “ _Bill”_ , 1908, color lithograph showing presidential candidate William Howard Taft, 20 × 12 inches (51 × 30.5 cm)
| **In the 60s and 70s,** candidates and independent artists took color to a new level, using posters to **target political opponents and catch the eye. **
---
|
---
Andy Warhol, _Vote McGovern_ , 1972, screenprint, 42 × 42 inches (106.7 × 106.7 cm) © 2020 The Andy Warhol Foundation for the Visual Arts/Artists Rights Society (ARS), New York
---
| In one of the decade's **most recognizable campaigns,** Dwight D. Eisenhower used color and a catchy tagline to **create a movement. **
---
|
---
| The more you look through political campaign posters, **the more you see American art and culture reflected through them.** Historians say that a political campaign poster should **skip all logic, and hit you right in your heart and stomach.** Not all great campaign posters make a winning candidate, **but a winning candidate always makes great posters.**
---
|
---
| **Do you have a favorite political campaign poster you’d like to share? Send it to us on Instagram or Twitter at @beckyforutah! **
---
| As always, **thank you for your support.** If you'd like to learn more about campaign posters over the years, **check out these articles from[The Atlantic](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2af78b11f1&e=10c1db3257) and [Gagosian](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=76c8211b6d&e=10c1db3257).**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=86cc21f060&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3cff033d28&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=16926986d9&e=10c1db3257)
---

---
|

Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate**
P.O. Box 1467
Bountiful, UT 84011

You can [update your preferences](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3c3c9f2a2c&e=10c1db3257&c=f32d0d79ff) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3c3c9f2a2c&e=10c1db3257&c=f32d0d79ff).

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I need you with me in the fight to uphold Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, we need to talk about Roe v. Wade.
Oklahoma's ultraconservative governor just signed a near-total abortion ban into law, which comes on the heels of similar bans in Texas and Mississippi. **The right to choose is under relentless attack, and this onslaught from extremist GOP lawmakers won't stop until Roe v. Wade is overturned once and for all.**
This June, the Supreme Court's conservative majority of GOP-appointed justices is expected to do just that — to strike down Roe v. Wade despite decades of precedent. If they do, tens of millions of people will lose their most basic right to make decisions about their own bodies.
**Time _isn't_ on our side. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 members of this team to speak out by answering my emergency live poll before it closes at midnight tonight. Please, tell me now:**
**Should the Supreme Court uphold Roe v. Wade and protect reproductive freedom?**

name: Max Steiner
subject: re: Tax Day

Friend,

Tax day may not seem like a good time to ask for campaign donations. Some of you spent your Easter weekend filling out complicated tax returns, and many of you have had to write the IRS a check.

Here’s why it is appropriate though: one of the core aspects of government is taxation. We should care as much about tax policy as we do about how that money is spent.

I often point out the hypocrisy of LaMalfa complaining about “welfare” even as he cashes checks from the government and enjoys subsidized water rights. But it’s equally important to point out GOP hypocrisy on the need to “balance the budget” when they pass huge tax cuts for the wealthy every time they take power. They also haven’t tried to actually balance the budget since H.W. Bush increased taxes in 1991.

**Our tax system should be easier:** it should be automatic for everyone with 1-2 sources of W-2 income and 1-2 investment accounts.

**Our tax system should be more equitable:** tech billionaires should not be able to hide behind unrealized capital gains to live lives of luxury without contributing to the common good.

**Our tax system should be more efficient:** it’s crazy that the IRS focuses much of its already limited resources on auditing the poor. The IRS should be fully funded and it should be focusing on rich people who have a much larger incentive to cheat.

On Tax Day 2022, I want you to think about the tax system you would like to see -- and how different it is from what the Republican Party wants.

I will close by saying that, as a politician, it is not very much fun to ask for money either, and I have to ask for money a lot. It’s a bad system, and I wish it were different. But if I’m going to beat LaMalfa I need to reach independent voters. Doing that takes resources -- **[so I appreciate anything you're able to give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276659/340894877/-96927706?refcode=em-4.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjUyNDVmMS03MmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxA-E2KtrUy6xmonGysr4Ujgd-PrCxRvUiwuQnVS20E=)**

Thanks,

Max Steiner
Democrat and Combat Veteran For Congress
